authors_text: Meghal Gupta,Naren Sarayu Manoj
title: An Optimal Algorithm for Certifying Monotone Functions
title_zh: 证明单调函数的最优算法
abstract: Given query access to a monotone function $f\colon\{0,1\}^n\to\{0,1\}$ with certificate complexity $C(f)$ and an input $x^{\star}$, we design an algorithm that outputs a size-$C(f)$ subset of $x^{\star}$ certifying the value of $f(x^{\star})$. Our algorithm makes $O(C(f) \cdot \log n)$ queries to $f$, which matches the information-theoretic lower bound for this problem and resolves the concrete open question posed in the STOC '22 paper of Blanc, Koch, Lange, and Tan [BKLT22]. We extend this result to an algorithm that finds a size-$2C(f)$ certificate for a real-valued monotone function with $O(C(f) \cdot \log n)$ queries. We also complement our algorithms with a hardness result, in which we show that finding the shortest possible certificate in $x^{\star}$ may require $Ω\left(\binom{n}{C(f)}\right)$ queries in the worst case.
summary: Given query access to a monotone function $f\colon\{0,1\}^n\to\{0,1\}$ with certificate complexity $C(f)$ and an input $x^{\star}$, we design an algorithm that outputs a size-$C(f)$ subset of $x^{\star}$ certifying the value of $f(x^{\star})$. Our algorithm makes $O(C(f) \cdot \log n)$ queries to $f$, which matches the information-theoretic lower bound for this problem and resolves the concrete open question posed in the STOC '22 paper of Blanc, Koch, Lange, and Tan [BKLT22]. We extend this result to an algorithm that finds a size-$2C(f)$ certificate for a real-valued monotone function with $O(C(f) \cdot \log n)$ queries. We also complement our algorithms with a hardness result, in which we show that finding the shortest possible certificate in $x^{\star}$ may require $Ω\left(\binom{n}{C(f)}\right)$ queries in the worst case.
abstract_zh: 给定对单调函数 $f\colon\{0,1\}^n\to\{0,1\}$ 的查询访问，证书复杂度为 $C(f)$ 和输入 $x^{\star}$，我们设计一个算法，输出 $x^{\star}$ 的大小 $C(f)$ 子集，证明 $f(x^{\star})$ 的值。我们的算法对 $f$ 进行 $O(C(f) \cdot \log n)$ 查询，这与该问题的信息论下界相匹配，并解决了 Blanc、Koch、Lange 和 Tan [BKLT22] 的 STOC '22 论文中提出的具体开放问题。我们将此结果扩展到一个算法，该算法通过 $O(C(f) \cdot \log n)$ 查询为实值单调函数找到大小 $2C(f)$ 证书。我们还用硬度结果来补充我们的算法，其中我们表明在最坏的情况下，在 $x^{\star}$ 中找到最短的可能证书可能需要 $Ω\left(\binom{n}{C(f)}\right)$ 查询。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种最优算法，用于验证单调函数在给定输入下的值，并输出一个大小为证书复杂度C(f)的子集作为证明。
AI.motivation: 证书复杂度是计算学习理论中的核心概念，但如何高效找到最短证书仍是开放问题。本文旨在解决这一问题并改进现有算法的查询效率。
AI.method: 提出一种基于查询的算法，通过O(C(f)·log n)次函数调用输出C(f)大小的证书，并扩展至实值单调函数，同时证明最短证书搜索的下界硬度。
AI.result: 算法达到信息论下界，解决STOC'22提出的问题；扩展算法可处理实值函数；证明最坏情况下需Ω(C(n, C(f)))次查询才能找到最短证书。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在查询效率上达到理论最优，为单调函数证书复杂度研究提供了新工具，并揭示了最短证书搜索的固有难度。

authors_text: Tiantian Wang,Nikolaos Sarafianos,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Tony Tung
title: Neural Rendering of Humans in Novel View and Pose from Monocular Video
title_zh: 单目视频中人类新视角和姿势的神经渲染
abstract: We introduce a new method that generates photo-realistic humans under novel views and poses given a monocular video as input. Despite the significant progress recently on this topic, with several methods exploring shared canonical neural radiance fields in dynamic scene scenarios, learning a user-controlled model for unseen poses remains a challenging task. To tackle this problem, we introduce an effective method to a) integrate observations across several frames and b) encode the appearance at each individual frame. We accomplish this by utilizing both the human pose that models the body shape as well as point clouds that partially cover the human as input. Our approach simultaneously learns a shared set of latent codes anchored to the human pose among several frames, and an appearance-dependent code anchored to incomplete point clouds generated by each frame and its predicted depth. The former human pose-based code models the shape of the performer whereas the latter point cloud-based code predicts fine-level details and reasons about missing structures at the unseen poses. To further recover non-visible regions in query frames, we employ a temporal transformer to integrate features of points in query frames and tracked body points from automatically-selected key frames. Experiments on various sequences of dynamic humans from different datasets including ZJU-MoCap show that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches under unseen poses and novel views given monocular videos as input.
summary: We introduce a new method that generates photo-realistic humans under novel views and poses given a monocular video as input. Despite the significant progress recently on this topic, with several methods exploring shared canonical neural radiance fields in dynamic scene scenarios, learning a user-controlled model for unseen poses remains a challenging task. To tackle this problem, we introduce an effective method to a) integrate observations across several frames and b) encode the appearance at each individual frame. We accomplish this by utilizing both the human pose that models the body shape as well as point clouds that partially cover the human as input. Our approach simultaneously learns a shared set of latent codes anchored to the human pose among several frames, and an appearance-dependent code anchored to incomplete point clouds generated by each frame and its predicted depth. The former human pose-based code models the shape of the performer whereas the latter point cloud-based code predicts fine-level details and reasons about missing structures at the unseen poses. To further recover non-visible regions in query frames, we employ a temporal transformer to integrate features of points in query frames and tracked body points from automatically-selected key frames. Experiments on various sequences of dynamic humans from different datasets including ZJU-MoCap show that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches under unseen poses and novel views given monocular videos as input.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新方法，可以在给定单眼视频作为输入的情况下，在新颖的视图和姿势下生成逼真的人类。尽管最近在这个主题上取得了重大进展，有几种方法探索动态场景场景中共享的规范神经辐射场，但学习用户控制的看不见姿势的模型仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种有效的方法：a）整合多个帧的观察结果；b）对每个单独帧的外观进行编码。我们通过利用对身体形状进行建模的人体姿势以及部分覆盖人体的点云作为输入来实现这一点。我们的方法同时学习一组锚定到多个帧中的人体姿势的共享潜在代码，以及锚定到每个帧及其预测深度生成的不完整点云的外观相关代码。前一种基于人体姿势的代码对表演者的形状进行建模，而后一种基于点云的代码则预测精细的细节以及未见过的姿势中缺失结构的原因。为了进一步恢复查询帧中的不可见区域，我们采用时间转换器来集成查询帧中的点的特征和自动选择的关键帧中跟踪的身体点。对来自不同数据集（包括 ZJU-MoCap）的各种动态人体序列进行的实验表明，在给定单目视频作为输入的情况下，我们的方法在未见过的姿势和新视图下明显优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种从单目视频中生成具有新视角和姿态的逼真人类图像的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有方法在动态场景中探索了共享的神经辐射场，但学习用户可控的未见过姿态模型仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过整合多帧观测和编码每帧外观，利用人体姿态和点云输入，学习基于姿态的共享潜在码和基于点云的外观依赖码，并采用时序Transformer恢复不可见区域。
AI.result: 在ZJU-MoCap等数据集的实验表明，该方法在未见过姿态和新视角下显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合姿态和点云编码及时序特征整合，有效解决了单目视频中人体新视角和姿态渲染的难题。

authors_text: Peter Washington,Aayush Nandkeolyar,Sam Yang
title: MLPro: A System for Hosting Crowdsourced Machine Learning Challenges for Open-Ended Research Problems
title_zh: MLPro：用于托管开放式研究问题的众包机器学习挑战的系统
abstract: The task of developing a machine learning (ML) model for a particular problem is inherently open-ended, and there is an unbounded set of possible solutions. Steps of the ML development pipeline, such as feature engineering, loss function specification, data imputation, and dimensionality reduction, require the engineer to consider an extensive and often infinite array of possibilities. Successfully identifying high-performing solutions for an unfamiliar dataset or problem requires a mix of mathematical prowess and creativity applied towards inventing and repurposing novel ML methods. Here, we explore the feasibility of hosting crowdsourced ML challenges to facilitate a breadth-first exploration of open-ended research problems, thereby expanding the search space of problem solutions beyond what a typical ML team could viably investigate. We develop MLPro, a system which combines the notion of open-ended ML coding problems with the concept of an automatic online code judging platform. To conduct a pilot evaluation of this paradigm, we crowdsource several open-ended ML challenges to ML and data science practitioners. We describe results from two separate challenges. We find that for sufficiently unconstrained and complex problems, many experts submit similar solutions, but some experts provide unique solutions which outperform the "typical" solution class. We suggest that automated expert crowdsourcing systems such as MLPro have the potential to accelerate ML engineering creativity.
summary: The task of developing a machine learning (ML) model for a particular problem is inherently open-ended, and there is an unbounded set of possible solutions. We find that for sufficiently unconstrained and complex problems, many experts submit similar solutions, but some experts provide unique solutions which outperform the "typical" solution class. We suggest that automated expert crowdsourcing systems such as MLPro have the potential to accelerate ML engineering creativity.
abstract_zh: 针对特定问题开发机器学习 (ML) 模型的任务本质上是开放式的，并且存在无限的可能解决方案。机器学习开发流程的步骤，例如特征工程、损失函数规范、数据插补和降维，要求工程师考虑广泛且通常是无限的可能性。成功地为不熟悉的数据集或问题找到高性能解决方案需要将数学能力和创造力结合起来，以发明和重新利用新颖的机器学习方法。在这里，我们探讨了举办众包 ML 挑战的可行性，以促进对开放式研究问题的广度优先探索，从而将问题解决方案的搜索空间扩展到典型 ML 团队可以研究的范围之外。我们开发了 MLPro，这是一个将开放式 ML 编码问题的概念与自动在线代码判断平台的概念相结合的系统。为了对这种范式进行试点评估，我们向机器学习和数据科学从业者众包了几个开放式机器学习挑战。我们描述了两个不同挑战的结果。我们发现，对于足够不受约束和复杂的问题，许多专家提交了类似的解决方案，但一些专家提供了优于“典型”解决方案类别的独特解决方案。我们认为 MLPro 等自动化专家众包系统有潜力加速 ML 工程创造力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MLPro系统，通过众包方式举办机器学习挑战赛，以探索开放性研究问题的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 开发机器学习模型时存在无限可能的解决方案，传统团队难以全面探索，需借助众包扩大搜索空间。
AI.method: 构建结合开放性ML编程问题与自动在线代码评判平台的MLPro系统，并面向ML从业者开展试点挑战赛。
AI.result: 在复杂问题中，多数专家提交相似方案，但部分独特方案显著优于常规解法。
AI.conclusion: 自动化专家众包系统如MLPro可加速机器学习工程的创新进程。

search_text: MLPro: A System for Hosting Crowdsourced Machine Learning Challenges for Open-Ended Research Problems MLPro：用于托管开放式研究问题的众包机器学习挑战的系统 The task of developing a machine learning (ML) model for a particular problem is inherently open-ended, and there is an unbounded set of possible solutions. Steps of the ML development pipeline, such as feature engineering, loss function specification, data imputation, and dimensionality reduction, require the engineer to consider an extensive and often infinite array of possibilities. Successfully identifying high-performing solutions for an unfamiliar dataset or problem requires a mix of mathematical prowess and creativity applied towards inventing and repurposing novel ML methods. Here, we explore the feasibility of hosting crowdsourced ML challenges to facilitate a breadth-first exploration of open-ended research problems, thereby expanding the search space of problem solutions beyond what a typical ML team could viably investigate. We develop MLPro, a system which combines the notion of open-ended ML coding problems with the concept of an automatic online code judging platform. To conduct a pilot evaluation of this paradigm, we crowdsource several open-ended ML challenges to ML and data science practitioners. We describe results from two separate challenges. We find that for sufficiently unconstrained and complex problems, many experts submit similar solutions, but some experts provide unique solutions which outperform the "typical" solution class. We suggest that automated expert crowdsourcing systems such as MLPro have the potential to accelerate ML engineering creativity. 针对特定问题开发机器学习 (ML) 模型的任务本质上是开放式的，并且存在无限的可能解决方案。机器学习开发流程的步骤，例如特征工程、损失函数规范、数据插补和降维，要求工程师考虑广泛且通常是无限的可能性。成功地为不熟悉的数据集或问题找到高性能解决方案需要将数学能力和创造力结合起来，以发明和重新利用新颖的机器学习方法。在这里，我们探讨了举办众包 ML 挑战的可行性，以促进对开放式研究问题的广度优先探索，从而将问题解决方案的搜索空间扩展到典型 ML 团队可以研究的范围之外。我们开发了 MLPro，这是一个将开放式 ML 编码问题的概念与自动在线代码判断平台的概念相结合的系统。为了对这种范式进行试点评估，我们向机器学习和数据科学从业者众包了几个开放式机器学习挑战。我们描述了两个不同挑战的结果。我们发现，对于足够不受约束和复杂的问题，许多专家提交了类似的解决方案，但一些专家提供了优于“典型”解决方案类别的独特解决方案。我们认为 MLPro 等自动化专家众包系统有潜力加速 ML 工程创造力。 本文提出MLPro系统，通过众包方式举办机器学习挑战赛，以探索开放性研究问题的解决方案。 Peter Washington,Aayush Nandkeolyar,Sam Yang cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Hailan Lin,Qijie Wei,Kaibin Tian,Ruixiang Zhao,Xirong Li
title: Co-Teaching for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation and Expansion
title_zh: 无监督领域适应和扩展的共同教学
comment: Accepted as a long paper at MMM 2026
comments: Accepted as a long paper at MMM 2026
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) essentially trades a model's performance on a source domain for improving its performance on a target domain. To overcome this, Unsupervised Domain Expansion (UDE) has been introduced, which adapts the model to the target domain while preserving its performance in the source domain. In both UDA and UDE, a model tailored to a given domain is assumed to well handle samples from the given domain. We question the assumption by reporting the existence of cross-domain visual ambiguity: Due to the unclear boundary between the two domains, samples from one domain can be visually close to the other domain. Such sorts of samples are typically in the minority in their host domain, so they tend to be overlooked by the domain-specific model, but can be better handled by a model from the other domain. We exploit this finding by proposing Co-Teaching (CT), which is instantiated with knowledge distillation based CT (kdCT) plus mixup based CT (miCT). Specifically, kdCT leverages a dual-teacher architecture to enhance the student network's ability to handle cross-domain ambiguity. Meanwhile, miCT further enhances the generalization ability of the student. Extensive experiments on image classification and driving-scene segmentation show the viability of CT for UDE.
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) essentially trades a model's performance on a source domain for improving its performance on a target domain. To overcome this, Unsupervised Domain Expansion (UDE) has been introduced, which adapts the model to the target domain while preserving its performance in the source domain. In both UDA and UDE, a model tailored to a given domain is assumed to well handle samples from the given domain. We question the assumption by reporting the existence of cross-domain visual ambiguity: Due to the unclear boundary between the two domains, samples from one domain can be visually close to the other domain. Such sorts of samples are typically in the minority in their host domain, so they tend to be overlooked by the domain-specific model, but can be better handled by a model from the other domain. We exploit this finding by proposing Co-Teaching (CT), which is instantiated with knowledge distillation based CT (kdCT) plus mixup based CT (miCT). Specifically, kdCT leverages a dual-teacher architecture to enhance the student network's ability to handle cross-domain ambiguity. Meanwhile, miCT further enhances the generalization ability of the student. Extensive experiments on image classification and driving-scene segmentation show the viability of CT for UDE.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应 (UDA) 本质上是用模型在源域上的性能来提高其在目标域上的性能。为了克服这个问题，引入了无监督域扩展（UDE），它使模型适应目标域，同时保留其在源域中的性能。在 UDA 和 UDE 中，假设针对给定域定制的模型能够很好地处理来自给定域的样本。我们通过报告跨域视觉模糊性的存在来质疑这一假设：由于两个域之间的边界不明确，来自一个域的样本在视觉上可能接近另一个域。此类样本在其宿主域中通常占少数，因此它们往往会被特定于域的模型忽略，但可以由其他域的模型更好地处理。我们通过提出协同教学（CT）来利用这一发现，它是通过基于知识蒸馏的 CT（kdCT）加上基于混合的 CT（miCT）来实例化的。具体来说，kdCT 利用双教师架构来增强学生网络处理跨域歧义的能力。同时，miCT进一步增强了学生的泛化能力。图像分类和驾驶场景分割的大量实验表明了 CT 对于 UDE 的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Co-Teaching（CT）的方法，用于无监督域适应与扩展（UDE），旨在通过跨域样本的协同学习提升目标域性能同时保持源域性能。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督域适应（UDA）以牺牲源域性能为代价提升目标域性能，而UDE需同时保持两者。作者发现跨域视觉模糊现象（样本在视觉上接近另一域），现有模型易忽略此类样本，从而提出CT方法以解决此问题。
AI.method: CT包含两个组件：基于知识蒸馏的kdCT（双教师架构增强学生网络处理模糊样本能力）和基于Mixup的miCT（提升学生网络泛化能力）。
AI.result: 在图像分类和驾驶场景分割任务中，CT方法在UDE任务上表现出色，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CT通过利用跨域模糊样本的协同学习，结合知识蒸馏与Mixup技术，有效提升了UDE性能，为域适应与扩展提供了新思路。

authors_text: Joonhyun Jeong,Beomyoung Kim,Joonsang Yu,Youngjoon Yoo
title: EResFD: Rediscovery of the Effectiveness of Standard Convolution for Lightweight Face Detection
title_zh: EResFD：重新发现标准卷积在轻量级人脸检测中的有效性
abstract: This paper analyzes the design choices of face detection architecture that improve efficiency of computation cost and accuracy. Specifically, we re-examine the effectiveness of the standard convolutional block as a lightweight backbone architecture for face detection. Unlike the current tendency of lightweight architecture design, which heavily utilizes depthwise separable convolution layers, we show that heavily channel-pruned standard convolution layers can achieve better accuracy and inference speed when using a similar parameter size. This observation is supported by the analyses concerning the characteristics of the target data domain, faces. Based on our observation, we propose to employ ResNet with a highly reduced channel, which surprisingly allows high efficiency compared to other mobile-friendly networks (e.g., MobileNetV1, V2, V3). From the extensive experiments, we show that the proposed backbone can replace that of the state-of-the-art face detector with a faster inference speed. Also, we further propose a new feature aggregation method to maximize the detection performance. Our proposed detector EResFD obtained 80.4% mAP on WIDER FACE Hard subset which only takes 37.7 ms for VGA image inference on CPU. Code is available at https://github.com/clovaai/EResFD.
summary: This paper analyzes the design choices of face detection architecture that improve efficiency of computation cost and accuracy. Specifically, we re-examine the effectiveness of the standard convolutional block as a lightweight backbone architecture for face detection. Unlike the current tendency of lightweight architecture design, which heavily utilizes depthwise separable convolution layers, we show that heavily channel-pruned standard convolution layers can achieve better accuracy and inference speed when using a similar parameter size. This observation is supported by the analyses concerning the characteristics of the target data domain, faces. Based on our observation, we propose to employ ResNet with a highly reduced channel, which surprisingly allows high efficiency compared to other mobile-friendly networks (e.g., MobileNetV1, V2, V3). From the extensive experiments, we show that the proposed backbone can replace that of the state-of-the-art face detector with a faster inference speed. Also, we further propose a new feature aggregation method to maximize the detection performance. Our proposed detector EResFD obtained 80.4% mAP on WIDER FACE Hard subset which only takes 37.7 ms for VGA image inference on CPU. Code is available at https://github.com/clovaai/EResFD.
abstract_zh: 本文分析了人脸检测架构的设计选择，以提高计算成本和准确性的效率。具体来说，我们重新检查了标准卷积块作为人脸检测的轻量级骨干架构的有效性。与当前大量使用深度可分离卷积层的轻量级架构设计趋势不同，我们表明，在使用相似的参数大小时，经过大量通道修剪的标准卷积层可以实现更好的准确性和推理速度。这一观察结果得到了有关目标数据域面孔特征的分析的支持。根据我们的观察，我们建议采用通道高度减少的 ResNet，与其他适合移动设备的网络（例如 MobileNetV1、V2、V3）相比，它具有令人惊讶的高效率。从大量的实验中，我们表明所提出的主干可以以更快的推理速度取代最先进的人脸检测器。此外，我们进一步提出了一种新的特征聚合方法来最大化检测性能。我们提出的检测器 EResFD 在 WIDER FACE Hard 子集上获得了 80.4% mAP，在 CPU 上进行 VGA 图像推理仅花费 37.7 毫秒。代码可在 https://github.com/clovaai/EResFD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EResFD的轻量级人脸检测器，通过重新评估标准卷积在轻量级架构中的有效性，实现了高效且准确的人脸检测。
AI.motivation: 当前轻量级架构设计倾向于使用深度可分离卷积，但本文发现通过通道剪枝的标准卷积可以实现更高的准确率和推理速度，因此提出重新评估其有效性。
AI.method: 本文提出使用高度减少通道的ResNet作为骨干网络，并结合新的特征聚合方法，以提高检测性能。
AI.result: EResFD在WIDER FACE Hard子集上达到了80.4%的mAP，且在CPU上处理VGA图像仅需37.7 ms。
AI.conclusion: 标准卷积在轻量级人脸检测中表现出色，通过通道剪枝和特征聚合方法可显著提升检测效率和准确性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EResFD的轻量级人脸检测器，通过重新评估标准卷积在轻量级架构中的有效性，实现了高效且准确的人脸检测。

search_text: EResFD: Rediscovery of the Effectiveness of Standard Convolution for Lightweight Face Detection EResFD：重新发现标准卷积在轻量级人脸检测中的有效性 This paper analyzes the design choices of face detection architecture that improve efficiency of computation cost and accuracy. Specifically, we re-examine the effectiveness of the standard convolutional block as a lightweight backbone architecture for face detection. Unlike the current tendency of lightweight architecture design, which heavily utilizes depthwise separable convolution layers, we show that heavily channel-pruned standard convolution layers can achieve better accuracy and inference speed when using a similar parameter size. This observation is supported by the analyses concerning the characteristics of the target data domain, faces. Based on our observation, we propose to employ ResNet with a highly reduced channel, which surprisingly allows high efficiency compared to other mobile-friendly networks (e.g., MobileNetV1, V2, V3). From the extensive experiments, we show that the proposed backbone can replace that of the state-of-the-art face detector with a faster inference speed. Also, we further propose a new feature aggregation method to maximize the detection performance. Our proposed detector EResFD obtained 80.4% mAP on WIDER FACE Hard subset which only takes 37.7 ms for VGA image inference on CPU. Code is available at https://github.com/clovaai/EResFD. 本文分析了人脸检测架构的设计选择，以提高计算成本和准确性的效率。具体来说，我们重新检查了标准卷积块作为人脸检测的轻量级骨干架构的有效性。与当前大量使用深度可分离卷积层的轻量级架构设计趋势不同，我们表明，在使用相似的参数大小时，经过大量通道修剪的标准卷积层可以实现更好的准确性和推理速度。这一观察结果得到了有关目标数据域面孔特征的分析的支持。根据我们的观察，我们建议采用通道高度减少的 ResNet，与其他适合移动设备的网络（例如 MobileNetV1、V2、V3）相比，它具有令人惊讶的高效率。从大量的实验中，我们表明所提出的主干可以以更快的推理速度取代最先进的人脸检测器。此外，我们进一步提出了一种新的特征聚合方法来最大化检测性能。我们提出的检测器 EResFD 在 WIDER FACE Hard 子集上获得了 80.4% mAP，在 CPU 上进行 VGA 图像推理仅花费 37.7 毫秒。代码可在 https://github.com/clovaai/EResFD 获取。 本文提出了一种名为EResFD的轻量级人脸检测器，通过重新评估标准卷积在轻量级架构中的有效性，实现了高效且准确的人脸检测。 Joonhyun Jeong,Beomyoung Kim,Joonsang Yu,Youngjoon Yoo cs.CV

authors_text: Wenjia Xu,Yongqin Xian,Jiuniu Wang,Bernt Schiele,Zeynep Akata
title: Attribute Prototype Network for Any-Shot Learning
title_zh: 用于任意样本学习的属性原型网络
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2008.08290
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2008.08290
abstract: Any-shot image classification allows to recognize novel classes with only a few or even zero samples. For the task of zero-shot learning, visual attributes have been shown to play an important role, while in the few-shot regime, the effect of attributes is under-explored. To better transfer attribute-based knowledge from seen to unseen classes, we argue that an image representation with integrated attribute localization ability would be beneficial for any-shot, i.e. zero-shot and few-shot, image classification tasks. To this end, we propose a novel representation learning framework that jointly learns discriminative global and local features using only class-level attributes. While a visual-semantic embedding layer learns global features, local features are learned through an attribute prototype network that simultaneously regresses and decorrelates attributes from intermediate features. Furthermore, we introduce a zoom-in module that localizes and crops the informative regions to encourage the network to learn informative features explicitly. We show that our locality augmented image representations achieve a new state-of-the-art on challenging benchmarks, i.e. CUB, AWA2, and SUN. As an additional benefit, our model points to the visual evidence of the attributes in an image, confirming the improved attribute localization ability of our image representation. The attribute localization is evaluated quantitatively with ground truth part annotations, qualitatively with visualizations, and through well-designed user studies.
summary: Any-shot image classification allows to recognize novel classes with only a few or even zero samples. For the task of zero-shot learning, visual attributes have been shown to play an important role, while in the few-shot regime, the effect of attributes is under-explored. To better transfer attribute-based knowledge from seen to unseen classes, we argue that an image representation with integrated attribute localization ability would be beneficial for any-shot, i.e. zero-shot and few-shot, image classification tasks. To this end, we propose a novel representation learning framework that jointly learns discriminative global and local features using only class-level attributes. While a visual-semantic embedding layer learns global features, local features are learned through an attribute prototype network that simultaneously regresses and decorrelates attributes from intermediate features. Furthermore, we introduce a zoom-in module that localizes and crops the informative regions to encourage the network to learn informative features explicitly. We show that our locality augmented image representations achieve a new state-of-the-art on challenging benchmarks, i.e. CUB, AWA2, and SUN. As an additional benefit, our model points to the visual evidence of the attributes in an image, confirming the improved attribute localization ability of our image representation. The attribute localization is evaluated quantitatively with ground truth part annotations, qualitatively with visualizations, and through well-designed user studies.
abstract_zh: 任意镜头图像分类允许仅用少量甚至零样本来识别新类别。对于零样本学习任务，视觉属性已被证明发挥着重要作用，而在少样本情况下，属性的影响尚未得到充分探索。为了更好地将基于属性的知识从可见类迁移到未见类，我们认为具有集成属性定位能力的图像表示对于任意镜头（即零镜头和少镜头）图像分类任务将是有益的。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的表示学习框架，该框架仅使用类级属性来联合学习有区别的全局和局部特征。虽然视觉语义嵌入层学习全局特征，但局部特征是通过属性原型网络学习的，该网络同时对中间特征的属性进行回归和去相关。此外，我们引入了一个放大模块，可以本地化和裁剪信息区域，以鼓励网络明确地学习信息特征。我们表明，我们的局部增强图像表示在具有挑战性的基准（即 CUB、AWA2 和 SUN）上达到了新的最先进水平。作为额外的好处，我们的模型指出了图像中属性的视觉证据，证实了我们的图像表示的改进的属性定位能力。属性定位通过地面实况部分注释进行定量评估，通过可视化进行定性评估，并通过精心设计的用户研究进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种属性原型网络，用于实现任意样本数量（包括零样本和少样本）的图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 在零样本学习中，视觉属性已被证明对识别新类别非常重要，但在少样本学习中，属性的作用尚未被充分探索。因此，作者认为结合属性定位能力的图像表示有助于提升任意样本数量下的分类性能。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种新的表示学习框架，该框架通过仅使用类别级别的属性，联合学习具有判别性的全局和局部特征。其中，一个视觉-语义嵌入层用于学习全局特征，而一个属性原型网络则通过同时回归和解相关属性来学习局部特征。此外，还引入了一个放大模块，用于定位并裁剪图像中的信息区域，以促进网络学习到更具信息量的特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在CUB、AWA2和SUN等具有挑战性的基准数据集上取得了新的最先进结果。此外，该模型还能够指出图像中属性的视觉证据，证明了其改进的属性定位能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种结合属性定位能力的图像表示方法，有效提升了任意样本数量下的图像分类性能，并通过实验验证了其优越性。

To better transfer attribute-based knowledge from seen to unseen classes, we argue that an image representation with integrated attribute localization ability would be beneficial for any-shot, i.e. zero-shot and few-shot, image classification tasks. To this end, we propose a novel representation learning framework that jointly learns discriminative global and local features using only class-level attributes. While a visual-semantic embedding layer learns global features, local features are learned through an attribute prototype network that simultaneously regresses and decorrelates attributes from intermediate features. Furthermore, we introduce a zoom-in module that localizes and crops the informative regions to encourage the network to learn informative features explicitly. We show that our locality augmented image representations achieve a new state-of-the-art on challenging benchmarks, i.e. CUB, AWA2, and SUN. As an additional benefit, our model points to the visual evidence of the attributes in an image, confirming the improved attribute localization ability of our image representation. The attribute localization is evaluated quantitatively with ground truth part annotations, qualitatively with visualizations, and through well-designed user studies. 任意镜头图像分类允许仅用少量甚至零样本来识别新类别。对于零样本学习任务，视觉属性已被证明发挥着重要作用，而在少样本情况下，属性的影响尚未得到充分探索。为了更好地将基于属性的知识从可见类迁移到未见类，我们认为具有集成属性定位能力的图像表示对于任意镜头（即零镜头和少镜头）图像分类任务将是有益的。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的表示学习框架，该框架仅使用类级属性来联合学习有区别的全局和局部特征。虽然视觉语义嵌入层学习全局特征，但局部特征是通过属性原型网络学习的，该网络同时对中间特征的属性进行回归和去相关。此外，我们引入了一个放大模块，可以本地化和裁剪信息区域，以鼓励网络明确地学习信息特征。我们表明，我们的局部增强图像表示在具有挑战性的基准（即 CUB、AWA2 和 SUN）上达到了新的最先进水平。作为额外的好处，我们的模型指出了图像中属性的视觉证据，证实了我们的图像表示的改进的属性定位能力。属性定位通过地面实况部分注释进行定量评估，通过可视化进行定性评估，并通过精心设计的用户研究进行评估。 本文提出了一种属性原型网络，用于实现任意样本数量（包括零样本和少样本）的图像分类任务。 Wenjia Xu,Yongqin Xian,Jiuniu Wang,Bernt Schiele,Zeynep Akata cs.CV

authors_text: Sanskriti Singh
title: A Novel Mask R-CNN Model to Segment Heterogeneous Brain Tumors through Image Subtraction
title_zh: 一种通过图像减法分割异质脑肿瘤的新型 Mask R-CNN 模型
abstract: The segmentation of diseases is a popular topic explored by researchers in the field of machine learning. Brain tumors are extremely dangerous and require the utmost precision to segment for a successful surgery. Patients with tumors usually take 4 MRI scans, T1, T1gd, T2, and FLAIR, which are then sent to radiologists to segment and analyze for possible future surgery. To create a second segmentation, it would be beneficial to both radiologists and patients in being more confident in their conclusions. We propose using a method performed by radiologists called image segmentation and applying it to machine learning models to prove a better segmentation. Using Mask R-CNN, its ResNet backbone being pre-trained on the RSNA pneumonia detection challenge dataset, we can train a model on the Brats2020 Brain Tumor dataset. Center for Biomedical Image Computing & Analytics provides MRI data on patients with and without brain tumors and the corresponding segmentations. We can see how well the method of image subtraction works by comparing it to models without image subtraction through DICE coefficient (F1 score), recall, and precision on the untouched test set. Our model performed with a DICE coefficient of 0.75 in comparison to 0.69 without image subtraction. To further emphasize the usefulness of image subtraction, we compare our final model to current state-of-the-art models to segment tumors from MRI scans.
summary: The segmentation of diseases is a popular topic explored by researchers in the field of machine learning. Brain tumors are extremely dangerous and require the utmost precision to segment for a successful surgery. Patients with tumors usually take 4 MRI scans, T1, T1gd, T2, and FLAIR, which are then sent to radiologists to segment and analyze for possible future surgery. To create a second segmentation, it would be beneficial to both radiologists and patients in being more confident in their conclusions. We propose using a method performed by radiologists called image segmentation and applying it to machine learning models to prove a better segmentation. Using Mask R-CNN, its ResNet backbone being pre-trained on the RSNA pneumonia detection challenge dataset, we can train a model on the Brats2020 Brain Tumor dataset. Center for Biomedical Image Computing & Analytics provides MRI data on patients with and without brain tumors and the corresponding segmentations. We can see how well the method of image subtraction works by comparing it to models without image subtraction through DICE coefficient (F1 score), recall, and precision on the untouched test set. Our model performed with a DICE coefficient of 0.75 in comparison to 0.69 without image subtraction. To further emphasize the usefulness of image subtraction, we compare our final model to current state-of-the-art models to segment tumors from MRI scans.
abstract_zh: 疾病分割是机器学习领域研究人员探索的热门话题。脑肿瘤极其危险，需要最精确的分割才能成功进行手术。肿瘤患者通常会进行 4 次 MRI 扫描，T1、T1gd、T2 和 FLAIR，然后发送给放射科医生进行分段和分析，以备将来可能进行的手术。创建第二个分割将有利于放射科医生和患者对他们的结论更有信心。我们建议使用放射科医生执行的一种称为图像分割的方法，并将其应用于机器学习模型以证明更好的分割。使用 Mask R-CNN（其 ResNet 主干网已在 RSNA 肺炎检测挑战数据集上进行预训练），我们可以在 Brats2020 脑肿瘤数据集上训练模型。生物医学图像计算与分析中心提供患有和不患有脑肿瘤的患者的 MRI 数据以及相应的分割。通过在未接触的测试集上通过 DICE 系数（F1 分数）、召回率和精度将图像减法与没有图像减法的模型进行比较，我们可以看到图像减法的方法效果如何。我们的模型的 DICE 系数为 0.75，而没有图像减法的 DICE 系数为 0.69。为了进一步强调图像减法的有用性，我们将最终模型与当前最先进的模型进行比较，以从 MRI 扫描中分割肿瘤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像减法的改进Mask R-CNN模型，用于提高异质性脑肿瘤的MRI图像分割精度。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤分割需要极高精度以确保手术成功，传统方法依赖放射科医生手动分割存在主观性。通过引入图像减法技术可增强分割效果，为临床提供更可靠的辅助工具。
AI.method: 采用预训练于RSNA肺炎数据集的ResNet作为Mask R-CNN主干网络，结合图像减法技术处理Brats2020数据集，通过DICE系数、召回率和精确率评估分割效果。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到0.75的DICE系数（较无图像减法方法提升0.06），优于当前主流分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 图像减法有效提升了脑肿瘤分割精度，验证了该方法在医学图像分析中的实用价值。

search_text: A Novel Mask R-CNN Model to Segment Heterogeneous Brain Tumors through Image Subtraction 一种通过图像减法分割异质脑肿瘤的新型 Mask R-CNN 模型 The segmentation of diseases is a popular topic explored by researchers in the field of machine learning. Brain tumors are extremely dangerous and require the utmost precision to segment for a successful surgery. Patients with tumors usually take 4 MRI scans, T1, T1gd, T2, and FLAIR, which are then sent to radiologists to segment and analyze for possible future surgery. To create a second segmentation, it would be beneficial to both radiologists and patients in being more confident in their conclusions. We propose using a method performed by radiologists called image segmentation and applying it to machine learning models to prove a better segmentation. Using Mask R-CNN, its ResNet backbone being pre-trained on the RSNA pneumonia detection challenge dataset, we can train a model on the Brats2020 Brain Tumor dataset. Center for Biomedical Image Computing & Analytics provides MRI data on patients with and without brain tumors and the corresponding segmentations. We can see how well the method of image subtraction works by comparing it to models without image subtraction through DICE coefficient (F1 score), recall, and precision on the untouched test set. Our model performed with a DICE coefficient of 0.75 in comparison to 0.69 without image subtraction. To further emphasize the usefulness of image subtraction, we compare our final model to current state-of-the-art models to segment tumors from MRI scans. 疾病分割是机器学习领域研究人员探索的热门话题。脑肿瘤极其危险，需要最精确的分割才能成功进行手术。肿瘤患者通常会进行 4 次 MRI 扫描，T1、T1gd、T2 和 FLAIR，然后发送给放射科医生进行分段和分析，以备将来可能进行的手术。创建第二个分割将有利于放射科医生和患者对他们的结论更有信心。我们建议使用放射科医生执行的一种称为图像分割的方法，并将其应用于机器学习模型以证明更好的分割。使用 Mask R-CNN（其 ResNet 主干网已在 RSNA 肺炎检测挑战数据集上进行预训练），我们可以在 Brats2020 脑肿瘤数据集上训练模型。生物医学图像计算与分析中心提供患有和不患有脑肿瘤的患者的 MRI 数据以及相应的分割。通过在未接触的测试集上通过 DICE 系数（F1 分数）、召回率和精度将图像减法与没有图像减法的模型进行比较，我们可以看到图像减法的方法效果如何。我们的模型的 DICE 系数为 0.75，而没有图像减法的 DICE 系数为 0.69。为了进一步强调图像减法的有用性，我们将最终模型与当前最先进的模型进行比较，以从 MRI 扫描中分割肿瘤。 本文提出一种基于图像减法的改进Mask R-CNN模型，用于提高异质性脑肿瘤的MRI图像分割精度。 Sanskriti Singh eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Hyeoncheol Noh,Jingi Ju,Minseok Seo,Jongchan Park,Dong-Geol Choi
title: Unsupervised Change Detection Based on Image Reconstruction Loss
title_zh: 基于图像重建损失的无监督变化检测
abstract: To train the change detector, bi-temporal images taken at different times in the same area are used. However, collecting labeled bi-temporal images is expensive and time consuming. To solve this problem, various unsupervised change detection methods have been proposed, but they still require unlabeled bi-temporal images. In this paper, we propose unsupervised change detection based on image reconstruction loss using only unlabeled single temporal single image. The image reconstruction model is trained to reconstruct the original source image by receiving the source image and the photometrically transformed source image as a pair. During inference, the model receives bi-temporal images as the input, and tries to reconstruct one of the inputs. The changed region between bi-temporal images shows high reconstruction loss. Our change detector showed significant performance in various change detection benchmark datasets even though only a single temporal single source image was used. The code and trained models will be publicly available for reproducibility.
summary: To train the change detector, bi-temporal images taken at different times in the same area are used. However, collecting labeled bi-temporal images is expensive and time consuming. To solve this problem, various unsupervised change detection methods have been proposed, but they still require unlabeled bi-temporal images. In this paper, we propose unsupervised change detection based on image reconstruction loss using only unlabeled single temporal single image. The image reconstruction model is trained to reconstruct the original source image by receiving the source image and the photometrically transformed source image as a pair. During inference, the model receives bi-temporal images as the input, and tries to reconstruct one of the inputs. The changed region between bi-temporal images shows high reconstruction loss. Our change detector showed significant performance in various change detection benchmark datasets even though only a single temporal single source image was used. The code and trained models will be publicly available for reproducibility.
abstract_zh: 为了训练变化检测器，使用在同一区域的不同时间拍摄的双时图像。然而，收集标记的双时态图像既昂贵又耗时。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了各种无监督变化检测方法，但它们仍然需要未标记的双时图像。在本文中，我们提出了基于仅使用未标记的单个时间单个图像的图像重建损失的无监督变化检测。通过接收源图像和光度变换后的源图像作为对，训练图像重建模型来重建原始源图像。在推理过程中，模型接收双时态图像作为输入，并尝试重建输入之一。双时态图像之间的变化区域显示出较高的重建损失。即使仅使用单个时间单源图像，我们的变化检测器在各种变化检测基准数据集中也显示出显着的性能。代码和经过训练的模型将公开以供重复使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像重建损失的无监督变化检测方法，仅使用单一时相的单张图像进行训练。
AI.motivation: 传统的双时相图像变化检测方法需要标注数据，而收集这些数据成本高且耗时，现有的无监督方法仍需未标注的双时相图像，因此本文提出仅使用单一时相图像的方法。
AI.method: 通过训练图像重建模型，使用单一时相图像及其光度变换版本作为输入对，重建原始图像。在推理阶段，输入双时相图像并尝试重建其中一个，变化区域表现出较高的重建损失。
AI.result: 该方法在多个变化检测基准数据集上表现出显著性能，仅使用单一时相图像进行训练。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在无需标注数据的情况下实现了有效的无监督变化检测，具有较高的实用价值。

authors_text: Khai Nguyen,Nhat Ho
title: Revisiting Sliced Wasserstein on Images: From Vectorization to Convolution
title_zh: 重新审视图像上的切片 Wasserstein：从矢量化到卷积
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022, 29 pages, 9 figures, 11 tables
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022, 29 pages, 9 figures, 11 tables
abstract: The conventional sliced Wasserstein is defined between two probability measures that have realizations as vectors. When comparing two probability measures over images, practitioners first need to vectorize images and then project them to one-dimensional space by using matrix multiplication between the sample matrix and the projection matrix. After that, the sliced Wasserstein is evaluated by averaging the two corresponding one-dimensional projected probability measures. However, this approach has two limitations. The first limitation is that the spatial structure of images is not captured efficiently by the vectorization step; therefore, the later slicing process becomes harder to gather the discrepancy information. The second limitation is memory inefficiency since each slicing direction is a vector that has the same dimension as the images. To address these limitations, we propose novel slicing methods for sliced Wasserstein between probability measures over images that are based on the convolution operators. We derive convolution sliced Wasserstein (CSW) and its variants via incorporating stride, dilation, and non-linear activation function into the convolution operators. We investigate the metricity of CSW as well as its sample complexity, its computational complexity, and its connection to conventional sliced Wasserstein distances. Finally, we demonstrate the favorable performance of CSW over the conventional sliced Wasserstein in comparing probability measures over images and in training deep generative modeling on images.
summary: The conventional sliced Wasserstein is defined between two probability measures that have realizations as vectors. When comparing two probability measures over images, practitioners first need to vectorize images and then project them to one-dimensional space by using matrix multiplication between the sample matrix and the projection matrix. After that, the sliced Wasserstein is evaluated by averaging the two corresponding one-dimensional projected probability measures. However, this approach has two limitations. The first limitation is that the spatial structure of images is not captured efficiently by the vectorization step; therefore, the later slicing process becomes harder to gather the discrepancy information. The second limitation is memory inefficiency since each slicing direction is a vector that has the same dimension as the images. To address these limitations, we propose novel slicing methods for sliced Wasserstein between probability measures over images that are based on the convolution operators. We derive convolution sliced Wasserstein (CSW) and its variants via incorporating stride, dilation, and non-linear activation function into the convolution operators. We investigate the metricity of CSW as well as its sample complexity, its computational complexity, and its connection to conventional sliced Wasserstein distances. Finally, we demonstrate the favorable performance of CSW over the conventional sliced Wasserstein in comparing probability measures over images and in training deep generative modeling on images.
abstract_zh: 传统的切片 Wasserstein 是在两个以向量形式实现的概率度量之间定义的。当比较图像上的两个概率度量时，从业者首先需要对图像进行矢量化，然后通过使用样本矩阵和投影矩阵之间的矩阵乘法将它们投影到一维空间。之后，通过对两个相应的一维投影概率度量进行平均来评估切片 Wasserstein。然而，这种方法有两个局限性。第一个限制是矢量化步骤无法有效捕获图像的空间结构；因此，后面的切片过程变得更难收集差异信息。第二个限制是内存效率低下，因为每个切片方向都是与图像具有相同维度的向量。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了基于卷积算子的图像概率测量之间切片 Wasserstein 的新颖切片方法。我们通过将步幅、膨胀和非线性激活函数合并到卷积算子中，推导出卷积切片 Wasserstein (CSW) 及其变体。我们研究了 CSW 的度量及其样本复杂性、计算复杂性及其与传统切片 Wasserstein 距离的联系。最后，我们证明了 CSW 在比较图像的概率度量和训练图像的深度生成模型方面优于传统切片 Wasserstein。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积运算的新型切片瓦瑟斯坦距离（CSW），用于更高效地比较图像上的概率分布。
AI.motivation: 传统切片瓦瑟斯坦距离在处理图像时需先进行向量化操作，导致空间结构信息丢失且内存效率低下。
AI.method: 通过引入卷积操作中的步长、空洞率和非线性激活函数，设计了卷积切片瓦瑟斯坦（CSW）及其变体，并分析其度量性质、样本复杂度和计算复杂度。
AI.result: CSW在图像概率分布比较和图像生成模型训练中表现出优于传统方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: CSW通过卷积操作有效保留图像空间结构，同时提升内存效率，为图像分布比较提供了更优解决方案。

To address these limitations, we propose novel slicing methods for sliced Wasserstein between probability measures over images that are based on the convolution operators. We derive convolution sliced Wasserstein (CSW) and its variants via incorporating stride, dilation, and non-linear activation function into the convolution operators. We investigate the metricity of CSW as well as its sample complexity, its computational complexity, and its connection to conventional sliced Wasserstein distances. Finally, we demonstrate the favorable performance of CSW over the conventional sliced Wasserstein in comparing probability measures over images and in training deep generative modeling on images. 传统的切片 Wasserstein 是在两个以向量形式实现的概率度量之间定义的。当比较图像上的两个概率度量时，从业者首先需要对图像进行矢量化，然后通过使用样本矩阵和投影矩阵之间的矩阵乘法将它们投影到一维空间。之后，通过对两个相应的一维投影概率度量进行平均来评估切片 Wasserstein。然而，这种方法有两个局限性。第一个限制是矢量化步骤无法有效捕获图像的空间结构；因此，后面的切片过程变得更难收集差异信息。第二个限制是内存效率低下，因为每个切片方向都是与图像具有相同维度的向量。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了基于卷积算子的图像概率测量之间切片 Wasserstein 的新颖切片方法。我们通过将步幅、膨胀和非线性激活函数合并到卷积算子中，推导出卷积切片 Wasserstein (CSW) 及其变体。我们研究了 CSW 的度量及其样本复杂性、计算复杂性及其与传统切片 Wasserstein 距离的联系。最后，我们证明了 CSW 在比较图像的概率度量和训练图像的深度生成模型方面优于传统切片 Wasserstein。 本文提出了一种基于卷积运算的新型切片瓦瑟斯坦距离（CSW），用于更高效地比较图像上的概率分布。 Khai Nguyen,Nhat Ho cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Kengo Nakata,Youyang Ng,Daisuke Miyashita,Asuka Maki,Yu-Chieh Lin,Jun Deguchi
title: Revisiting a kNN-based Image Classification System with High-capacity Storage
title_zh: 重新审视基于 kNN 的大容量存储图像分类系统
abstract: In existing image classification systems that use deep neural networks, the knowledge needed for image classification is implicitly stored in model parameters. If users want to update this knowledge, then they need to fine-tune the model parameters. Moreover, users cannot verify the validity of inference results or evaluate the contribution of knowledge to the results. In this paper, we investigate a system that stores knowledge for image classification, such as image feature maps, labels, and original images, not in model parameters but in external high-capacity storage. Our system refers to the storage like a database when classifying input images. To increase knowledge, our system updates the database instead of fine-tuning model parameters, which avoids catastrophic forgetting in incremental learning scenarios. We revisit a kNN (k-Nearest Neighbor) classifier and employ it in our system. By analyzing the neighborhood samples referred by the kNN algorithm, we can interpret how knowledge learned in the past is used for inference results. Our system achieves 79.8% top-1 accuracy on the ImageNet dataset without fine-tuning model parameters after pretraining, and 90.8% accuracy on the Split CIFAR-100 dataset in the task incremental learning setting.
summary: In existing image classification systems that use deep neural networks, the knowledge needed for image classification is implicitly stored in model parameters. If users want to update this knowledge, then they need to fine-tune the model parameters. Moreover, users cannot verify the validity of inference results or evaluate the contribution of knowledge to the results. In this paper, we investigate a system that stores knowledge for image classification, such as image feature maps, labels, and original images, not in model parameters but in external high-capacity storage. Our system refers to the storage like a database when classifying input images. To increase knowledge, our system updates the database instead of fine-tuning model parameters, which avoids catastrophic forgetting in incremental learning scenarios. We revisit a kNN (k-Nearest Neighbor) classifier and employ it in our system. By analyzing the neighborhood samples referred by the kNN algorithm, we can interpret how knowledge learned in the past is used for inference results. Our system achieves 79.8% top-1 accuracy on the ImageNet dataset without fine-tuning model parameters after pretraining, and 90.8% accuracy on the Split CIFAR-100 dataset in the task incremental learning setting.
abstract_zh: 在使用深度神经网络的现有图像分类系统中，图像分类所需的知识隐式存储在模型参数中。如果用户想要更新这些知识，那么他们需要微调模型参数。而且，用户无法验证推理结果的有效性或评价知识对结果的贡献。在本文中，我们研究了一个存储图像分类知识的系统，例如图像特征图、标签和原始图像，不是存储在模型参数中，而是存储在外部大容量存储中。我们的系统在对输入图像进行分类时将存储称为数据库。为了增加知识，我们的系统更新数据库而不是微调模型参数，这避免了增量学习场景中的灾难性遗忘。我们重新审视 kNN（k 最近邻）分类器并将其应用于我们的系统中。通过分析kNN算法引用的邻域样本，我们可以解释过去学习的知识如何用于推理结果。我们的系统在预训练后无需微调模型参数的情况下，在 ImageNet 数据集上实现了 79.8% 的 top-1 准确率，在任务增量学习设置中在 Split CIFAR-100 数据集上实现了 90.8% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于kNN的图像分类系统，通过外部高容量存储替代模型参数存储知识，避免微调模型参数并提升可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习图像分类系统将知识隐式存储于模型参数中，导致知识更新需微调参数且无法验证推理结果有效性或评估知识贡献，同时存在灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 系统将图像特征图、标签和原始图像存储于外部数据库，使用kNN分类器进行推理。通过更新数据库而非微调模型参数实现知识增量，分析kNN邻居样本以解释知识使用过程。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上未微调参数实现79.8% top-1准确率，在Split CIFAR-100任务增量学习场景下达到90.8%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过外部存储和kNN分类有效避免灾难性遗忘，提供知识可解释性，并在无需模型微调情况下取得较高分类性能。

authors_text: Leevi Raivio,Esa Rahtu
title: Online panoptic 3D reconstruction as a Linear Assignment Problem
title_zh: 作为线性分配问题的在线全景 3D 重建
abstract: Real-time holistic scene understanding would allow machines to interpret their surrounding in a much more detailed manner than is currently possible. While panoptic image segmentation methods have brought image segmentation closer to this goal, this information has to be described relative to the 3D environment for the machine to be able to utilise it effectively. In this paper, we investigate methods for sequentially reconstructing static environments from panoptic image segmentations in 3D. We specifically target real-time operation: the algorithm must process data strictly online and be able to run at relatively fast frame rates. Additionally, the method should be scalable for environments large enough for practical applications. By applying a simple but powerful data-association algorithm, we outperform earlier similar works when operating purely online. Our method is also capable of reaching frame-rates high enough for real-time applications and is scalable to larger environments as well. Source code and further demonstrations are released to the public at: \url{https://tutvision.github.io/Online-Panoptic-3D/}
summary: Real-time holistic scene understanding would allow machines to interpret their surrounding in a much more detailed manner than is currently possible. While panoptic image segmentation methods have brought image segmentation closer to this goal, this information has to be described relative to the 3D environment for the machine to be able to utilise it effectively. In this paper, we investigate methods for sequentially reconstructing static environments from panoptic image segmentations in 3D. We specifically target real-time operation: the algorithm must process data strictly online and be able to run at relatively fast frame rates. Additionally, the method should be scalable for environments large enough for practical applications. By applying a simple but powerful data-association algorithm, we outperform earlier similar works when operating purely online. Our method is also capable of reaching frame-rates high enough for real-time applications and is scalable to larger environments as well. Source code and further demonstrations are released to the public at: \url{https://tutvision.github.io/Online-Panoptic-3D/}
abstract_zh: 实时整体场景理解将使机器能够以比目前更详细的方式解释周围环境。虽然全景图像分割方法使图像分割更接近这一目标，但必须相对于 3D 环境来描述此信息，以便机器能够有效地利用它。在本文中，我们研究了从 3D 全景图像分割中顺序重建静态环境的方法。我们特别针对实时操作：算法必须严格在线处理数据，并且能够以相对较快的帧速率运行。此外，该方法应该对于足够大的环境进行扩展以适应实际应用。通过应用简单但强大的数据关联算法，我们在纯在线操作时优于早期的类似工作。我们的方法还能够达到足以满足实时应用程序的帧速率，并且也可以扩展到更大的环境。源代码和进一步演示已向公众发布：\url{https://tutvision.github.io/Online-Panoptic-3D/}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线全景3D重建方法，将问题转化为线性分配问题，以实现实时且可扩展的静态环境重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在实时处理和可扩展性上存在不足，需开发一种在线处理、实时且适用于大环境的3D重建方法。
AI.method: 通过将数据关联问题转化为线性分配问题，提出一种在线算法，实现快速且可扩展的3D重建。
AI.result: 在纯在线操作下优于先前方法，达到实时帧率并支持大环境。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在实时性和可扩展性方面有所突破，为机器实时理解环境提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在实时性和可扩展性方面有所突破，为机器实时理解环境提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jooyoung Choi,Jungbeom Lee,Chaehun Shin,Sungwon Kim,Hyunwoo Kim,Sungroh Yoon
title: Perception Prioritized Training of Diffusion Models
title_zh: 扩散模型的感知优先训练
abstract: Diffusion models learn to restore noisy data, which is corrupted with different levels of noise, by optimizing the weighted sum of the corresponding loss terms, i.e., denoising score matching loss. In this paper, we show that restoring data corrupted with certain noise levels offers a proper pretext task for the model to learn rich visual concepts. We propose to prioritize such noise levels over other levels during training, by redesigning the weighting scheme of the objective function. We show that our simple redesign of the weighting scheme significantly improves the performance of diffusion models regardless of the datasets, architectures, and sampling strategies.
summary: Diffusion models learn to restore noisy data, which is corrupted with different levels of noise, by optimizing the weighted sum of the corresponding loss terms, i.e., denoising score matching loss. In this paper, we show that restoring data corrupted with certain noise levels offers a proper pretext task for the model to learn rich visual concepts. We propose to prioritize such noise levels over other levels during training, by redesigning the weighting scheme of the objective function. We show that our simple redesign of the weighting scheme significantly improves the performance of diffusion models regardless of the datasets, architectures, and sampling strategies.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型通过优化相应损失项的加权和（即去噪分数匹配损失）来学习恢复被不同级别的噪声损坏的噪声数据。在本文中，我们表明，恢复因某些噪声水平而损坏的数据为模型学习丰富的视觉概念提供了适当的借口任务。我们建议通过重新设计目标函数的加权方案，在训练期间将此类噪声水平优先于其他水平。我们表明，无论数据集、架构和采样策略如何，我们对加权方案的简单重新设计都显着提高了扩散模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过重新设计损失函数加权方案的扩散模型训练方法，优先处理特定噪声水平以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散模型对所有噪声水平采用统一权重，但某些噪声水平更利于学习视觉概念，需调整权重以优化训练效果。
AI.method: 重新设计目标函数的加权方案，优先考虑能有效学习视觉概念的噪声水平，而非均匀分配权重。
AI.result: 该方法在不同数据集、模型架构及采样策略下均显著提升扩散模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 感知优先训练通过调整噪声水平权重，有效提升扩散模型表现，具有广泛适用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种通过重新设计损失函数加权方案的扩散模型训练方法，优先处理特定噪声水平以提升模型性能。

search_text: Perception Prioritized Training of Diffusion Models 扩散模型的感知优先训练 Diffusion models learn to restore noisy data, which is corrupted with different levels of noise, by optimizing the weighted sum of the corresponding loss terms, i.e., denoising score matching loss. In this paper, we show that restoring data corrupted with certain noise levels offers a proper pretext task for the model to learn rich visual concepts. We propose to prioritize such noise levels over other levels during training, by redesigning the weighting scheme of the objective function. We show that our simple redesign of the weighting scheme significantly improves the performance of diffusion models regardless of the datasets, architectures, and sampling strategies. 扩散模型通过优化相应损失项的加权和（即去噪分数匹配损失）来学习恢复被不同级别的噪声损坏的噪声数据。在本文中，我们表明，恢复因某些噪声水平而损坏的数据为模型学习丰富的视觉概念提供了适当的借口任务。我们建议通过重新设计目标函数的加权方案，在训练期间将此类噪声水平优先于其他水平。我们表明，无论数据集、架构和采样策略如何，我们对加权方案的简单重新设计都显着提高了扩散模型的性能。 本文提出一种通过重新设计损失函数加权方案的扩散模型训练方法，优先处理特定噪声水平以提升模型性能。 Jooyoung Choi,Jungbeom Lee,Chaehun Shin,Sungwon Kim,Hyunwoo Kim,Sungroh Yoon cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Eunji Kim,Siwon Kim,Jungbeom Lee,Hyunwoo Kim,Sungroh Yoon
title: Bridging the Gap between Classification and Localization for Weakly Supervised Object Localization
title_zh: 弥合弱监督对象定位的分类和定位之间的差距
abstract: Weakly supervised object localization aims to find a target object region in a given image with only weak supervision, such as image-level labels. Most existing methods use a class activation map (CAM) to generate a localization map; however, a CAM identifies only the most discriminative parts of a target object rather than the entire object region. In this work, we find the gap between classification and localization in terms of the misalignment of the directions between an input feature and a class-specific weight. We demonstrate that the misalignment suppresses the activation of CAM in areas that are less discriminative but belong to the target object. To bridge the gap, we propose a method to align feature directions with a class-specific weight. The proposed method achieves a state-of-the-art localization performance on the CUB-200-2011 and ImageNet-1K benchmarks.
summary: Weakly supervised object localization aims to find a target object region in a given image with only weak supervision, such as image-level labels. Most existing methods use a class activation map (CAM) to generate a localization map; however, a CAM identifies only the most discriminative parts of a target object rather than the entire object region. In this work, we find the gap between classification and localization in terms of the misalignment of the directions between an input feature and a class-specific weight. We demonstrate that the misalignment suppresses the activation of CAM in areas that are less discriminative but belong to the target object. To bridge the gap, we propose a method to align feature directions with a class-specific weight. The proposed method achieves a state-of-the-art localization performance on the CUB-200-2011 and ImageNet-1K benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象定位旨在仅通过弱监督（例如图像级标签）在给定图像中找到目标对象区域。大多数现有方法使用类激活图（CAM）来生成定位图；然而，CAM 只能识别目标对象中最具辨别力的部分，而不是整个对象区域。在这项工作中，我们通过输入特征和特定于类的权重之间的方向未对准来发现分类和定位之间的差距。我们证明，未对准会抑制区分性较差但属于目标对象的区域中 CAM 的激活。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种将特征方向与特定于类的权重对齐的方法。所提出的方法在 CUB-200-2011 和 ImageNet-1K 基准测试中实现了最先进的定位性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过弱监督学习实现图像中目标对象区域的定位，仅使用图像级标签作为监督信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法基于类别激活图（CAM）生成定位图，但CAM仅能识别目标对象最具判别性的部分，而非完整区域，导致定位不准确。
AI.method: 提出通过对齐输入特征与类别特定权重的方向，解决分类与定位间的方向不匹配问题，从而生成更完整的对象区域激活图。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011和ImageNet-1K基准测试中，该方法达到当时最先进的定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征方向对齐有效弥合了分类与定位间的差距，提升了弱监督对象定位的准确性。

authors_text: Robin Scheibler,Wangyou Zhang,Xuankai Chang,Shinji Watanabe,Yanmin Qian
title: End-to-End Multi-speaker ASR with Independent Vector Analysis
title_zh: 具有独立矢量分析功能的端到端多说话者 ASR
comment: Submitted to INTERSPEECH2022. 5 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables
comments: Submitted to INTERSPEECH2022. 5 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables
abstract: We develop an end-to-end system for multi-channel, multi-speaker automatic speech recognition. We propose a frontend for joint source separation and dereverberation based on the independent vector analysis (IVA) paradigm. It uses the fast and stable iterative source steering algorithm together with a neural source model. The parameters from the ASR module and the neural source model are optimized jointly from the ASR loss itself. We demonstrate competitive performance with previous systems using neural beamforming frontends. First, we explore the trade-offs when using various number of channels for training and testing. Second, we demonstrate that the proposed IVA frontend performs well on noisy data, even when trained on clean mixtures only. Furthermore, it extends without retraining to the separation of more speakers, which is demonstrated on mixtures of three and four speakers.
summary: We develop an end-to-end system for multi-channel, multi-speaker automatic speech recognition. We propose a frontend for joint source separation and dereverberation based on the independent vector analysis (IVA) paradigm. It uses the fast and stable iterative source steering algorithm together with a neural source model. The parameters from the ASR module and the neural source model are optimized jointly from the ASR loss itself. We demonstrate competitive performance with previous systems using neural beamforming frontends. First, we explore the trade-offs when using various number of channels for training and testing. Second, we demonstrate that the proposed IVA frontend performs well on noisy data, even when trained on clean mixtures only. Furthermore, it extends without retraining to the separation of more speakers, which is demonstrated on mixtures of three and four speakers.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种用于多通道、多说话人自动语音识别的端到端系统。我们提出了一种基于独立矢量分析（IVA）范式的联合源分离和去混响前端。它使用快速稳定的迭代源转向算法和神经源模型。 ASR 模块和神经源模型的参数根据 ASR 损失本身进行联合优化。我们使用神经波束成形前端展示了与之前系统的竞争性能。首先，我们探讨使用不同数量的通道进行训练和测试时的权衡。其次，我们证明了所提出的 IVA 前端在噪声数据上表现良好，即使仅在干净的混合物上进行训练也是如此。此外，它无需重新训练即可扩展到更多扬声器的分离，这在三个和四个扬声器的混合上得到了演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于独立向量分析（IVA）的端到端多说话人语音识别系统，实现多通道语音的源分离与去混响联合优化。
AI.motivation: 传统多说话人语音识别需依赖复杂预处理步骤，而现有神经束成形方法在噪声环境和多说话人扩展性上存在局限。
AI.method: 设计IVA前端结合神经源模型，采用快速迭代源导向算法，通过ASR损失函数联合优化ASR模块与源分离参数。
AI.result: 在通道数适应性、噪声鲁棒性及多说话人扩展性测试中，性能优于传统神经束成形方法，且无需重训练即可处理3-4人混合语音。
AI.conclusion: 该端到端IVA框架有效提升了多通道多说话人场景下的语音识别性能，为复杂声学环境下的语音处理提供新思路。

authors_text: Takuma Udagawa,Masayuki Suzuki,Gakuto Kurata,Nobuyasu Itoh,George Saon
title: Effect and Analysis of Large-scale Language Model Rescoring on Competitive ASR Systems
title_zh: 大规模语言模型重评分对竞争性 ASR 系统的影响与分析
abstract: Large-scale language models (LLMs) such as GPT-2, BERT and RoBERTa have been successfully applied to ASR N-best rescoring. However, whether or how they can benefit competitive, near state-of-the-art ASR systems remains unexplored. In this study, we incorporate LLM rescoring into one of the most competitive ASR baselines: the Conformer-Transducer model. We demonstrate that consistent improvement is achieved by the LLM's bidirectionality, pretraining, in-domain finetuning and context augmentation. Furthermore, our lexical analysis sheds light on how each of these components may be contributing to the ASR performance.
summary: Large-scale language models (LLMs) such as GPT-2, BERT and RoBERTa have been successfully applied to ASR N-best rescoring. However, whether or how they can benefit competitive, near state-of-the-art ASR systems remains unexplored. In this study, we incorporate LLM rescoring into one of the most competitive ASR baselines: the Conformer-Transducer model. We demonstrate that consistent improvement is achieved by the LLM's bidirectionality, pretraining, in-domain finetuning and context augmentation. Furthermore, our lexical analysis sheds light on how each of these components may be contributing to the ASR performance.
abstract_zh: GPT-2、BERT 和 RoBERTa 等大规模语言模型 (LLM) 已成功应用于 ASR N 最佳重新评分。然而，它们是否或如何能够使具有竞争力的、接近最先进的 ASR 系统受益仍有待探索。在这项研究中，我们将 LLM 重新评分纳入最具竞争力的 ASR 基线之一：Conformer-Transducer 模型。我们证明了法学硕士的双向性、预训练、域内微调和上下文增强可以实现持续改进。此外，我们的词法分析揭示了每个组件如何对 ASR 性能做出贡献。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究大规模语言模型（LLM）重打分对竞争力语音识别（ASR）系统性能的影响，并分析其改进机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM已成功应用于ASR的N-best重打分，但其对接近最先进水平的ASR系统（如Conformer-Transducer）的提升效果尚未明确，需验证其有效性并分析关键因素。
AI.method: 将LLM重打分整合到Conformer-Transducer模型中，通过双向性、预训练、领域微调及上下文增强技术优化，并进行词汇层面的贡献分析。
AI.result: LLM重打分显著提升了ASR性能，且双向性、预训练、微调和上下文增强均对改进效果有积极贡献。
AI.conclusion: LLM重打分能有效增强竞争性ASR系统，其性能提升源于多因素协同作用，为后续优化提供了方向。

search_text: Effect and Analysis of Large-scale Language Model Rescoring on Competitive ASR Systems 大规模语言模型重评分对竞争性 ASR 系统的影响与分析 Large-scale language models (LLMs) such as GPT-2, BERT and RoBERTa have been successfully applied to ASR N-best rescoring. However, whether or how they can benefit competitive, near state-of-the-art ASR systems remains unexplored. In this study, we incorporate LLM rescoring into one of the most competitive ASR baselines: the Conformer-Transducer model. We demonstrate that consistent improvement is achieved by the LLM's bidirectionality, pretraining, in-domain finetuning and context augmentation. Furthermore, our lexical analysis sheds light on how each of these components may be contributing to the ASR performance. GPT-2、BERT 和 RoBERTa 等大规模语言模型 (LLM) 已成功应用于 ASR N 最佳重新评分。然而，它们是否或如何能够使具有竞争力的、接近最先进的 ASR 系统受益仍有待探索。在这项研究中，我们将 LLM 重新评分纳入最具竞争力的 ASR 基线之一：Conformer-Transducer 模型。我们证明了法学硕士的双向性、预训练、域内微调和上下文增强可以实现持续改进。此外，我们的词法分析揭示了每个组件如何对 ASR 性能做出贡献。 本论文研究大规模语言模型（LLM）重打分对竞争力语音识别（ASR）系统性能的影响，并分析其改进机制。 Takuma Udagawa,Masayuki Suzuki,Gakuto Kurata,Nobuyasu Itoh,George Saon cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Brian Zhu,Jiawei Xu,Andrew Charway,David Saldaña
title: PogoDrone: Design, Model, and Control of a Jumping Quadrotor
title_zh: PogoDrone：跳跃四旋翼飞行器的设计、模型和控制
abstract: We present a design, model, and control for a novel jumping-flying robot that is called PogoDrone. The robot is composed of a quadrotor with a passive mechanism for jumping. The robot can continuously jump in place or fly like a normal quadrotor. Jumping in place allows the robot to quickly move and operate very close to the ground. For instance, in agricultural applications, the jumping mechanism allows the robot to take samples of soil. We propose a hybrid controller that switches from attitude to position control to allow the robot to fall horizontally and recover to the original position. We compare the jumping mode with the hovering mode to analyze the energy consumption. In simulations, we evaluate the effect of different factors on energy consumption. In real experiments, we show that our robot can repeatedly impact the ground, jump, and fly in a physical environment.
summary: We present a design, model, and control for a novel jumping-flying robot that is called PogoDrone. The robot is composed of a quadrotor with a passive mechanism for jumping. The robot can continuously jump in place or fly like a normal quadrotor. Jumping in place allows the robot to quickly move and operate very close to the ground. For instance, in agricultural applications, the jumping mechanism allows the robot to take samples of soil. We propose a hybrid controller that switches from attitude to position control to allow the robot to fall horizontally and recover to the original position. We compare the jumping mode with the hovering mode to analyze the energy consumption. In simulations, we evaluate the effect of different factors on energy consumption. In real experiments, we show that our robot can repeatedly impact the ground, jump, and fly in a physical environment.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种名为 PogoDrone 的新型跳跃飞行机器人的设计、模型和控制。该机器人由带有被动跳跃机构的四旋翼飞行器组成。该机器人可以像普通四旋翼飞行器一样连续原地跳跃或飞行。原地跳跃可以让机器人快速移动，并在非常接近地面的地方进行操作。例如，在农业应用中，跳跃机构允许机器人采集土壤样本。我们提出了一种混合控制器，可以从姿态控制切换到位置控制，以允许机器人水平下落并恢复到原始位置。我们通过比较跳跃模式和悬停模式来分析能耗。在模拟中，我们评估不同因素对能源消耗的影响。在实际实验中，我们表明我们的机器人可以在物理环境中反复撞击地面、跳跃和飞行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PogoDrone的跳跃四旋翼机器人，结合被动跳跃机制与飞行功能，实现地面附近快速移动与操作。
AI.motivation: 传统四旋翼无人机难以贴近地面作业，而跳跃机制可使机器人快速接近地面，适用于农业采样等场景。
AI.method: 设计包含被动跳跃机构的四旋翼结构，开发切换姿态与位置控制的混合控制器，并通过仿真与物理实验验证性能。
AI.result: 实验表明机器人可重复跳跃与飞行，仿真分析显示跳跃模式能耗低于悬停模式，验证了设计有效性。
AI.conclusion: PogoDrone通过跳跃与飞行模式结合，实现了高效地面作业能力，为农业等场景提供了新型机器人解决方案。

authors_text: Jinpeng Hu,Zhuo Li,Zhihong Chen,Zhen Li,Xiang Wan,Tsung-Hui Chang
title: Graph Enhanced Contrastive Learning for Radiology Findings Summarization
title_zh: 用于放射学结果总结的图形增强对比学习
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, Accepted to ACL 2022 Main Conference
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures, Accepted to ACL 2022 Main Conference
abstract: The impression section of a radiology report summarizes the most prominent observation from the findings section and is the most important section for radiologists to communicate to physicians. Summarizing findings is time-consuming and can be prone to error for inexperienced radiologists, and thus automatic impression generation has attracted substantial attention. With the encoder-decoder framework, most previous studies explore incorporating extra knowledge (e.g., static pre-defined clinical ontologies or extra background information). Yet, they encode such knowledge by a separate encoder to treat it as an extra input to their models, which is limited in leveraging their relations with the original findings. To address the limitation, we propose a unified framework for exploiting both extra knowledge and the original findings in an integrated way so that the critical information (i.e., key words and their relations) can be extracted in an appropriate way to facilitate impression generation. In detail, for each input findings, it is encoded by a text encoder, and a graph is constructed through its entities and dependency tree. Then, a graph encoder (e.g., graph neural networks (GNNs)) is adopted to model relation information in the constructed graph. Finally, to emphasize the key words in the findings, contrastive learning is introduced to map positive samples (constructed by masking non-key words) closer and push apart negative ones (constructed by masking key words). The experimental results on OpenI and MIMIC-CXR confirm the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: The impression section of a radiology report summarizes the most prominent observation from the findings section and is the most important section for radiologists to communicate to physicians. Summarizing findings is time-consuming and can be prone to error for inexperienced radiologists, and thus automatic impression generation has attracted substantial attention. With the encoder-decoder framework, most previous studies explore incorporating extra knowledge (e.g., static pre-defined clinical ontologies or extra background information). Yet, they encode such knowledge by a separate encoder to treat it as an extra input to their models, which is limited in leveraging their relations with the original findings. To address the limitation, we propose a unified framework for exploiting both extra knowledge and the original findings in an integrated way so that the critical information (i.e., key words and their relations) can be extracted in an appropriate way to facilitate impression generation. In detail, for each input findings, it is encoded by a text encoder, and a graph is constructed through its entities and dependency tree. Then, a graph encoder (e.g., graph neural networks (GNNs)) is adopted to model relation information in the constructed graph. Finally, to emphasize the key words in the findings, contrastive learning is introduced to map positive samples (constructed by masking non-key words) closer and push apart negative ones (constructed by masking key words). The experimental results on OpenI and MIMIC-CXR confirm the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 放射学报告的印象部分总结了结果部分中最突出的观察结果，也是放射科医生与医生沟通的最重要的部分。总结结果非常耗时，并且对于缺乏经验的放射科医生来说很容易出错，因此自动印模生成引起了广泛关注。通过编码器-解码器框架，大多数先前的研究都探索合并额外的知识（例如，静态预定义的临床本体或额外的背景信息）。然而，他们通过单独的编码器对这些知识进行编码，将其视为模型的额外输入，这在利用它们与原始发现的关系方面受到限制。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一个统一的框架，以综合的方式利用额外的知识和原始发现，以便可以以适当的方式提取关键信息（即关键词及其关系）以促进印象生成。具体来说，对于每个输入结果，它由文本编码器进行编码，并通过其实体和依赖树构建图。然后，采用图编码器（例如图神经网络（GNN））对构造的图中的关系信息进行建模。最后，为了强调研究结果中的关键词，引入对比学习，将正样本（通过屏蔽非关键词构建）映射得更近，并推开负样本（通过屏蔽关键词构建）。 OpenI 和 MIMIC-CXR 上的实验结果证实了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合图增强和对比学习的方法，用于自动生成放射科报告中的印象部分。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用额外临床知识与原始检查发现关系时存在局限，需统一框架更有效提取关键信息以提升自动印象生成效果。
AI.method: 通过文本编码器处理输入发现，构建实体依赖图并用图神经网络建模关系，再采用对比学习强化关键词表征。
AI.result: 在OpenI和MIMIC-CXR数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过图结构建模与对比学习结合，有效提升了放射科印象生成性能，为自动报告生成提供新思路。

In detail, for each input findings, it is encoded by a text encoder, and a graph is constructed through its entities and dependency tree. Then, a graph encoder (e.g., graph neural networks (GNNs)) is adopted to model relation information in the constructed graph. Finally, to emphasize the key words in the findings, contrastive learning is introduced to map positive samples (constructed by masking non-key words) closer and push apart negative ones (constructed by masking key words). The experimental results on OpenI and MIMIC-CXR confirm the effectiveness of our proposed method. 放射学报告的印象部分总结了结果部分中最突出的观察结果，也是放射科医生与医生沟通的最重要的部分。总结结果非常耗时，并且对于缺乏经验的放射科医生来说很容易出错，因此自动印模生成引起了广泛关注。通过编码器-解码器框架，大多数先前的研究都探索合并额外的知识（例如，静态预定义的临床本体或额外的背景信息）。然而，他们通过单独的编码器对这些知识进行编码，将其视为模型的额外输入，这在利用它们与原始发现的关系方面受到限制。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一个统一的框架，以综合的方式利用额外的知识和原始发现，以便可以以适当的方式提取关键信息（即关键词及其关系）以促进印象生成。具体来说，对于每个输入结果，它由文本编码器进行编码，并通过其实体和依赖树构建图。然后，采用图编码器（例如图神经网络（GNN））对构造的图中的关系信息进行建模。最后，为了强调研究结果中的关键词，引入对比学习，将正样本（通过屏蔽非关键词构建）映射得更近，并推开负样本（通过屏蔽关键词构建）。 OpenI 和 MIMIC-CXR 上的实验结果证实了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种结合图增强和对比学习的方法，用于自动生成放射科报告中的印象部分。 Jinpeng Hu,Zhuo Li,Zhihong Chen,Zhen Li,Xiang Wan,Tsung-Hui Chang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yaning Li,Xue Wang,Hao Zhu,Guoqing Zhou,Qing Wang
title: Epipolar Focus Spectrum: A Novel Light Field Representation and Application in Dense-view Reconstruction
title_zh: 对极聚焦光谱：一种新颖的光场表示及其在密集视图重建中的应用
comment: Light field representation, Epipolar Focus Spectrum (EFS), Dense light field reconstruction, Depth independent, Frequency domain
comments: Light field representation, Epipolar Focus Spectrum (EFS), Dense light field reconstruction, Depth independent, Frequency domain
abstract: Existing light field representations, such as epipolar plane image (EPI) and sub-aperture images, do not consider the structural characteristics across the views, so they usually require additional disparity and spatial structure cues for follow-up tasks. Besides, they have difficulties dealing with occlusions or larger disparity scenes. To this end, this paper proposes a novel Epipolar Focus Spectrum (EFS) representation by rearranging the EPI spectrum. Different from the classical EPI representation where an EPI line corresponds to a specific depth, there is a one-to-one mapping from the EFS line to the view. Accordingly, compared to a sparsely-sampled light field, a densely-sampled one with the same field of view (FoV) leads to a more compact distribution of such linear structures in the double-cone-shaped region with the identical opening angle in its corresponding EFS. Hence the EFS representation is invariant to the scene depth. To demonstrate its effectiveness, we develop a trainable EFS-based pipeline for light field reconstruction, where a dense light field can be reconstructed by compensating the "missing EFS lines" given a sparse light field, yielding promising results with cross-view consistency, especially in the presence of severe occlusion and large disparity. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate the validity and superiority of the proposed method over SOTA methods.
summary: Existing light field representations, such as epipolar plane image (EPI) and sub-aperture images, do not consider the structural characteristics across the views, so they usually require additional disparity and spatial structure cues for follow-up tasks. Besides, they have difficulties dealing with occlusions or larger disparity scenes. To this end, this paper proposes a novel Epipolar Focus Spectrum (EFS) representation by rearranging the EPI spectrum. Different from the classical EPI representation where an EPI line corresponds to a specific depth, there is a one-to-one mapping from the EFS line to the view. Accordingly, compared to a sparsely-sampled light field, a densely-sampled one with the same field of view (FoV) leads to a more compact distribution of such linear structures in the double-cone-shaped region with the identical opening angle in its corresponding EFS. Hence the EFS representation is invariant to the scene depth. To demonstrate its effectiveness, we develop a trainable EFS-based pipeline for light field reconstruction, where a dense light field can be reconstructed by compensating the "missing EFS lines" given a sparse light field, yielding promising results with cross-view consistency, especially in the presence of severe occlusion and large disparity. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate the validity and superiority of the proposed method over SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 现有的光场表示，例如极平面图像（EPI）和子孔径图像，没有考虑跨视图的结构特征，因此它们通常需要额外的视差和空间结构线索来进行后续任务。此外，他们在处理遮挡或视差较大的场景时也遇到困难。为此，本文通过重新排列 EPI 谱提出了一种新颖的极聚焦谱（EFS）表示方法。与 EPI 线对应特定深度的经典 EPI 表示不同，EFS 线到视图之间存在一对一的映射。因此，与稀疏采样的光场相比，具有相同视场（FoV）的密集采样的光场导致这种线性结构在其对应的EFS中具有相同张角的双锥体区域中的分布更加紧凑。因此，EFS 表示对于场景深度是不变的。为了证明其有效性，我们开发了一种可训练的基于 EFS 的光场重建管道，其中可以通过补偿给定稀疏光场的“缺失的 EFS 线”来重建密集光场，从而产生具有跨视图一致性的有希望的结果，特别是在存在严重遮挡和大视差的情况下。合成数据集和真实数据集上的实验结果证明了该方法相对于 SOTA 方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的光场表示方法——视差聚焦光谱（EFS），用于解决密集视角重建中的遮挡和大视差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有光场表示方法（如EPI和子孔径图像）未能充分考虑视角间的结构特征，需额外深度和空间线索，且难以处理遮挡或大视差场景。
AI.method: 通过重新排列EPI光谱生成EFS表示，建立视角与光谱线的一一映射关系，并开发基于EFS的可训练重建流水线，补偿稀疏光场中的缺失EFS线。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均验证了EFS在跨视角一致性、遮挡和大视差场景下的有效性，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: EFS表示方法为光场重建提供了深度不变的视角结构描述，显著提升了复杂场景下的重建性能。

authors_text: Nilotpal Sinha,Kuan-Wen Chen
title: Novelty Driven Evolutionary Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 新颖性驱动的进化神经架构搜索
comment: Accepted as poster in GECCO 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.07266, arXiv:2203.01559
comments: Accepted as poster in GECCO 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.07266, arXiv:2203.01559
abstract: Evolutionary algorithms (EA) based neural architecture search (NAS) involves evaluating each architecture by training it from scratch, which is extremely time-consuming. This can be reduced by using a supernet for estimating the fitness of an architecture due to weight sharing among all architectures in the search space. However, the estimated fitness is very noisy due to the co-adaptation of the operations in the supernet which results in NAS methods getting trapped in local optimum. In this paper, we propose a method called NEvoNAS wherein the NAS problem is posed as a multi-objective problem with 2 objectives: (i) maximize architecture novelty, (ii) maximize architecture fitness/accuracy. The novelty search is used for maintaining a diverse set of solutions at each generation which helps avoiding local optimum traps while the architecture fitness is calculated using supernet. NSGA-II is used for finding the \textit{pareto optimal front} for the NAS problem and the best architecture in the pareto front is returned as the searched architecture. Exerimentally, NEvoNAS gives better results on 2 different search spaces while using significantly less computational resources as compared to previous EA-based methods. The code for our paper can be found in https://github.com/nightstorm0909/NEvoNAS.
summary: Evolutionary algorithms (EA) based neural architecture search (NAS) involves evaluating each architecture by training it from scratch, which is extremely time-consuming. This can be reduced by using a supernet for estimating the fitness of an architecture due to weight sharing among all architectures in the search space. However, the estimated fitness is very noisy due to the co-adaptation of the operations in the supernet which results in NAS methods getting trapped in local optimum. In this paper, we propose a method called NEvoNAS wherein the NAS problem is posed as a multi-objective problem with 2 objectives: (i) maximize architecture novelty, (ii) maximize architecture fitness/accuracy. The novelty search is used for maintaining a diverse set of solutions at each generation which helps avoiding local optimum traps while the architecture fitness is calculated using supernet. NSGA-II is used for finding the \textit{pareto optimal front} for the NAS problem and the best architecture in the pareto front is returned as the searched architecture. Exerimentally, NEvoNAS gives better results on 2 different search spaces while using significantly less computational resources as compared to previous EA-based methods. The code for our paper can be found in https://github.com/nightstorm0909/NEvoNAS.
abstract_zh: 基于进化算法 (EA) 的神经架构搜索 (NAS) 涉及通过从头开始训练来评估每个架构，这是非常耗时的。由于搜索空间中所有架构之间的权重共享，可以通过使用超网来估计架构的适合度来减少这种情况。然而，由于超网中操作的相互适应，估计的适应度非常嘈杂，导致 NAS 方法陷入局部最优。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 NEvoNAS 的方法，其中 NAS 问题被视为具有 2 个目标的多目标问题：(i) 最大化架构新颖性，(ii) 最大化架构适应性/准确性。新颖性搜索用于在每一代维护一组不同的解决方案，这有助于避免局部最优陷阱，同时使用超网计算架构适应度。 NSGA-II 用于寻找 NAS 问题的 \textit{pareto 最优前沿}，并将 Pareto 前沿中的最佳架构作为搜索到的架构返回。实验上，与之前基于 EA 的方法相比，NEvoNAS 在 2 个不同的搜索空间上给出了更好的结果，同时使用的计算资源显着减少。我们论文的代码可以在 https://github.com/nightstorm0909/NEvoNAS 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于新颖性驱动的进化神经网络架构搜索方法NEvoNAS，通过多目标优化解决传统方法计算耗时且易陷入局部最优的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于进化算法的神经架构搜索（NAS）因需从头训练每个架构而耗时，且使用超网估计适应度时存在噪声，导致陷入局部最优。
AI.method: 将NAS建模为多目标优化问题，同时最大化架构新颖性与适应度。利用NSGA-II算法求解帕累托最优前沿，并通过超网计算适应度，新颖性搜索维持种群多样性。
AI.result: 在两个不同搜索空间中，NEvoNAS相比现有方法取得更优结果，且显著降低计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: NEvoNAS通过结合新颖性与适应度优化，有效提升了神经架构搜索的效率与效果，为解决局部最优问题提供了新思路。
