The code for our paper can be found in https://github.com/nightstorm0909/NEvoNAS. 基于进化算法 (EA) 的神经架构搜索 (NAS) 涉及通过从头开始训练来评估每个架构，这是非常耗时的。由于搜索空间中所有架构之间的权重共享，可以通过使用超网来估计架构的适合度来减少这种情况。然而，由于超网中操作的相互适应，估计的适应度非常嘈杂，导致 NAS 方法陷入局部最优。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 NEvoNAS 的方法，其中 NAS 问题被视为具有 2 个目标的多目标问题：(i) 最大化架构新颖性，(ii) 最大化架构适应性/准确性。新颖性搜索用于在每一代维护一组不同的解决方案，这有助于避免局部最优陷阱，同时使用超网计算架构适应度。 NSGA-II 用于寻找 NAS 问题的 \textit{pareto 最优前沿}，并将 Pareto 前沿中的最佳架构作为搜索到的架构返回。实验上，与之前基于 EA 的方法相比，NEvoNAS 在 2 个不同的搜索空间上给出了更好的结果，同时使用的计算资源显着减少。我们论文的代码可以在 https://github.com/nightstorm0909/NEvoNAS 中找到。 本文提出了一种基于新颖性驱动的进化神经网络架构搜索方法NEvoNAS，通过多目标优化解决传统方法计算耗时且易陷入局部最优的问题。 Nilotpal Sinha,Kuan-Wen Chen cs.NE

authors_text: Shitao Xiao,Zheng Liu,Weihao Han,Jianjin Zhang,Defu Lian,Yeyun Gong,Qi Chen,Fan Yang,Hao Sun,Yingxia Shao,Denvy Deng,Qi Zhang,Xing Xie
title: Distill-VQ: Learning Retrieval Oriented Vector Quantization By Distilling Knowledge from Dense Embeddings
title_zh: Distill-VQ：通过从密集嵌入中提取知识来学习面向检索的矢量量化
abstract: Vector quantization (VQ) based ANN indexes, such as Inverted File System (IVF) and Product Quantization (PQ), have been widely applied to embedding based document retrieval thanks to the competitive time and memory efficiency. Originally, VQ is learned to minimize the reconstruction loss, i.e., the distortions between the original dense embeddings and the reconstructed embeddings after quantization. Unfortunately, such an objective is inconsistent with the goal of selecting ground-truth documents for the input query, which may cause severe loss of retrieval quality. Recent works identify such a defect, and propose to minimize the retrieval loss through contrastive learning. However, these methods intensively rely on queries with ground-truth documents, whose performance is limited by the insufficiency of labeled data. In this paper, we propose Distill-VQ, which unifies the learning of IVF and PQ within a knowledge distillation framework. In Distill-VQ, the dense embeddings are leveraged as "teachers", which predict the query's relevance to the sampled documents. The VQ modules are treated as the "students", which are learned to reproduce the predicted relevance, such that the reconstructed embeddings may fully preserve the retrieval result of the dense embeddings. By doing so, Distill-VQ is able to derive substantial training signals from the massive unlabeled data, which significantly contributes to the retrieval quality. We perform comprehensive explorations for the optimal conduct of knowledge distillation, which may provide useful insights for the learning of VQ based ANN index. We also experimentally show that the labeled data is no longer a necessity for high-quality vector quantization, which indicates Distill-VQ's strong applicability in practice.
summary: Vector quantization (VQ) based ANN indexes, such as Inverted File System (IVF) and Product Quantization (PQ), have been widely applied to embedding based document retrieval thanks to the competitive time and memory efficiency. Originally, VQ is learned to minimize the reconstruction loss, i.e., the distortions between the original dense embeddings and the reconstructed embeddings after quantization. Unfortunately, such an objective is inconsistent with the goal of selecting ground-truth documents for the input query, which may cause severe loss of retrieval quality. Recent works identify such a defect, and propose to minimize the retrieval loss through contrastive learning. However, these methods intensively rely on queries with ground-truth documents, whose performance is limited by the insufficiency of labeled data. In this paper, we propose Distill-VQ, which unifies the learning of IVF and PQ within a knowledge distillation framework. In Distill-VQ, the dense embeddings are leveraged as "teachers", which predict the query's relevance to the sampled documents. The VQ modules are treated as the "students", which are learned to reproduce the predicted relevance, such that the reconstructed embeddings may fully preserve the retrieval result of the dense embeddings. By doing so, Distill-VQ is able to derive substantial training signals from the massive unlabeled data, which significantly contributes to the retrieval quality. We perform comprehensive explorations for the optimal conduct of knowledge distillation, which may provide useful insights for the learning of VQ based ANN index. We also experimentally show that the labeled data is no longer a necessity for high-quality vector quantization, which indicates Distill-VQ's strong applicability in practice.
abstract_zh: 基于矢量量化（VQ）的 ANN 索引，例如倒排文件系统（IVF）和乘积量化（PQ），由于具有竞争性的时间和内存效率，已被广泛应用于基于嵌入的文档检索。最初，学习 VQ 是为了最小化重建损失，即原始密集嵌入和量化后重建嵌入之间的失真。不幸的是，这样的目标与为输入查询选择真实文档的目标不一致，这可能会导致检索质量的严重损失。最近的工作发现了这样的缺陷，并提出通过对比学习来最小化检索损失。然而，这些方法严重依赖于真实文档的查询，其性能受到标记数据不足的限制。在本文中，我们提出了 Distill-VQ，它将 IVF 和 PQ 的学习统一在知识蒸馏框架内。在 Distill-VQ 中，密集嵌入被用作“教师”，它预测查询与采样文档的相关性。 VQ模块被视为“学生”，它们被学习来重现预测的相关性，使得重建的嵌入可以完全保留密集嵌入的检索结果。通过这样做，Distill-VQ 能够从大量未标记数据中获取大量训练信号，这对检索质量有显着贡献。我们对知识蒸馏的最佳进行进行了全面的探索，这可能为基于 VQ 的 ANN 索引的学习提供有用的见解。我们还通过实验表明，标记数据不再是高质量矢量量化的必需品，这表明 Distill-VQ 在实践中具有很强的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Distill-VQ方法，通过知识蒸馏框架统一学习IVF和PQ，以提升向量量化在检索任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统向量量化方法以重建损失为优化目标，与检索任务的目标不一致，导致检索质量下降；现有对比学习方法依赖标注数据，受限于标签不足。
AI.method: 将密集嵌入作为教师模型预测查询与文档的相关性，以VQ模块作为学生模型通过知识蒸馏学习重建相关性预测，利用未标注数据生成训练信号。
AI.result: 实验表明无需标注数据即可实现高质量向量量化，显著提升检索性能，并为VQ索引学习提供优化思路。
AI.conclusion: Distill-VQ通过知识蒸馏有效解决了传统VQ的检索目标偏差问题，证明了在无标注数据场景下仍可实现高性能检索向量量化。

authors_text: Yulin Zhang,Dylan A. Shell
title: Nondeterminism subject to output commitment in combinatorial filters
title_zh: 组合滤波器中输出承诺的不确定性
abstract: We study a class of filters -- discrete finite-state transition systems employed as incremental stream transducers -- that have application to robotics: e.g., to model combinatorial estimators and also as concise encodings of feedback plans/policies. The present paper examines their minimization problem under some new assumptions. Compared to strictly deterministic filters, allowing nondeterminism supplies opportunities for compression via re-use of states. But this paper suggests that the classic automata-theoretic concept of nondeterminism, though it affords said opportunities for reduction in state complexity, is problematic in many robotics settings. Instead, we argue for a new constrained type of nondeterminism that preserves input-output behavior for circumstances when, as for robots, causation forbids 'rewinding' of the world. We identify problem instances where compression under this constrained form of nondeterminism results in improvements over all deterministic filters. In this new setting, we examine computational complexity questions for the problem of reducing the state complexity of some given input filter. A hardness result for general deterministic input filters is presented, as well as for checking specific, narrower requirements, and some special cases. These results show that this class of nondeterminism gives problems of the same complexity class as classical nondeterminism, and the narrower questions help give a more nuanced understanding of the source of this complexity.
summary: We study a class of filters -- discrete finite-state transition systems employed as incremental stream transducers -- that have application to robotics: e.g., to model combinatorial estimators and also as concise encodings of feedback plans/policies. The present paper examines their minimization problem under some new assumptions. Compared to strictly deterministic filters, allowing nondeterminism supplies opportunities for compression via re-use of states. But this paper suggests that the classic automata-theoretic concept of nondeterminism, though it affords said opportunities for reduction in state complexity, is problematic in many robotics settings. Instead, we argue for a new constrained type of nondeterminism that preserves input-output behavior for circumstances when, as for robots, causation forbids 'rewinding' of the world. We identify problem instances where compression under this constrained form of nondeterminism results in improvements over all deterministic filters. In this new setting, we examine computational complexity questions for the problem of reducing the state complexity of some given input filter. A hardness result for general deterministic input filters is presented, as well as for checking specific, narrower requirements, and some special cases. These results show that this class of nondeterminism gives problems of the same complexity class as classical nondeterminism, and the narrower questions help give a more nuanced understanding of the source of this complexity.
abstract_zh: 我们研究一类滤波器——用作增量流传感器的离散有限状态转换系统——可应用于机器人技术：例如，对组合估计器进行建模，也可作为反馈计划/策略的简洁编码。本文在一些新假设下研究了它们的最小化问题。与严格的确定性过滤器相比，允许非确定性提供了通过重用状态进行压缩的机会。但本文表明，经典的自动机理论非确定性概念尽管提供了降低状态复杂性的机会，但在许多机器人环境中存在问题。相反，我们主张一种新的受约束的非决定论，它在机器人等因果关系禁止世界“倒带”的情况下保留输入输出行为。我们确定了在这种受限形式的非确定性下进行压缩会导致所有确定性过滤器得到改进的问题实例。在这个新的设置中，我们研究了降低某些给定输入滤波器的状态复杂性问题的计算复杂性问题。给出了一般确定性输入过滤器的硬度结果，以及用于检查特定的、较窄的要求和一些特殊情况的硬度结果。这些结果表明，此类非确定性给出了与经典非确定性相同的复杂性类别的问题，并且更狭窄的问题有助于更细致地理解这种复杂性的根源。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类适用于机器人领域的组合滤波器，在保持输入输出行为的前提下，探讨受限非确定性对状态复杂度压缩的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统非确定性滤波器在机器人应用中存在因果性限制问题（如无法回滚世界状态），需引入新的约束条件以平衡压缩效率与行为正确性。
AI.method: 通过分析受限非确定性滤波器的最小化问题，结合计算复杂性理论，对比经典确定性滤波器与受限非确定性模型的复杂度差异。
AI.result: 证明受限非确定性模型在特定场景下可优于所有确定性滤波器，但其最小化问题与经典非确定性具有相同复杂度类，且窄条件分析揭示了复杂度来源的细微差别。
AI.conclusion: 受限非确定性为机器人滤波器设计提供了有效压缩方法，但其计算复杂性仍具挑战性，需进一步研究窄条件下的优化策略。

A hardness result for general deterministic input filters is presented, as well as for checking specific, narrower requirements, and some special cases. These results show that this class of nondeterminism gives problems of the same complexity class as classical nondeterminism, and the narrower questions help give a more nuanced understanding of the source of this complexity. 我们研究一类滤波器——用作增量流传感器的离散有限状态转换系统——可应用于机器人技术：例如，对组合估计器进行建模，也可作为反馈计划/策略的简洁编码。本文在一些新假设下研究了它们的最小化问题。与严格的确定性过滤器相比，允许非确定性提供了通过重用状态进行压缩的机会。但本文表明，经典的自动机理论非确定性概念尽管提供了降低状态复杂性的机会，但在许多机器人环境中存在问题。相反，我们主张一种新的受约束的非决定论，它在机器人等因果关系禁止世界“倒带”的情况下保留输入输出行为。我们确定了在这种受限形式的非确定性下进行压缩会导致所有确定性过滤器得到改进的问题实例。在这个新的设置中，我们研究了降低某些给定输入滤波器的状态复杂性问题的计算复杂性问题。给出了一般确定性输入过滤器的硬度结果，以及用于检查特定的、较窄的要求和一些特殊情况的硬度结果。这些结果表明，此类非确定性给出了与经典非确定性相同的复杂性类别的问题，并且更狭窄的问题有助于更细致地理解这种复杂性的根源。 本文研究了一类适用于机器人领域的组合滤波器，在保持输入输出行为的前提下，探讨受限非确定性对状态复杂度压缩的影响。 Yulin Zhang,Dylan A. Shell cs.RO

authors_text: Ze Chen,Zhihang Fu,Jianqiang Huang,Mingyuan Tao,Shengyu Li,Rongxin Jiang,Xiang Tian,Yaowu Chen,Xian-sheng Hua
title: Dynamic Supervisor for Cross-dataset Object Detection
title_zh: 用于跨数据集对象检测的动态监控器
abstract: The application of cross-dataset training in object detection tasks is complicated because the inconsistency in the category range across datasets transforms fully supervised learning into semi-supervised learning. To address this problem, recent studies focus on the generation of high-quality missing annotations. In this study, we first point out that it is not enough to generate high-quality annotations using a single model, which only looks once for annotations. Through detailed experimental analyses, we further conclude that hard-label training is conducive to generating high-recall annotations, while soft-label training tends to obtain high-precision annotations. Inspired by the aspects mentioned above, we propose a dynamic supervisor framework that updates the annotations multiple times through multiple-updated submodels trained using hard and soft labels. In the final generated annotations, both recall and precision improve significantly through the integration of hard-label training with soft-label training. Extensive experiments conducted on various dataset combination settings support our analyses and demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed dynamic supervisor.
summary: The application of cross-dataset training in object detection tasks is complicated because the inconsistency in the category range across datasets transforms fully supervised learning into semi-supervised learning. To address this problem, recent studies focus on the generation of high-quality missing annotations. In this study, we first point out that it is not enough to generate high-quality annotations using a single model, which only looks once for annotations. Through detailed experimental analyses, we further conclude that hard-label training is conducive to generating high-recall annotations, while soft-label training tends to obtain high-precision annotations. Inspired by the aspects mentioned above, we propose a dynamic supervisor framework that updates the annotations multiple times through multiple-updated submodels trained using hard and soft labels. In the final generated annotations, both recall and precision improve significantly through the integration of hard-label training with soft-label training. Extensive experiments conducted on various dataset combination settings support our analyses and demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed dynamic supervisor.
abstract_zh: 跨数据集训练在目标检测任务中的应用很复杂，因为跨数据集类别范围的不一致将全监督学习转变为半监督学习。为了解决这个问题，最近的研究重点是生成高质量的缺失注释。在本研究中，我们首先指出使用单个模型生成高质量注释是不够的，该模型仅查找一次注释。通过详细的实验分析，我们进一步得出结论，硬标签训练有利于生成高召回率注释，而软标签训练则倾向于获得高精度注释。受上述方面的启发，我们提出了一个动态监督框架，通过使用硬标签和软标签训练的多次更新子模型来多次更新注释。在最终生成的注释中，通过硬标签训练与软标签训练的集成，召回率和精度都显着提高。对各种数据集组合设置进行的广泛实验支持我们的分析，并证明了所提出的动态监管器的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态监督框架解决跨数据集目标检测中因类别不一致导致的注释生成难题。
AI.motivation: 现有单模型注释生成方法效果有限，硬标签训练提升召回率但牺牲精度，软标签训练反之，需平衡二者优势。
AI.method: 设计动态监督框架，通过交替使用硬标签与软标签训练多子模型，迭代更新注释以融合高召回与高精度优势。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种数据集组合下显著提升注释的召回率与精确率，优于现有注释生成技术。
AI.conclusion: 动态结合硬标签与软标签训练能有效提升跨数据集检测性能，为半监督学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Biyang Liu,Huimin Yu,Guodong Qi
title: GraftNet: Towards Domain Generalized Stereo Matching with a Broad-Spectrum and Task-Oriented Feature
title_zh: GraftNet：迈向具有广谱和面向任务特征的领域广义立体匹配
abstract: Although supervised deep stereo matching networks have made impressive achievements, the poor generalization ability caused by the domain gap prevents them from being applied to real-life scenarios. In this paper, we propose to leverage the feature of a model trained on large-scale datasets to deal with the domain shift since it has seen various styles of images. With the cosine similarity based cost volume as a bridge, the feature will be grafted to an ordinary cost aggregation module. Despite the broad-spectrum representation, such a low-level feature contains much general information which is not aimed at stereo matching. To recover more task-specific information, the grafted feature is further input into a shallow network to be transformed before calculating the cost. Extensive experiments show that the model generalization ability can be improved significantly with this broad-spectrum and task-oriented feature. Specifically, based on two well-known architectures PSMNet and GANet, our methods are superior to other robust algorithms when transferring from SceneFlow to KITTI 2015, KITTI 2012, and Middlebury. Code is available at https://github.com/SpadeLiu/Graft-PSMNet.
summary: Although supervised deep stereo matching networks have made impressive achievements, the poor generalization ability caused by the domain gap prevents them from being applied to real-life scenarios. In this paper, we propose to leverage the feature of a model trained on large-scale datasets to deal with the domain shift since it has seen various styles of images. With the cosine similarity based cost volume as a bridge, the feature will be grafted to an ordinary cost aggregation module. Despite the broad-spectrum representation, such a low-level feature contains much general information which is not aimed at stereo matching. To recover more task-specific information, the grafted feature is further input into a shallow network to be transformed before calculating the cost. Extensive experiments show that the model generalization ability can be improved significantly with this broad-spectrum and task-oriented feature. Specifically, based on two well-known architectures PSMNet and GANet, our methods are superior to other robust algorithms when transferring from SceneFlow to KITTI 2015, KITTI 2012, and Middlebury. Code is available at https://github.com/SpadeLiu/Graft-PSMNet.
abstract_zh: 尽管有监督深度立体匹配网络取得了令人瞩目的成就，但域差距导致的泛化能力较差，阻碍了它们应用于现实生活场景。在本文中，我们建议利用在大规模数据集上训练的模型的特征来处理域转移，因为它已经看到了各种风格的图像。以基于余弦相似度的成本量为桥梁，将该特征嫁接到普通的成本聚合模块中。尽管具有广谱表示，但这样的低级特征包含许多不针对立体匹配的一般信息。为了恢复更多特定于任务的信息，在计算成本之前，将嫁接的特征进一步输入到浅层网络中进行转换。大量实验表明，这种广谱且面向任务的特征可以显着提高模型泛化能力。具体来说，基于两种著名的架构 PSMNet 和 GANet，我们的方法在从 SceneFlow 转移到 KITTI 2015、KITTI 2012 和 Middlebury 时优于其他鲁棒算法。代码可在 https://github.com/SpadeLiu/Graft-PSMNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GraftNet，通过结合广谱特征与任务导向特征，提升立体匹配模型的领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有监督深度立体匹配网络因领域差异导致泛化能力不足，难以应用于实际场景。
AI.method: 利用大规模数据集训练的模型特征作为桥梁，通过余弦相似度成本体积嫁接至普通成本聚合模块，并通过浅层网络进一步提取任务相关特征。
AI.result: 在SceneFlow到KITTI 2015/2012及Middlebury的数据迁移实验中，基于PSMNet和GANet的改进方法优于其他鲁棒算法。
AI.conclusion: 广谱与任务导向特征结合的方法能显著提升立体匹配模型的领域泛化能力。

authors_text: Tatsuya Komatsu,Yusuke Fujita,Jaesong Lee,Lukas Lee,Shinji Watanabe,Yusuke Kida
title: Better Intermediates Improve CTC Inference
title_zh: 更好的中间体改善 CTC 推断
abstract: This paper proposes a method for improved CTC inference with searched intermediates and multi-pass conditioning. The paper first formulates self-conditioned CTC as a probabilistic model with an intermediate prediction as a latent representation and provides a tractable conditioning framework. We then propose two new conditioning methods based on the new formulation: (1) Searched intermediate conditioning that refines intermediate predictions with beam-search, (2) Multi-pass conditioning that uses predictions of previous inference for conditioning the next inference. These new approaches enable better conditioning than the original self-conditioned CTC during inference and improve the final performance. Experiments with the LibriSpeech dataset show relative 3%/12% performance improvement at the maximum in test clean/other sets compared to the original self-conditioned CTC.
summary: This paper proposes a method for improved CTC inference with searched intermediates and multi-pass conditioning. The paper first formulates self-conditioned CTC as a probabilistic model with an intermediate prediction as a latent representation and provides a tractable conditioning framework. We then propose two new conditioning methods based on the new formulation: (1) Searched intermediate conditioning that refines intermediate predictions with beam-search, (2) Multi-pass conditioning that uses predictions of previous inference for conditioning the next inference. These new approaches enable better conditioning than the original self-conditioned CTC during inference and improve the final performance. Experiments with the LibriSpeech dataset show relative 3%/12% performance improvement at the maximum in test clean/other sets compared to the original self-conditioned CTC.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过搜索中间体和多遍调节来改进 CTC 推理的方法。该论文首先将自条件 CTC 表述为概率模型，并以中间预测作为潜在表示，并提供了一个易于处理的条件框架。然后，我们基于新的公式提出了两种新的调节方法：（1）搜索中间调节，通过波束搜索细化中间预测，（2）多通道调节，使用先前推理的预测来调节下一个推理。这些新方法在推理过程中能够比原始的自调节 CTC 进行更好的调节，并提高最终性能。 LibriSpeech 数据集的实验表明，与原始自调节 CTC 相比，在测试清洁/其他集合中，性能最大可提高 3%/12%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过优化中间预测来改进CTC推理方法，提升语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自条件CTC在推理阶段条件控制不足，难以充分利用中间预测信息，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 提出两种条件控制方法：1）基于束搜索的中间预测优化；2）多通道条件控制，利用前次预测结果作为后续推理的条件输入。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，测试干净集和其它集相对提升3%/12%。
AI.conclusion: 优化中间预测和多通道条件控制有效提升CTC推理性能，验证了改进中间表示对语音识别任务的重要性。

search_text: Better Intermediates Improve CTC Inference 更好的中间体改善 CTC 推断 This paper proposes a method for improved CTC inference with searched intermediates and multi-pass conditioning. The paper first formulates self-conditioned CTC as a probabilistic model with an intermediate prediction as a latent representation and provides a tractable conditioning framework. We then propose two new conditioning methods based on the new formulation: (1) Searched intermediate conditioning that refines intermediate predictions with beam-search, (2) Multi-pass conditioning that uses predictions of previous inference for conditioning the next inference. These new approaches enable better conditioning than the original self-conditioned CTC during inference and improve the final performance. Experiments with the LibriSpeech dataset show relative 3%/12% performance improvement at the maximum in test clean/other sets compared to the original self-conditioned CTC. 本文提出了一种通过搜索中间体和多遍调节来改进 CTC 推理的方法。该论文首先将自条件 CTC 表述为概率模型，并以中间预测作为潜在表示，并提供了一个易于处理的条件框架。然后，我们基于新的公式提出了两种新的调节方法：（1）搜索中间调节，通过波束搜索细化中间预测，（2）多通道调节，使用先前推理的预测来调节下一个推理。这些新方法在推理过程中能够比原始的自调节 CTC 进行更好的调节，并提高最终性能。 LibriSpeech 数据集的实验表明，与原始自调节 CTC 相比，在测试清洁/其他集合中，性能最大可提高 3%/12%。 本文提出通过优化中间预测来改进CTC推理方法，提升语音识别性能。 Tatsuya Komatsu,Yusuke Fujita,Jaesong Lee,Lukas Lee,Shinji Watanabe,Yusuke Kida cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yusuke Fujita,Tatsuya Komatsu,Yusuke Kida
title: Alternate Intermediate Conditioning with Syllable-level and Character-level Targets for Japanese ASR
title_zh: 针对日语 ASR 的具有音节级和字符级目标的替代中间条件
abstract: End-to-end automatic speech recognition directly maps input speech to characters. However, the mapping can be problematic when several different pronunciations should be mapped into one character or when one pronunciation is shared among many different characters. Japanese ASR suffers the most from such many-to-one and one-to-many mapping problems due to Japanese kanji characters. To alleviate the problems, we introduce explicit interaction between characters and syllables using Self-conditioned connectionist temporal classification (CTC), in which the upper layers are ``self-conditioned'' on the intermediate predictions from the lower layers. The proposed method utilizes character-level and syllable-level intermediate predictions as conditioning features to deal with mutual dependency between characters and syllables. Experimental results on Corpus of Spontaneous Japanese show that the proposed method outperformed the conventional multi-task and Self-conditioned CTC methods.
summary: End-to-end automatic speech recognition directly maps input speech to characters. However, the mapping can be problematic when several different pronunciations should be mapped into one character or when one pronunciation is shared among many different characters. Japanese ASR suffers the most from such many-to-one and one-to-many mapping problems due to Japanese kanji characters. To alleviate the problems, we introduce explicit interaction between characters and syllables using Self-conditioned connectionist temporal classification (CTC), in which the upper layers are ``self-conditioned'' on the intermediate predictions from the lower layers. The proposed method utilizes character-level and syllable-level intermediate predictions as conditioning features to deal with mutual dependency between characters and syllables. Experimental results on Corpus of Spontaneous Japanese show that the proposed method outperformed the conventional multi-task and Self-conditioned CTC methods.
abstract_zh: 端到端自动语音识别将输入语音直接映射到字符。然而，当几种不同的发音应该映射到一个字符中或者当一种发音在许多不同的字符之间共享时，映射可能会出现问题。由于日语汉字字符，日语 ASR 受到此类多对一和一对多映射问题的影响最大。为了缓解这些问题，我们使用自条件联结时间分类（CTC）引入字符和音节之间的显式交互，其中上层对来自下层的中间预测进行“自条件”。该方法利用字符级和音节级中间预测作为条件特征来处理字符和音节之间的相互依赖。在自发日语语料库上的实验结果表明，该方法优于传统的多任务和自条件 CTC 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合音节级和字符级中间条件的端到端日语语音识别方法，解决汉字多对一和一对多映射问题。
AI.motivation: 日语汉字导致语音到字符的映射存在多对一和一对多问题，传统方法难以有效处理字符与音节间的相互依赖关系。
AI.method: 采用自条件CTC框架，通过上层网络自适应融合字符级和音节级中间预测特征，建立显式交互机制。
AI.result: 在Corpus of Spontaneous Japanese数据集上，该方法优于传统多任务学习和自条件CTC方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模字符与音节的中间条件交互，有效缓解了日语ASR中的映射歧义问题，提升了识别性能。

authors_text: Yu Nakagome,Tatsuya Komatsu,Yusuke Fujita,Shuta Ichimura,Yusuke Kida
title: InterAug: Augmenting Noisy Intermediate Predictions for CTC-based ASR
title_zh: InterAug：增强基于 CTC 的 ASR 的噪声中间预测
comment: This paper was submitted to INTERSPEECH2022
comments: This paper was submitted to INTERSPEECH2022
abstract: This paper proposes InterAug: a novel training method for CTC-based ASR using augmented intermediate representations for conditioning. The proposed method exploits the conditioning framework of self-conditioned CTC to train robust models by conditioning with "noisy" intermediate predictions. During the training, intermediate predictions are changed to incorrect intermediate predictions, and fed into the next layer for conditioning. The subsequent layers are trained to correct the incorrect intermediate predictions with the intermediate losses. By repeating the augmentation and the correction, iterative refinements, which generally require a special decoder, can be realized only with the audio encoder. To produce noisy intermediate predictions, we also introduce new augmentation: intermediate feature space augmentation and intermediate token space augmentation that are designed to simulate typical errors. The combination of the proposed InterAug framework with new augmentation allows explicit training of the robust audio encoders. In experiments using augmentations simulating deletion, insertion, and substitution error, we confirmed that the trained model acquires robustness to each error, boosting the speech recognition performance of the strong self-conditioned CTC baseline.
summary: This paper proposes InterAug: a novel training method for CTC-based ASR using augmented intermediate representations for conditioning. The proposed method exploits the conditioning framework of self-conditioned CTC to train robust models by conditioning with "noisy" intermediate predictions. During the training, intermediate predictions are changed to incorrect intermediate predictions, and fed into the next layer for conditioning. The subsequent layers are trained to correct the incorrect intermediate predictions with the intermediate losses. By repeating the augmentation and the correction, iterative refinements, which generally require a special decoder, can be realized only with the audio encoder. To produce noisy intermediate predictions, we also introduce new augmentation: intermediate feature space augmentation and intermediate token space augmentation that are designed to simulate typical errors. The combination of the proposed InterAug framework with new augmentation allows explicit training of the robust audio encoders. In experiments using augmentations simulating deletion, insertion, and substitution error, we confirmed that the trained model acquires robustness to each error, boosting the speech recognition performance of the strong self-conditioned CTC baseline.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 InterAug：一种基于 CTC 的 ASR 训练方法，使用增强的中间表示进行调节。所提出的方法利用自调节 CTC 的调节框架，通过“噪声”中间预测进行调节来训练鲁棒模型。在训练过程中，中间预测被更改为不正确的中间预测，并送入下一层进行调节。随后的层经过训练，用中间损失来纠正不正确的中间预测。通过重复增强和校正，通常需要特殊解码器的迭代细化只能通过音频编码器来实现。为了产生噪声中间预测，我们还引入了新的增强：中间特征空间增强和中间标记空间增强，旨在模拟典型错误。所提出的 InterAug 框架与新的增强功能的结合允许对鲁棒的音频编码器进行显式训练。在使用增强模拟删除、插入和替换错误的实验中，我们证实训练后的模型对每个错误都具有鲁棒性，从而提高了强自调节 CTC 基线的语音识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InterAug方法，通过增强CTC语音识别模型中的噪声中间预测来提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统CTC模型对噪声和错误敏感，且依赖复杂解码器进行迭代修正，需探索更高效的鲁棒训练方法。
AI.method: 在训练中引入中间特征空间和token空间的噪声增强，模拟删除/插入/替换错误，利用自条件CTC框架让后续层修正错误。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法有效提升模型对各类错误的鲁棒性，优于强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: InterAug通过噪声中间预测增强，无需特殊解码器即可实现鲁棒语音识别，验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Donghyun Kim,Kaihong Wang,Kate Saenko,Margrit Betke,Stan Sclaroff
title: A Unified Framework for Domain Adaptive Pose Estimation
title_zh: 领域自适应姿态估计的统一框架
abstract: While pose estimation is an important computer vision task, it requires expensive annotation and suffers from domain shift. In this paper, we investigate the problem of domain adaptive 2D pose estimation that transfers knowledge learned on a synthetic source domain to a target domain without supervision. While several domain adaptive pose estimation models have been proposed recently, they are not generic but only focus on either human pose or animal pose estimation, and thus their effectiveness is somewhat limited to specific scenarios. In this work, we propose a unified framework that generalizes well on various domain adaptive pose estimation problems. We propose to align representations using both input-level and output-level cues (pixels and pose labels, respectively), which facilitates the knowledge transfer from the source domain to the unlabeled target domain. Our experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under various domain shifts. Our method outperforms existing baselines on human pose estimation by up to 4.5 percent points (pp), hand pose estimation by up to 7.4 pp, and animal pose estimation by up to 4.8 pp for dogs and 3.3 pp for sheep. These results suggest that our method is able to mitigate domain shift on diverse tasks and even unseen domains and objects (e.g., trained on horse and tested on dog). Our code will be publicly available at: https://github.com/VisionLearningGroup/UDA_PoseEstimation.
summary: While pose estimation is an important computer vision task, it requires expensive annotation and suffers from domain shift. In this paper, we investigate the problem of domain adaptive 2D pose estimation that transfers knowledge learned on a synthetic source domain to a target domain without supervision. While several domain adaptive pose estimation models have been proposed recently, they are not generic but only focus on either human pose or animal pose estimation, and thus their effectiveness is somewhat limited to specific scenarios. In this work, we propose a unified framework that generalizes well on various domain adaptive pose estimation problems. We propose to align representations using both input-level and output-level cues (pixels and pose labels, respectively), which facilitates the knowledge transfer from the source domain to the unlabeled target domain. Our experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under various domain shifts. Our method outperforms existing baselines on human pose estimation by up to 4.5 percent points (pp), hand pose estimation by up to 7.4 pp, and animal pose estimation by up to 4.8 pp for dogs and 3.3 pp for sheep. These results suggest that our method is able to mitigate domain shift on diverse tasks and even unseen domains and objects (e.g., trained on horse and tested on dog). Our code will be publicly available at: https://github.com/VisionLearningGroup/UDA_PoseEstimation.
abstract_zh: 虽然姿态估计是一项重要的计算机视觉任务，但它需要昂贵的注释并且会受到域转移的影响。在本文中，我们研究了域自适应二维姿态估计问题，该问题将在合成源域上学到的知识转移到目标域而无需监督。虽然最近提出了几种域自适应姿态估计模型，但它们不是通用的，而是只关注人类姿态或动物姿态估计，因此它们的有效性在一定程度上局限于特定场景。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，可以很好地概括各种域自适应姿态估计问题。我们建议使用输入级和输出级线索（分别是像素和姿势标签）来对齐表示，这有助于将知识从源域转移到未标记的目标域。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在各种域转换下实现了最先进的性能。我们的方法在人类姿势估计方面优于现有基线高达 4.5 个百分点 (pp)，在手部姿势估计方面优于现有基线高达 7.4 个百分点，在狗的动物姿势估计方面优于现有基线 4.8 个百分点，对于绵羊则优于 3.3 个百分点。这些结果表明，我们的方法能够减轻不同任务甚至看不见的域和对象（例如，在马上训练并在狗上测试）的域转移。我们的代码将在以下位置公开发布：https://github.com/VisionLearningGroup/UDA_PoseEstimation。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的领域自适应姿态估计框架，解决从合成源领域到未标注目标领域的知识迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应姿态估计方法局限于特定场景（如人体或动物姿态），无法泛化到多样化的任务和未知领域。
AI.method: 通过同时对齐输入级（像素）和输出级（姿态标签）的表示，促进源领域到目标领域的知识迁移。
AI.result: 在人体姿态估计、手部姿态估计和动物姿态估计任务中分别超越基线4.5pp、7.4pp和4.8pp（狗）/3.3pp（羊），并在未见过的领域（如马训练狗测试）表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效缓解多样化任务和未知领域的领域偏移问题，代码已开源。

search_text: A Unified Framework for Domain Adaptive Pose Estimation 领域自适应姿态估计的统一框架 While pose estimation is an important computer vision task, it requires expensive annotation and suffers from domain shift. In this paper, we investigate the problem of domain adaptive 2D pose estimation that transfers knowledge learned on a synthetic source domain to a target domain without supervision. While several domain adaptive pose estimation models have been proposed recently, they are not generic but only focus on either human pose or animal pose estimation, and thus their effectiveness is somewhat limited to specific scenarios. In this work, we propose a unified framework that generalizes well on various domain adaptive pose estimation problems. We propose to align representations using both input-level and output-level cues (pixels and pose labels, respectively), which facilitates the knowledge transfer from the source domain to the unlabeled target domain. Our experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under various domain shifts. Our method outperforms existing baselines on human pose estimation by up to 4.5 percent points (pp), hand pose estimation by up to 7.4 pp, and animal pose estimation by up to 4.8 pp for dogs and 3.3 pp for sheep. These results suggest that our method is able to mitigate domain shift on diverse tasks and even unseen domains and objects (e.g., trained on horse and tested on dog). Our code will be publicly available at: https://github.com/VisionLearningGroup/UDA_PoseEstimation. 虽然姿态估计是一项重要的计算机视觉任务，但它需要昂贵的注释并且会受到域转移的影响。在本文中，我们研究了域自适应二维姿态估计问题，该问题将在合成源域上学到的知识转移到目标域而无需监督。虽然最近提出了几种域自适应姿态估计模型，但它们不是通用的，而是只关注人类姿态或动物姿态估计，因此它们的有效性在一定程度上局限于特定场景。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，可以很好地概括各种域自适应姿态估计问题。我们建议使用输入级和输出级线索（分别是像素和姿势标签）来对齐表示，这有助于将知识从源域转移到未标记的目标域。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在各种域转换下实现了最先进的性能。我们的方法在人类姿势估计方面优于现有基线高达 4.5 个百分点 (pp)，在手部姿势估计方面优于现有基线高达 7.4 个百分点，在狗的动物姿势估计方面优于现有基线 4.8 个百分点，对于绵羊则优于 3.3 个百分点。这些结果表明，我们的方法能够减轻不同任务甚至看不见的域和对象（例如，在马上训练并在狗上测试）的域转移。我们的代码将在以下位置公开发布：https://github.com/VisionLearningGroup/UDA_PoseEstimation。 本文提出一种统一的领域自适应姿态估计框架，解决从合成源领域到未标注目标领域的知识迁移问题。 Donghyun Kim,Kaihong Wang,Kate Saenko,Margrit Betke,Stan Sclaroff cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Fan-Lin Wang,Po-chun Hsu,Da-rong Liu,Hung-yi Lee
title: Universal Adaptor: Converting Mel-Spectrograms Between Different Configurations for Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 通用适配器：在语音合成的不同配置之间转换梅尔谱图
abstract: Most recent speech synthesis systems are composed of a synthesizer and a vocoder. However, the existing synthesizers and vocoders can only be matched to acoustic features extracted with a specific configuration. Hence, we can't combine arbitrary synthesizers and vocoders together to form a complete system, not to mention apply to a newly developed model. In this paper, we proposed Universal Adaptor, which takes a Mel-spectrogram parametrized by the source configuration and converts it into a Mel-spectrogram parametrized by the target configuration, as long as we feed in the source and the target configurations. Experiments show that the quality of speeches synthesized from our output of Universal Adaptor is comparable to those synthesized from ground truth Mel-spectrogram no matter in single-speaker or multi-speaker scenarios. Moreover, Universal Adaptor can be applied in the recent TTS systems and voice conversion systems without dropping quality.
summary: Most recent speech synthesis systems are composed of a synthesizer and a vocoder. However, the existing synthesizers and vocoders can only be matched to acoustic features extracted with a specific configuration. Hence, we can't combine arbitrary synthesizers and vocoders together to form a complete system, not to mention apply to a newly developed model. In this paper, we proposed Universal Adaptor, which takes a Mel-spectrogram parametrized by the source configuration and converts it into a Mel-spectrogram parametrized by the target configuration, as long as we feed in the source and the target configurations. Experiments show that the quality of speeches synthesized from our output of Universal Adaptor is comparable to those synthesized from ground truth Mel-spectrogram no matter in single-speaker or multi-speaker scenarios. Moreover, Universal Adaptor can be applied in the recent TTS systems and voice conversion systems without dropping quality.
abstract_zh: 大多数最新的语音合成系统由合成器和声码器组成。然而，现有的合成器和声码器只能与通过特定配置提取的声学特征相匹配。因此，我们无法将任意合成器和声码器组合在一起形成一个完整的系统，更不用说应用于新开发的模型了。在本文中，我们提出了通用适配器，只要我们输入源配置和目标配置，它就可以将由源配置参数化的梅尔谱图转换为由目标配置参数化的梅尔谱图。实验表明，无论在单说话人还是多说话人场景下，从我们的通用适配器输出合成的语音质量与从真实梅尔声谱图合成的语音质量相当。此外，通用适配器可以应用于最近的TTS系统和语音转换系统，而不会降低质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用适配器，用于在不同配置间转换Mel频谱图，以实现语音合成系统的灵活组合。
AI.motivation: 现有语音合成系统中的合成器与声码器需匹配特定配置的声学特征，导致无法任意组合不同模型或应用新开发的模型。
AI.method: 设计Universal Adaptor网络，通过输入源配置和目标配置参数，将源Mel频谱图转换为目标配置的Mel频谱图。
AI.result: 实验表明，适配器输出的语音质量与真实Mel频谱图生成结果相当，适用于单说话人和多说话人场景，并兼容最新TTS和语音转换系统。
AI.conclusion: Universal Adaptor有效解决了不同配置间Mel频谱图的兼容性问题，提升了语音合成系统的灵活性和适用性。

authors_text: Ziyun Xu,Chengyu Wang,Minghui Qiu,Fuli Luo,Runxin Xu,Songfang Huang,Jun Huang
title: Making Pre-trained Language Models End-to-end Few-shot Learners with Contrastive Prompt Tuning
title_zh: 通过对比提示调整来制作预训练的语言模型端到端的小样本学习器
abstract: Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) have achieved remarkable performance for various language understanding tasks in IR systems, which require the fine-tuning process based on labeled training data. For low-resource scenarios, prompt-based learning for PLMs exploits prompts as task guidance and turns downstream tasks into masked language problems for effective few-shot fine-tuning. In most existing approaches, the high performance of prompt-based learning heavily relies on handcrafted prompts and verbalizers, which may limit the application of such approaches in real-world scenarios. To solve this issue, we present CP-Tuning, the first end-to-end Contrastive Prompt Tuning framework for fine-tuning PLMs without any manual engineering of task-specific prompts and verbalizers. It is integrated with the task-invariant continuous prompt encoding technique with fully trainable prompt parameters. We further propose the pair-wise cost-sensitive contrastive learning procedure to optimize the model in order to achieve verbalizer-free class mapping and enhance the task-invariance of prompts. It explicitly learns to distinguish different classes and makes the decision boundary smoother by assigning different costs to easy and hard cases. Experiments over a variety of language understanding tasks used in IR systems and different PLMs show that CP-Tuning outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) have achieved remarkable performance for various language understanding tasks in IR systems, which require the fine-tuning process based on labeled training data. For low-resource scenarios, prompt-based learning for PLMs exploits prompts as task guidance and turns downstream tasks into masked language problems for effective few-shot fine-tuning. In most existing approaches, the high performance of prompt-based learning heavily relies on handcrafted prompts and verbalizers, which may limit the application of such approaches in real-world scenarios. To solve this issue, we present CP-Tuning, the first end-to-end Contrastive Prompt Tuning framework for fine-tuning PLMs without any manual engineering of task-specific prompts and verbalizers. It is integrated with the task-invariant continuous prompt encoding technique with fully trainable prompt parameters. We further propose the pair-wise cost-sensitive contrastive learning procedure to optimize the model in order to achieve verbalizer-free class mapping and enhance the task-invariance of prompts. It explicitly learns to distinguish different classes and makes the decision boundary smoother by assigning different costs to easy and hard cases. Experiments over a variety of language understanding tasks used in IR systems and different PLMs show that CP-Tuning outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在 IR 系统中的各种语言理解任务中取得了显着的性能，这些任务需要基于标记训练数据的微调过程。对于资源匮乏的场景，PLM 基于提示的学习利用提示作为任务指导，并将下游任务转化为隐藏的语言问题，以进行有效的几次微调。在大多数现有方法中，基于提示的学习的高性能很大程度上依赖于手工制作的提示和语言器，这可能会限制此类方法在现实场景中的应用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 CP-Tuning，这是第一个端到端对比提示调整框架，用于微调 PLM，而无需对特定于任务的提示和语言器进行任何手动工程。它与任务不变的连续提示编码技术集成，具有完全可训练的提示参数。我们进一步提出了成对成本敏感的对比学习过程来优化模型，以实现无语言器的类映射并增强提示的任务不变性。它明确地学习区分不同的类别，并通过为简单和困难的情况分配不同的成本来使决策边界更加平滑。对 IR 系统和不同 PLM 中使用的各种语言理解任务进行的实验表明，CP-Tuning 的性能优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的对比提示调优框架CP-Tuning，旨在无需人工设计提示和词化器的情况下，提升预训练语言模型在低资源场景下的少样本学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于提示的学习方法依赖人工设计的提示和词化器，限制了其在真实场景中的应用，需开发无需人工工程的自动化方法。
AI.method: 结合任务不变的连续提示编码技术和成对成本敏感对比学习，通过动态优化提示参数实现无需词化器的类别映射，并增强提示的任务不变性。
AI.result: 在多种信息检索系统语言理解任务和不同预训练模型上的实验表明，CP-Tuning优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CP-Tuning通过端到端对比提示调优有效解决了人工设计依赖问题，为低资源场景下的少样本学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Making Pre-trained Language Models End-to-end Few-shot Learners with Contrastive Prompt Tuning 通过对比提示调整来制作预训练的语言模型端到端的小样本学习器 Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) have achieved remarkable performance for various language understanding tasks in IR systems, which require the fine-tuning process based on labeled training data. For low-resource scenarios, prompt-based learning for PLMs exploits prompts as task guidance and turns downstream tasks into masked language problems for effective few-shot fine-tuning. In most existing approaches, the high performance of prompt-based learning heavily relies on handcrafted prompts and verbalizers, which may limit the application of such approaches in real-world scenarios. To solve this issue, we present CP-Tuning, the first end-to-end Contrastive Prompt Tuning framework for fine-tuning PLMs without any manual engineering of task-specific prompts and verbalizers. It is integrated with the task-invariant continuous prompt encoding technique with fully trainable prompt parameters. We further propose the pair-wise cost-sensitive contrastive learning procedure to optimize the model in order to achieve verbalizer-free class mapping and enhance the task-invariance of prompts. It explicitly learns to distinguish different classes and makes the decision boundary smoother by assigning different costs to easy and hard cases. Experiments over a variety of language understanding tasks used in IR systems and different PLMs show that CP-Tuning outperforms state-of-the-art methods. 预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在 IR 系统中的各种语言理解任务中取得了显着的性能，这些任务需要基于标记训练数据的微调过程。对于资源匮乏的场景，PLM 基于提示的学习利用提示作为任务指导，并将下游任务转化为隐藏的语言问题，以进行有效的几次微调。在大多数现有方法中，基于提示的学习的高性能很大程度上依赖于手工制作的提示和语言器，这可能会限制此类方法在现实场景中的应用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 CP-Tuning，这是第一个端到端对比提示调整框架，用于微调 PLM，而无需对特定于任务的提示和语言器进行任何手动工程。它与任务不变的连续提示编码技术集成，具有完全可训练的提示参数。我们进一步提出了成对成本敏感的对比学习过程来优化模型，以实现无语言器的类映射并增强提示的任务不变性。它明确地学习区分不同的类别，并通过为简单和困难的情况分配不同的成本来使决策边界更加平滑。对 IR 系统和不同 PLM 中使用的各种语言理解任务进行的实验表明，CP-Tuning 的性能优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种端到端的对比提示调优框架CP-Tuning，旨在无需人工设计提示和词化器的情况下，提升预训练语言模型在低资源场景下的少样本学习能力。 Ziyun Xu,Chengyu Wang,Minghui Qiu,Fuli Luo,Runxin Xu,Songfang Huang,Jun Huang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Chiang-Lin Tai,Hung-Shin Lee,Yu Tsao,Hsin-Min Wang
title: Filter-based Discriminative Autoencoders for Children Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于儿童语音识别的基于滤波器的判别自动编码器
abstract: Children speech recognition is indispensable but challenging due to the diversity of children's speech. In this paper, we propose a filter-based discriminative autoencoder for acoustic modeling. To filter out the influence of various speaker types and pitches, auxiliary information of the speaker and pitch features is input into the encoder together with the acoustic features to generate phonetic embeddings. In the training phase, the decoder uses the auxiliary information and the phonetic embedding extracted by the encoder to reconstruct the input acoustic features. The autoencoder is trained by simultaneously minimizing the ASR loss and feature reconstruction error. The framework can make the phonetic embedding purer, resulting in more accurate senone (triphone-state) scores. Evaluated on the test set of the CMU Kids corpus, our system achieves a 7.8% relative WER reduction compared to the baseline system. In the domain adaptation experiment, our system also outperforms the baseline system on the British-accent PF-STAR task.
summary: Children speech recognition is indispensable but challenging due to the diversity of children's speech. In this paper, we propose a filter-based discriminative autoencoder for acoustic modeling. To filter out the influence of various speaker types and pitches, auxiliary information of the speaker and pitch features is input into the encoder together with the acoustic features to generate phonetic embeddings. In the training phase, the decoder uses the auxiliary information and the phonetic embedding extracted by the encoder to reconstruct the input acoustic features. The autoencoder is trained by simultaneously minimizing the ASR loss and feature reconstruction error. The framework can make the phonetic embedding purer, resulting in more accurate senone (triphone-state) scores. Evaluated on the test set of the CMU Kids corpus, our system achieves a 7.8% relative WER reduction compared to the baseline system. In the domain adaptation experiment, our system also outperforms the baseline system on the British-accent PF-STAR task.
abstract_zh: 由于儿童语音的多样性，儿童语音识别是必不可少的，但也具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于声学建模的基于滤波器的判别自动编码器。为了滤除各种说话人类型和音调的影响，将说话人的辅助信息和音调特征与声学特征一起输入编码器以生成语音嵌入。在训练阶段，解码器使用编码器提取的辅助信息和语音嵌入来重建输入的声学特征。通过同时最小化 ASR 损失和特征重建误差来训练自动编码器。该框架可以使语音嵌入更加纯粹，从而获得更准确的senone（三音素状态）分数。在 CMU Kids 语料库的测试集上进行评估，我们的系统与基线系统相比，相对 WER 降低了 7.8%。在域适应实验中，我们的系统在英国口音 PF-STAR 任务上也优于基线系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于滤波器的判别自编码器框架，用于提升儿童语音识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 儿童语音因说话人类型和音高差异导致识别困难，现有方法难以有效过滤这些干扰因素。
AI.method: 将说话人和音高特征作为辅助信息输入编码器生成音素嵌入，通过联合最小化ASR损失与特征重建误差训练自编码器。
AI.result: 在CMU Kids测试集上相对WER降低7.8%，在英式口音PF-STAR任务中域适应效果优于基线系统。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过纯化音素嵌入提升识别准确率，验证了联合优化策略在儿童语音识别中的有效性。

authors_text: Mohammad Keshavarzi,Michael Zollhoefer,Allen Y. Yang,Patrick Peluse,Luisa Caldas
title: Mutual Scene Synthesis for Mixed Reality Telepresence
title_zh: 混合现实远程呈现的互场景合成
abstract: Remote telepresence via next-generation mixed reality platforms can provide higher levels of immersion for computer-mediated communications, allowing participants to engage in a wide spectrum of activities, previously not possible in 2D screen-based communication methods. However, as mixed reality experiences are limited to the local physical surrounding of each user, finding a common virtual ground where users can freely move and interact with each other is challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel mutual scene synthesis method that takes the participants' spaces as input, and generates a virtual synthetic scene that corresponds to the functional features of all participants' local spaces. Our method combines a mutual function optimization module with a deep-learning conditional scene augmentation process to generate a scene mutually and physically accessible to all participants of a mixed reality telepresence scenario. The synthesized scene can hold mutual walkable, sittable and workable functions, all corresponding to physical objects in the users' real environments. We perform experiments using the MatterPort3D dataset and conduct comparative user studies to evaluate the effectiveness of our system. Our results show that our proposed approach can be a promising research direction for facilitating contextualized telepresence systems for next-generation spatial computing platforms.
summary: Remote telepresence via next-generation mixed reality platforms can provide higher levels of immersion for computer-mediated communications, allowing participants to engage in a wide spectrum of activities, previously not possible in 2D screen-based communication methods. However, as mixed reality experiences are limited to the local physical surrounding of each user, finding a common virtual ground where users can freely move and interact with each other is challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel mutual scene synthesis method that takes the participants' spaces as input, and generates a virtual synthetic scene that corresponds to the functional features of all participants' local spaces. Our method combines a mutual function optimization module with a deep-learning conditional scene augmentation process to generate a scene mutually and physically accessible to all participants of a mixed reality telepresence scenario. The synthesized scene can hold mutual walkable, sittable and workable functions, all corresponding to physical objects in the users' real environments. We perform experiments using the MatterPort3D dataset and conduct comparative user studies to evaluate the effectiveness of our system. Our results show that our proposed approach can be a promising research direction for facilitating contextualized telepresence systems for next-generation spatial computing platforms.
abstract_zh: 通过下一代混合现实平台的远程呈现可以为计算机介导的通信提供更高水平的沉浸感，使参与者能够参与广泛的活动，这在以前基于 2D 屏幕的通信方法中是不可能的。然而，由于混合现实体验仅限于每个用户的本地物理环境，因此找到一个用户可以自由移动和彼此交互的共同虚拟地面是一项挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的相互场景合成方法，该方法以参与者的空间作为输入，并生成与所有参与者局部空间的功能特征相对应的虚拟合成场景。我们的方法将互函数优化模块与深度学习条件场景增强过程相结合，生成混合现实远程呈现场景的所有参与者可相互访问且物理上可访问的场景。合成的场景可以具有相互的可行走、可坐和可工作的功能，所有这些都对应于用户真实环境中的物理对象。我们使用 MatterPort3D 数据集进行实验并进行比较用户研究以评估我们系统的有效性。我们的结果表明，我们提出的方法可以成为促进下一代空间计算平台的情境化远程呈现系统的有前途的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于混合现实远程临场的互惠场景合成方法，通过整合参与者的本地空间生成共享的虚拟场景。
AI.motivation: 混合现实远程临场技术受限于用户本地物理环境，难以创建所有参与者均可自由移动和互动的共同虚拟空间。
AI.method: 结合互惠功能优化模块与深度学习条件场景增强过程，基于用户本地空间生成功能对应且物理可访问的虚拟场景。
AI.result: 实验和用户研究验证了该方法在生成可行走、可坐、可工作的共享虚拟场景方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为下一代空间计算平台的沉浸式远程临场系统提供了可行的研究方向。

authors_text: Zhixiang Min,Naji Khosravan,Zachary Bessinger,Manjunath Narayana,Sing Bing Kang,Enrique Dunn,Ivaylo Boyadzhiev
title: LASER: LAtent SpacE Rendering for 2D Visual Localization
title_zh: 激光：用于 2D 视觉定位的潜在空间渲染
abstract: We present LASER, an image-based Monte Carlo Localization (MCL) framework for 2D floor maps. LASER introduces the concept of latent space rendering, where 2D pose hypotheses on the floor map are directly rendered into a geometrically-structured latent space by aggregating viewing ray features. Through a tightly coupled rendering codebook scheme, the viewing ray features are dynamically determined at rendering-time based on their geometries (i.e. length, incident-angle), endowing our representation with view-dependent fine-grain variability. Our codebook scheme effectively disentangles feature encoding from rendering, allowing the latent space rendering to run at speeds above 10KHz. Moreover, through metric learning, our geometrically-structured latent space is common to both pose hypotheses and query images with arbitrary field of views. As a result, LASER achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale indoor localization datasets (i.e. ZInD and Structured3D) for both panorama and perspective image queries, while significantly outperforming existing learning-based methods in speed.
summary: We present LASER, an image-based Monte Carlo Localization (MCL) framework for 2D floor maps. LASER introduces the concept of latent space rendering, where 2D pose hypotheses on the floor map are directly rendered into a geometrically-structured latent space by aggregating viewing ray features. Through a tightly coupled rendering codebook scheme, the viewing ray features are dynamically determined at rendering-time based on their geometries (i.e. length, incident-angle), endowing our representation with view-dependent fine-grain variability. Our codebook scheme effectively disentangles feature encoding from rendering, allowing the latent space rendering to run at speeds above 10KHz. Moreover, through metric learning, our geometrically-structured latent space is common to both pose hypotheses and query images with arbitrary field of views. As a result, LASER achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale indoor localization datasets (i.e. ZInD and Structured3D) for both panorama and perspective image queries, while significantly outperforming existing learning-based methods in speed.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 LASER，一种基于图像的 2D 楼层地图蒙特卡洛定位 (MCL) 框架。 LASER 引入了潜在空间渲染的概念，其中通过聚合观察光线特征，将楼层地图上的 2D 姿态假设直接渲染为几何结构的潜在空间。通过紧密耦合的渲染码本方案，视线特征在渲染时根据其几何形状（即长度、入射角）动态确定，从而赋予我们的表示与视图相关的细粒度可变性。我们的码本方案有效地将特征编码与渲染分离，允许潜在空间渲染以高于 10KHz 的速度运行。此外，通过度量学习，我们的几何结构潜在空间对于提出假设和具有任意视场的查询图像都是通用的。因此，LASER 在全景和透视图像查询的大规模室内定位数据集（即 ZInD 和 Structured3D）上实现了最先进的性能，同时在速度上显着优于现有的基于学习的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LASER，一种基于图像的蒙特卡洛定位框架，通过潜在空间渲染技术实现二维地图的高效视觉定位。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位方法在速度与精度上存在不足，尤其在处理大规模室内场景和不同视角图像时表现欠佳。
AI.method: 通过几何结构化潜在空间渲染，将二维姿态假设转化为基于视角光线特征的动态编码，并采用紧耦合的渲染码本方案与度量学习实现高效特征对齐。
AI.result: 在ZInD和Structured3D数据集上达到最先进的定位精度，处理速度超过10KHz，显著优于现有学习方法。
AI.conclusion: LASER通过几何感知的潜在空间表示与高效渲染机制，为大规模室内场景的视觉定位提供了速度与精度兼具的解决方案。

authors_text: Qi Zhang,Xin Huang,Ying Feng,Xue Wang,Hongdong Li,Qing Wang
title: Stereo Unstructured Magnification: Multiple Homography Image for View Synthesis
title_zh: 立体非结构化放大：用于视图合成的多个单应图像
abstract: This paper studies the problem of view synthesis with certain amount of rotations from a pair of images, what we called stereo unstructured magnification. While the multi-plane image representation is well suited for view synthesis with depth invariant, how to generalize it to unstructured views remains a significant challenge. This is primarily due to the depth-dependency caused by camera frontal parallel representation. Here we propose a novel multiple homography image (MHI) representation, comprising of a set of scene planes with fixed normals and distances. A two-stage network is developed for novel view synthesis. Stage-1 is an MHI reconstruction module that predicts the MHIs and composites layered multi-normal images along the normal direction. Stage-2 is a normal-blending module to find blending weights. We also derive an angle-based cost to guide the blending of multi-normal images by exploiting per-normal geometry. Compared with the state-of-the-art methods, our method achieves superior performance for view synthesis qualitatively and quantitatively, especially for cases when the cameras undergo rotations.
summary: This paper studies the problem of view synthesis with certain amount of rotations from a pair of images, what we called stereo unstructured magnification. While the multi-plane image representation is well suited for view synthesis with depth invariant, how to generalize it to unstructured views remains a significant challenge. This is primarily due to the depth-dependency caused by camera frontal parallel representation. Here we propose a novel multiple homography image (MHI) representation, comprising of a set of scene planes with fixed normals and distances. A two-stage network is developed for novel view synthesis. Stage-1 is an MHI reconstruction module that predicts the MHIs and composites layered multi-normal images along the normal direction. Stage-2 is a normal-blending module to find blending weights. We also derive an angle-based cost to guide the blending of multi-normal images by exploiting per-normal geometry. Compared with the state-of-the-art methods, our method achieves superior performance for view synthesis qualitatively and quantitatively, especially for cases when the cameras undergo rotations.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一对图像具有一定旋转量的视图合成问题，我们称之为立体非结构化放大。虽然多平面图像表示非常适合深度不变的视图合成，但如何将其推广到非结构化视图仍然是一个重大挑战。这主要是由于相机正面平行表示引起的深度依赖性。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的多重单应图像（MHI）表示，由一组具有固定法线和距离的场景平面组成。开发了一个两阶段网络用于新颖的视图合成。 Stage-1 是 MHI 重建模块，可预测 MHI 并沿法线方向合成分层多法线图像。 Stage-2 是一个普通混合模块，用于查找混合权重。我们还推导了基于角度的成本，通过利用每个法线的几何形状来指导多法线图像的混合。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在定性和定量的视图合成方面实现了卓越的性能，特别是在相机旋转的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在旋转的情况下，利用多单应性图像表示进行视图合成的问题，以解决传统方法在非结构化视角下的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理非结构化视角（如旋转）时存在深度依赖性问题，导致视图合成效果不佳，需提出新的表示方法。
AI.method: 提出多重单应性图像（MHI）表示，包含固定法线和距离的场景平面，并设计两阶段网络：第一阶段重建MHI并合成分层图像，第二阶段通过角度成本计算混合权重进行图像融合。
AI.result: 在旋转场景下，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有先进方法，显著提升视图合成质量。
AI.conclusion: MHI表示和两阶段网络有效解决了非结构化视角下的视图合成问题，为复杂场景的图像生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Isabella Ferreira,Bram Adams,Jinghui Cheng
title: How heated is it? Understanding GitHub locked issues
title_zh: 有多热？了解 GitHub 锁定问题
comment: ef:In 19th International Conference on Mining Software Repositories (MSR'22), May 23-24, 2022, Pittsburgh, PA, USA
comments: ef:In 19th International Conference on Mining Software Repositories (MSR'22), May 23-24, 2022, Pittsburgh, PA, USA
abstract: Although issues of open source software are created to discuss and solve technical problems, conversations can become heated, with discussants getting angry and/or agitated for a variety of reasons, such as poor suggestions or violation of community conventions. To prevent and mitigate discussions from getting heated, tools like GitHub have introduced the ability to lock issue discussions that violate the code of conduct or other community guidelines. Despite some early research on locked issues, there is a lack of understanding of how communities use this feature and of potential threats to validity for researchers relying on a dataset of locked issues as an oracle for heated discussions. To address this gap, we (i) quantitatively analyzed 79 GitHub projects that have at least one issue locked as too heated, and (ii) qualitatively analyzed all issues locked as too heated of the 79 projects, a total of 205 issues comprising 5,511 comments. We found that projects have different behaviors when locking issues: while 54 locked less than 10% of their closed issues, 14 projects locked more than 90% of their closed issues. Additionally, locked issues tend to have a similar number of comments, participants, and emoji reactions to non-locked issues. For the 205 issues locked as too heated, we found that one-third do not contain any uncivil discourse, and only 8.82% of the analyzed comments are actually uncivil. Finally, we found that the locking justifications provided by maintainers do not always match the label used to lock the issue. Based on our results, we identified three pitfalls to avoid when using the GitHub locked issues data and we provide recommendations for researchers and practitioners.

To prevent and mitigate discussions from getting heated, tools like GitHub have introduced the ability to lock issue discussions that violate the code of conduct or other community guidelines. Despite some early research on locked issues, there is a lack of understanding of how communities use this feature and of potential threats to validity for researchers relying on a dataset of locked issues as an oracle for heated discussions. To address this gap, we (i) quantitatively analyzed 79 GitHub projects that have at least one issue locked as too heated, and (ii) qualitatively analyzed all issues locked as too heated of the 79 projects, a total of 205 issues comprising 5,511 comments. We found that projects have different behaviors when locking issues: while 54 locked less than 10% of their closed issues, 14 projects locked more than 90% of their closed issues. Additionally, locked issues tend to have a similar number of comments, participants, and emoji reactions to non-locked issues. For the 205 issues locked as too heated, we found that one-third do not contain any uncivil discourse, and only 8.82% of the analyzed comments are actually uncivil. Finally, we found that the locking justifications provided by maintainers do not always match the label used to lock the issue. Based on our results, we identified three pitfalls to avoid when using the GitHub locked issues data and we provide recommendations for researchers and practitioners.
abstract_zh: 尽管开源软件的问题是为了讨论和解决技术问题而创建的，但对话可能会变得激烈，讨论者会因为各种原因而生气和/或激动，例如糟糕的建议或违反社区惯例。为了防止和缓解讨论变得激烈，GitHub 等工具引入了锁定违反行为准则或其他社区准则的问题讨论的功能。尽管对锁定问题进行了一些早期研究，但人们对社区如何使用此功能以及依赖锁定问题数据集作为激烈讨论的预言机的研究人员的有效性的潜在威胁缺乏了解。为了解决这一差距，我们 (i) 定量分析了 79 个至少有一个问题被锁定为过热问题的 GitHub 项目，(ii) 定性分析了 79 个项目中被锁定为过热问题的所有问题，总共 205 个问题，包含 5,511 条评论。我们发现项目在锁定问题时有不同的行为：54 个项目锁定了不到 10% 的已关闭问题，而 14 个项目锁定了超过 90% 的已关闭问题。此外，锁定问题往往与非锁定问题具有相似数量的评论、参与者和表情符号反应。在被锁定为过热的205个问题中，我们发现三分之一不包含任何不文明言论，而分析的评论中只有8.82%实际上是不文明言论。最后，我们发现维护者提供的锁定理由并不总是与用于锁定问题的标签相匹配。根据我们的结果，我们确定了使用 GitHub 锁定问题数据时需要避免的三个陷阱，并为研究人员和从业者提供了建议。

AI.tldr: 本文分析GitHub上被标记为'过于激烈'的锁定问题，探讨社区如何使用该功能及锁定问题作为激烈讨论指标的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管GitHub引入了锁定问题功能以管理激烈讨论，但现有研究缺乏对社区使用该功能方式及锁定数据作为研究依据的可靠性分析。
AI.method: 定量分析79个至少含一个锁定问题的GitHub项目，定性分析205个被标记为'过于激烈'的锁定问题及其5,511条评论。
AI.result: 项目锁定问题比例差异大（54个项目锁定不足10%关闭问题，14个项目锁定超90%）；锁定问题的评论数、参与者和表情反应与非锁定问题相似；三分之一锁定问题不含不文明言论，仅8.82%评论存在不文明内容；维护者提供的锁定理由与标签不一致。
AI.conclusion: 使用GitHub锁定问题数据时需警惕三大陷阱，建议研究者和实践者结合上下文谨慎解读锁定标签，并验证其与实际讨论热度的相关性。

search_text: How heated is it? Understanding GitHub locked issues 有多热？了解 GitHub 锁定问题 Although issues of open source software are created to discuss and solve technical problems, conversations can become heated, with discussants getting angry and/or agitated for a variety of reasons, such as poor suggestions or violation of community conventions. To prevent and mitigate discussions from getting heated, tools like GitHub have introduced the ability to lock issue discussions that violate the code of conduct or other community guidelines. Despite some early research on locked issues, there is a lack of understanding of how communities use this feature and of potential threats to validity for researchers relying on a dataset of locked issues as an oracle for heated discussions. To address this gap, we (i) quantitatively analyzed 79 GitHub projects that have at least one issue locked as too heated, and (ii) qualitatively analyzed all issues locked as too heated of the 79 projects, a total of 205 issues comprising 5,511 comments. We found that projects have different behaviors when locking issues: while 54 locked less than 10% of their closed issues, 14 projects locked more than 90% of their closed issues. Additionally, locked issues tend to have a similar number of comments, participants, and emoji reactions to non-locked issues. For the 205 issues locked as too heated, we found that one-third do not contain any uncivil discourse, and only 8.82% of the analyzed comments are actually uncivil. Finally, we found that the locking justifications provided by maintainers do not always match the label used to lock the issue. Based on our results, we identified three pitfalls to avoid when using the GitHub locked issues data and we provide recommendations for researchers and practitioners. 尽管开源软件的问题是为了讨论和解决技术问题而创建的，但对话可能会变得激烈，讨论者会因为各种原因而生气和/或激动，例如糟糕的建议或违反社区惯例。为了防止和缓解讨论变得激烈，GitHub 等工具引入了锁定违反行为准则或其他社区准则的问题讨论的功能。尽管对锁定问题进行了一些早期研究，但人们对社区如何使用此功能以及依赖锁定问题数据集作为激烈讨论的预言机的研究人员的有效性的潜在威胁缺乏了解。为了解决这一差距，我们 (i) 定量分析了 79 个至少有一个问题被锁定为过热问题的 GitHub 项目，(ii) 定性分析了 79 个项目中被锁定为过热问题的所有问题，总共 205 个问题，包含 5,511 条评论。我们发现项目在锁定问题时有不同的行为：54 个项目锁定了不到 10% 的已关闭问题，而 14 个项目锁定了超过 90% 的已关闭问题。此外，锁定问题往往与非锁定问题具有相似数量的评论、参与者和表情符号反应。在被锁定为过热的205个问题中，我们发现三分之一不包含任何不文明言论，而分析的评论中只有8.82%实际上是不文明言论。最后，我们发现维护者提供的锁定理由并不总是与用于锁定问题的标签相匹配。根据我们的结果，我们确定了使用 GitHub 锁定问题数据时需要避免的三个陷阱，并为研究人员和从业者提供了建议。 本文分析GitHub上被标记为'过于激烈'的锁定问题，探讨社区如何使用该功能及锁定问题作为激烈讨论指标的有效性。 Isabella Ferreira,Bram Adams,Jinghui Cheng cs.SE,cs.HC

authors_text: Jia Liu,Wenjie Xuan,Yuhang Gan,Juhua Liu,Bo Du
title: An End-to-end Supervised Domain Adaptation Framework for Cross-Domain Change Detection
title_zh: 用于跨域变化检测的端到端监督域适应框架
abstract: Existing deep learning-based change detection methods try to elaborately design complicated neural networks with powerful feature representations, but ignore the universal domain shift induced by time-varying land cover changes, including luminance fluctuations and season changes between pre-event and post-event images, thereby producing sub-optimal results. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end Supervised Domain Adaptation framework for cross-domain Change Detection, namely SDACD, to effectively alleviate the domain shift between bi-temporal images for better change predictions. Specifically, our SDACD presents collaborative adaptations from both image and feature perspectives with supervised learning. Image adaptation exploits generative adversarial learning with cycle-consistency constraints to perform cross-domain style transformation, effectively narrowing the domain gap in a two-side generation fashion. As to feature adaptation, we extract domain-invariant features to align different feature distributions in the feature space, which could further reduce the domain gap of cross-domain images. To further improve the performance, we combine three types of bi-temporal images for the final change prediction, including the initial input bi-temporal images and two generated bi-temporal images from the pre-event and post-event domains. Extensive experiments and analyses on two benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and universality of our proposed framework. Notably, our framework pushes several representative baseline models up to new State-Of-The-Art records, achieving 97.34% and 92.36% on the CDD and WHU building datasets, respectively. The source code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Perfect-You/SDACD.
summary: Existing deep learning-based change detection methods try to elaborately design complicated neural networks with powerful feature representations, but ignore the universal domain shift induced by time-varying land cover changes, including luminance fluctuations and season changes between pre-event and post-event images, thereby producing sub-optimal results. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end Supervised Domain Adaptation framework for cross-domain Change Detection, namely SDACD, to effectively alleviate the domain shift between bi-temporal images for better change predictions. Specifically, our SDACD presents collaborative adaptations from both image and feature perspectives with supervised learning. Image adaptation exploits generative adversarial learning with cycle-consistency constraints to perform cross-domain style transformation, effectively narrowing the domain gap in a two-side generation fashion. As to feature adaptation, we extract domain-invariant features to align different feature distributions in the feature space, which could further reduce the domain gap of cross-domain images. To further improve the performance, we combine three types of bi-temporal images for the final change prediction, including the initial input bi-temporal images and two generated bi-temporal images from the pre-event and post-event domains. Extensive experiments and analyses on two benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and universality of our proposed framework. Notably, our framework pushes several representative baseline models up to new State-Of-The-Art records, achieving 97.34% and 92.36% on the CDD and WHU building datasets, respectively. The source code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Perfect-You/SDACD.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于深度学习的变化检测方法试图精心设计具有强大特征表示的复杂神经网络，但忽略了随时间变化的土地覆盖变化引起的普遍域转移，包括事件前和事件后图像之间的亮度波动和季节变化，从而产生次优结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于跨域变化检测的端到端监督域适应框架，即 SDACD，以有效减轻双时图像之间的域偏移，以实现更好的变化预测。具体来说，我们的 SDACD 通过监督学习从图像和特征的角度提出了协作适应。图像适应利用具有循环一致性约束的生成对抗性学习来执行跨域风格转换，以两侧生成方式有效缩小域差距。至于特征适应，我们提取域不变特征来对齐特征空间中的不同特征分布，这可以进一步减少跨域图像的域差距。为了进一步提高性能，我们结合了三种类型的双时图像进行最终的变化预测，包括初始输入双时图像和来自事件前和事件后域的两个生成的双时图像。对两个基准的广泛实验和分析证明了我们提出的框架的有效性和普遍性。值得注意的是，我们的框架将几个代表性基线模型推向了新的 State-Of-The-Art 记录，在 CDD 和 WHU 建筑数据集上分别达到了 97.34% 和 92.36%。源代码和模型可在 https://github.com/Perfect-You/SDACD 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的监督域适应框架SDACD，用于跨域变化检测，以解决因时间变化导致的领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习变化检测方法忽视了时间变化引起的领域偏移（如光照波动和季节变化），导致检测效果不佳，需设计域适应框架以提升跨域预测性能。
AI.method: SDACD从图像和特征两方面进行协同适应：图像适应采用循环一致性约束的生成对抗网络实现跨域风格转换；特征适应提取领域不变特征对齐特征分布，并结合原始及生成的三组双时相图像进行最终预测。
AI.result: 在CDD和WHU建筑数据集上分别达到97.34%和92.36%的精度，显著超越多个基线模型，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: SDACD通过联合图像域适应与特征域适应有效缓解领域偏移，验证了其在跨域变化检测中的有效性与通用性，为相关研究提供了新思路。

Extensive experiments and analyses on two benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and universality of our proposed framework. Notably, our framework pushes several representative baseline models up to new State-Of-The-Art records, achieving 97.34% and 92.36% on the CDD and WHU building datasets, respectively. The source code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Perfect-You/SDACD. 现有的基于深度学习的变化检测方法试图精心设计具有强大特征表示的复杂神经网络，但忽略了随时间变化的土地覆盖变化引起的普遍域转移，包括事件前和事件后图像之间的亮度波动和季节变化，从而产生次优结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于跨域变化检测的端到端监督域适应框架，即 SDACD，以有效减轻双时图像之间的域偏移，以实现更好的变化预测。具体来说，我们的 SDACD 通过监督学习从图像和特征的角度提出了协作适应。图像适应利用具有循环一致性约束的生成对抗性学习来执行跨域风格转换，以两侧生成方式有效缩小域差距。至于特征适应，我们提取域不变特征来对齐特征空间中的不同特征分布，这可以进一步减少跨域图像的域差距。为了进一步提高性能，我们结合了三种类型的双时图像进行最终的变化预测，包括初始输入双时图像和来自事件前和事件后域的两个生成的双时图像。对两个基准的广泛实验和分析证明了我们提出的框架的有效性和普遍性。值得注意的是，我们的框架将几个代表性基线模型推向了新的 State-Of-The-Art 记录，在 CDD 和 WHU 建筑数据集上分别达到了 97.34% 和 92.36%。源代码和模型可在 https://github.com/Perfect-You/SDACD 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种端到端的监督域适应框架SDACD，用于跨域变化检测，以解决因时间变化导致的领域偏移问题。 Jia Liu,Wenjie Xuan,Yuhang Gan,Juhua Liu,Bo Du cs.CV

authors_text: Akhil Meethal,Marco Pedersoli,Zhongwen Zhu,Francisco Perdigon Romero,Eric Granger
title: Semi-Weakly Supervised Object Detection by Sampling Pseudo Ground-Truth Boxes
title_zh: 通过对伪真实框进行采样的半弱监督目标检测
abstract: Semi- and weakly-supervised learning have recently attracted considerable attention in the object detection literature since they can alleviate the cost of annotation needed to successfully train deep learning models. State-of-art approaches for semi-supervised learning rely on student-teacher models trained using a multi-stage process, and considerable data augmentation. Custom networks have been developed for the weakly-supervised setting, making it difficult to adapt to different detectors. In this paper, a weakly semi-supervised training method is introduced that reduces these training challenges, yet achieves state-of-the-art performance by leveraging only a small fraction of fully-labeled images with information in weakly-labeled images. In particular, our generic sampling-based learning strategy produces pseudo-ground-truth (GT) bounding box annotations in an online fashion, eliminating the need for multi-stage training, and student-teacher network configurations. These pseudo GT boxes are sampled from weakly-labeled images based on the categorical score of object proposals accumulated via a score propagation process. Empirical results on the Pascal VOC dataset, indicate that the proposed approach improves performance by 5.0% when using VOC 2007 as fully-labeled, and VOC 2012 as weak-labeled data. Also, with 5-10% fully annotated images, we observed an improvement of more than 10% in mAP, showing that a modest investment in image-level annotation, can substantially improve detection performance.
summary: Semi- and weakly-supervised learning have recently attracted considerable attention in the object detection literature since they can alleviate the cost of annotation needed to successfully train deep learning models. State-of-art approaches for semi-supervised learning rely on student-teacher models trained using a multi-stage process, and considerable data augmentation. Custom networks have been developed for the weakly-supervised setting, making it difficult to adapt to different detectors. In this paper, a weakly semi-supervised training method is introduced that reduces these training challenges, yet achieves state-of-the-art performance by leveraging only a small fraction of fully-labeled images with information in weakly-labeled images. In particular, our generic sampling-based learning strategy produces pseudo-ground-truth (GT) bounding box annotations in an online fashion, eliminating the need for multi-stage training, and student-teacher network configurations. These pseudo GT boxes are sampled from weakly-labeled images based on the categorical score of object proposals accumulated via a score propagation process. Empirical results on the Pascal VOC dataset, indicate that the proposed approach improves performance by 5.0% when using VOC 2007 as fully-labeled, and VOC 2012 as weak-labeled data. Also, with 5-10% fully annotated images, we observed an improvement of more than 10% in mAP, showing that a modest investment in image-level annotation, can substantially improve detection performance.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习和弱监督学习最近在目标检测文献中引起了相当大的关注，因为它们可以减轻成功训练深度学习模型所需的注释成本。最先进的半监督学习方法依赖于使用多阶段过程训练的学生-教师模型以及大量的数据增强。定制网络是针对弱监督环境开发的，因此很难适应不同的检测器。在本文中，引入了一种弱半监督训练方法，该方法可以减少这些训练挑战，同时通过仅利用一小部分带有弱标记图像信息的全标记图像来实现最先进的性能。特别是，我们基于采样的通用学习策略以在线方式生成伪地面实况（GT）边界框注释，从而消除了多阶段训练和学生-教师网络配置的需要。这些伪 GT 框是根据通过分数传播过程累积的对象提案的分类分数从弱标记图像中采样的。 Pascal VOC 数据集上的实证结果表明，当使用 VOC 2007 作为全标记数据和 VOC 2012 作为弱标记数据时，所提出的方法将性能提高了 5.0%。此外，对于 5-10% 完全注释的图像，我们观察到 mAP 提高了 10% 以上，这表明对图像级注释的适度投资可以显着提高检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半弱监督目标检测方法，通过采样伪标注框利用少量全标注图像和弱标注图像提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法依赖复杂的学生-教师模型和多阶段训练，且弱监督方法难以适配不同检测器，需降低训练复杂度并提升性能。
AI.method: 提出基于采样的在线伪标注生成策略，通过得分传播过程从弱标注图像中提取对象提案的类别得分，生成伪地面真实框，无需多阶段训练或学生-教师结构。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC数据集上，使用VOC2007全标注和VOC2012弱标注时性能提升5.0%；仅需5-10%全标注图像即可使mAP提升超10%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过高效利用弱标注信息，在减少标注成本的同时达到先进性能，为半弱监督检测提供通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Young-Ho Kim,Diana Chou,Bongshin Lee,Margaret Danilovich,Amanda Lazar,David E. Conroy,Hernisa Kacorri,Eun Kyoung Choe
title: MyMove: Facilitating Older Adults to Collect In-Situ Activity Labels on a Smartwatch with Speech
title_zh: MyMove：帮助老年人在带有语音的智能手表上收集现场活动标签
comment: To appear at ACM CHI 2022. 21 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables. For the NSF funded project, visit https://mymove-collective.github.io
comments: To appear at ACM CHI 2022. 21 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables. For the NSF funded project, visit https://mymove-collective.github.io
abstract: Current activity tracking technologies are largely trained on younger adults' data, which can lead to solutions that are not well-suited for older adults. To build activity trackers for older adults, it is crucial to collect training data with them. To this end, we examine the feasibility and challenges with older adults in collecting activity labels by leveraging speech. Specifically, we built MyMove, a speech-based smartwatch app to facilitate the in-situ labeling with a low capture burden. We conducted a 7-day deployment study, where 13 older adults collected their activity labels and smartwatch sensor data, while wearing a thigh-worn activity monitor. Participants were highly engaged, capturing 1,224 verbal reports in total. We extracted 1,885 activities with corresponding effort level and timespan, and examined the usefulness of these reports as activity labels. We discuss the implications of our approach and the collected dataset in supporting older adults through personalized activity tracking technologies.
summary: Current activity tracking technologies are largely trained on younger adults' data, which can lead to solutions that are not well-suited for older adults. To build activity trackers for older adults, it is crucial to collect training data with them. To this end, we examine the feasibility and challenges with older adults in collecting activity labels by leveraging speech. Specifically, we built MyMove, a speech-based smartwatch app to facilitate the in-situ labeling with a low capture burden. We conducted a 7-day deployment study, where 13 older adults collected their activity labels and smartwatch sensor data, while wearing a thigh-worn activity monitor. Participants were highly engaged, capturing 1,224 verbal reports in total. We extracted 1,885 activities with corresponding effort level and timespan, and examined the usefulness of these reports as activity labels. We discuss the implications of our approach and the collected dataset in supporting older adults through personalized activity tracking technologies.
abstract_zh: 当前的活动跟踪技术主要是根据年轻人的数据进行训练的，这可能会导致解决方案不太适合老年人。要为老年人构建活动追踪器，收集他们的训练数据至关重要。为此，我们研究了老年人利用语音收集活动标签的可行性和挑战。具体来说，我们构建了 MyMove，一个基于语音的智能手表应用程序，以促进低捕获负担的原位标记。我们进行了一项为期 7 天的部署研究，13 名老年人佩戴大腿佩戴的活动监测器收集了他们的活动标签和智能手表传感器数据。参与者高度参与，共收到 1,224 份口头报告。我们提取了 1,885 项具有相应努力水平和时间跨度的活动，并检查了这些报告作为活动标签的有用性。我们讨论了我们的方法和收集的数据集在通过个性化活动跟踪技术支持老年人方面的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MyMove，一款基于语音的智能手表应用，旨在帮助老年人在日常生活中低负担地收集活动标签数据。
AI.motivation: 现有活动追踪技术多基于年轻人数据，导致老年人使用体验不佳，需针对性收集老年人活动数据以优化解决方案。
AI.method: 开发语音交互智能手表应用MyMove，结合 thigh-worn 活动监测设备，通过7天部署研究收集13名老年人的语音报告与传感器数据。
AI.result: 参与者共提交1,224条语音报告，提取1,885项活动数据，验证了语音标签在低负担场景下的可行性及数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 语音交互方式可有效降低老年人活动标签收集难度，所收集数据集为个性化健康追踪技术开发提供了重要支持。

authors_text: Brian Andersen,Gregory Delipei,David Kropaczek,Jason Hou
title: MOF: A Modular Framework for Rapid Application of Optimization Methodologies to General Engineering Design Problems
title_zh: MOF：将优化方法快速应用于一般工程设计问题的模块化框架
abstract: A variety of optimization algorithms have been developed to solve engineering design problems in which the solution space is too large to manually determine the optimal solution. The Modular Optimization Framework (MOF) was developed to facilitate the development and application of these optimization algorithms. MOF is written in Python 3, and it used object-oriented programming to create a modular design that allows users to easily incorporate new optimization algorithms, methods, or engineering design problems into the framework. Additionally, a common input file allows users to easily specify design problems, update the optimization parameters, and perform comparisons between various optimization methods and algorithms. In the current MOF version, genetic algorithm (GA) and simulated annealing (SA) approaches are implemented. Applications in different nuclear engineering optimization problems are included as examples. The effectiveness of the GA and SA optimization algorithms within MOF are demonstrated through an unconstrained nuclear fuel assembly pin lattice optimization, a first cycle fuel loading constrained optimization of a three-loop pressurized water reactor (PWR), and a third cycle constrained optimization of a four-loop PWR. In all cases, the algorithms efficiently searched the solution spaces and found optimized solutions to the given problems that satisfied the imposed constraints. These results demonstrate the capabilities of the existing optimization tools within MOF, and they also provide a set of benchmark cases that can be used to evaluate the progress of future optimization methodologies with MOF.
summary: A variety of optimization algorithms have been developed to solve engineering design problems in which the solution space is too large to manually determine the optimal solution. The Modular Optimization Framework (MOF) was developed to facilitate the development and application of these optimization algorithms. MOF is written in Python 3, and it used object-oriented programming to create a modular design that allows users to easily incorporate new optimization algorithms, methods, or engineering design problems into the framework. Additionally, a common input file allows users to easily specify design problems, update the optimization parameters, and perform comparisons between various optimization methods and algorithms. In the current MOF version, genetic algorithm (GA) and simulated annealing (SA) approaches are implemented. Applications in different nuclear engineering optimization problems are included as examples. The effectiveness of the GA and SA optimization algorithms within MOF are demonstrated through an unconstrained nuclear fuel assembly pin lattice optimization, a first cycle fuel loading constrained optimization of a three-loop pressurized water reactor (PWR), and a third cycle constrained optimization of a four-loop PWR. In all cases, the algorithms efficiently searched the solution spaces and found optimized solutions to the given problems that satisfied the imposed constraints. These results demonstrate the capabilities of the existing optimization tools within MOF, and they also provide a set of benchmark cases that can be used to evaluate the progress of future optimization methodologies with MOF.
abstract_zh: 人们开发了多种优化算法来解决解空间太大而无法手动确定最优解的工程设计问题。模块化优化框架（MOF）的开发是为了促进这些优化算法的开发和应用。 MOF是用Python 3编写的，它使用面向对象编程来创建模块化设计，使用户可以轻松地将新的优化算法、方法或工程设计问题合并到框架中。此外，通用输入文件允许用户轻松指定设计问题、更新优化参数以及在各种优化方法和算法之间进行比较。在当前的 MOF 版本中，实现了遗传算法 (GA) 和模拟退火 (SA) 方法。包括在不同核工程优化问题中的应用作为示例。 MOF 中 GA 和 SA 优化算法的有效性通过无约束核燃料组件针晶格优化、三环路压水堆 (PWR) 的第一循环燃料加载约束优化和四环路 PWR 的第三循环约束优化得到证明。在所有情况下，算法都有效地搜索解决方案空间并找到满足所施加约束的给定问题的优化解决方案。这些结果证明了 MOF 中现有优化工具的功能，并且还提供了一组基准案例，可用于评估 MOF 未来优化方法的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化优化框架MOF，用于快速应用优化方法解决一般工程设计问题，并通过核工程案例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统优化算法在处理复杂工程设计问题时存在灵活性差、参数配置复杂等问题，亟需一种通用框架支持多种算法的快速集成与比较。
AI.method: 基于Python 3的面向对象编程构建模块化框架，通过通用输入文件统一管理设计问题参数，内置遗传算法和模拟退火算法并支持扩展。
AI.result: 在核燃料组件格架优化、三回路压水堆首次循环燃料装载优化及四回路压水堆第三次循环优化中，算法均有效搜索解空间并满足约束条件。
AI.conclusion: MOF框架验证了现有优化工具的有效性，同时为未来优化方法的评估提供了基准案例，可促进工程优化领域的算法研发与应用。
