The Modular Optimization Framework (MOF) was developed to facilitate the development and application of these optimization algorithms. MOF is written in Python 3, and it used object-oriented programming to create a modular design that allows users to easily incorporate new optimization algorithms, methods, or engineering design problems into the framework. Additionally, a common input file allows users to easily specify design problems, update the optimization parameters, and perform comparisons between various optimization methods and algorithms. In the current MOF version, genetic algorithm (GA) and simulated annealing (SA) approaches are implemented. Applications in different nuclear engineering optimization problems are included as examples. The effectiveness of the GA and SA optimization algorithms within MOF are demonstrated through an unconstrained nuclear fuel assembly pin lattice optimization, a first cycle fuel loading constrained optimization of a three-loop pressurized water reactor (PWR), and a third cycle constrained optimization of a four-loop PWR. In all cases, the algorithms efficiently searched the solution spaces and found optimized solutions to the given problems that satisfied the imposed constraints. authors_text: Wei Yang,Balakumar Sundaralingam,Chris Paxton,Iretiayo Akinola,Yu-Wei Chao,Maya Cakmak,Dieter Fox
title: Model Predictive Control for Fluid Human-to-Robot Handovers
title_zh: 流体人机切换的模型预测控制
abstract: Human-robot handover is a fundamental yet challenging task in human-robot interaction and collaboration. Recently, remarkable progressions have been made in human-to-robot handovers of unknown objects by using learning-based grasp generators. However, how to responsively generate smooth motions to take an object from a human is still an open question. Specifically, planning motions that take human comfort into account is not a part of the human-robot handover process in most prior works. In this paper, we propose to generate smooth motions via an efficient model-predictive control (MPC) framework that integrates perception and complex domain-specific constraints into the optimization problem. We introduce a learning-based grasp reachability model to select candidate grasps which maximize the robot's manipulability, giving it more freedom to satisfy these constraints. Finally, we integrate a neural net force/torque classifier that detects contact events from noisy data. We conducted human-to-robot handover experiments on a diverse set of objects with several users (N=4) and performed a systematic evaluation of each module. The study shows that the users preferred our MPC approach over the baseline system by a large margin. More results and videos are available at https://sites.google.com/nvidia.com/mpc-for-handover.
summary: Human-robot handover is a fundamental yet challenging task in human-robot interaction and collaboration. Recently, remarkable progressions have been made in human-to-robot handovers of unknown objects by using learning-based grasp generators. However, how to responsively generate smooth motions to take an object from a human is still an open question. Specifically, planning motions that take human comfort into account is not a part of the human-robot handover process in most prior works. In this paper, we propose to generate smooth motions via an efficient model-predictive control (MPC) framework that integrates perception and complex domain-specific constraints into the optimization problem. We introduce a learning-based grasp reachability model to select candidate grasps which maximize the robot's manipulability, giving it more freedom to satisfy these constraints. Finally, we integrate a neural net force/torque classifier that detects contact events from noisy data. We conducted human-to-robot handover experiments on a diverse set of objects with several users (N=4) and performed a systematic evaluation of each module. The study shows that the users preferred our MPC approach over the baseline system by a large margin. More results and videos are available at https://sites.google.com/nvidia.com/mpc-for-handover.
abstract_zh: 人机切换是人机交互和协作中一项基本但具有挑战性的任务。最近，通过使用基于学习的抓取生成器，在未知物体的人机交互方面取得了显着的进展。然而，如何响应地生成平滑的运动以从人类身上获取物体仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。具体来说，在大多数先前的工作中，考虑人类舒适度的规划运动并不是人机切换过程的一部分。在本文中，我们建议通过有效的模型预测控制（MPC）框架生成平滑运动，该框架将感知和复杂的特定领域约束集成到优化问题中。我们引入了一种基于学习的抓取可达性模型来选择候选抓取，从而最大化机器人的可操作性，使其更自由地满足这些约束。最后，我们集成了一个神经网络力/扭矩分类器，可以从噪声数据中检测接触事件。我们对多个用户（N = 4）的不同对象进行了人机切换实验，并对每个模块进行了系统评估。研究表明，与基线系统相比，用户更喜欢我们的 MPC 方法。更多结果和视频请访问 https://sites.google.com/nvidia.com/mpc-for-handover。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）的框架，用于生成流畅且考虑人类舒适度的人机交接运动。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成平滑交接运动及考虑人类舒适度方面存在不足，需整合感知与约束优化以提升交互体验。
AI.method: 设计MPC框架整合感知数据与领域约束，结合学习的抓取可达性模型筛选最优抓取点，并利用神经网络分类器检测接触事件。
AI.result: 用户实验表明，MPC方法在交接流畅性与舒适度上显著优于基线系统（N=4用户参与测试）。
AI.conclusion: MPC框架有效解决了人机交接中的运动规划难题，未来可进一步优化约束模型与实时性表现。

authors_text: Walter Zimmer,Marcus Grabler,Alois Knoll
title: Real-Time and Robust 3D Object Detection Within Road-Side LiDARs Using Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 使用域适应在路边 LiDAR 中进行实时、鲁棒的 3D 物体检测
abstract: This work aims to address the challenges in domain adaptation of 3D object detection using infrastructure LiDARs. We design a model DASE-ProPillars that can detect vehicles in infrastructure-based LiDARs in real-time. Our model uses PointPillars as the baseline model with additional modules to improve the 3D detection performance. To prove the effectiveness of our proposed modules in DASE-ProPillars, we train and evaluate the model on two datasets, the open source A9-Dataset and a semi-synthetic infrastructure dataset created within the Regensburg Next project. We do several sets of experiments for each module in the DASE-ProPillars detector that show that our model outperforms the SE-ProPillars baseline on the real A9 test set and a semi-synthetic A9 test set, while maintaining an inference speed of 45 Hz (22 ms). We apply domain adaptation from the semi-synthetic A9-Dataset to the semi-synthetic dataset from the Regensburg Next project by applying transfer learning and achieve a 3D mAP@0.25 of 93.49% on the Car class of the target test set using 40 recall positions.
summary: This work aims to address the challenges in domain adaptation of 3D object detection using infrastructure LiDARs. We design a model DASE-ProPillars that can detect vehicles in infrastructure-based LiDARs in real-time. Our model uses PointPillars as the baseline model with additional modules to improve the 3D detection performance. To prove the effectiveness of our proposed modules in DASE-ProPillars, we train and evaluate the model on two datasets, the open source A9-Dataset and a semi-synthetic infrastructure dataset created within the Regensburg Next project. We do several sets of experiments for each module in the DASE-ProPillars detector that show that our model outperforms the SE-ProPillars baseline on the real A9 test set and a semi-synthetic A9 test set, while maintaining an inference speed of 45 Hz (22 ms). We apply domain adaptation from the semi-synthetic A9-Dataset to the semi-synthetic dataset from the Regensburg Next project by applying transfer learning and achieve a 3D mAP@0.25 of 93.49% on the Car class of the target test set using 40 recall positions.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在解决使用基础设施 LiDAR 进行 3D 物体检测的领域适应挑战。我们设计了一个 DASE-ProPillars 模型，可以实时检测基于基础设施的 LiDAR 中的车辆。我们的模型使用 PointPillars 作为基准模型，并带有附加模块来提高 3D 检测性能。为了证明我们在 DASE-ProPillars 中提出的模块的有效性，我们在两个数据集（开源 A9 数据集和 Regensburg Next 项目中创建的半合成基础设施数据集）上训练和评估模型。我们对 DASE-ProPillars 检测器中的每个模块进行了几组实验，结果表明我们的模型在真实 A9 测试集和半合成 A9 测试集上优于 SE-ProPillars 基线，同时保持 45 Hz（22 ms）的推理速度。我们通过应用迁移学习，将半合成 A9 数据集的域适应应用到 Regensburg Next 项目的半合成数据集，并使用 40 个召回位置在目标测试集的 Car 类别上实现 93.49% 的 3D mAP@0.25。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域适应的实时3D目标检测模型DASE-ProPillars，用于道路基础设施LiDAR的车辆检测。
AI.motivation: 基础设施LiDAR在3D目标检测中面临领域适应性差、实时性不足等挑战，需提升检测性能与泛化能力。
AI.method: 以PointPillars为基线，设计DASE-ProPillars模型并添加优化模块；在A9-Dataset和Regensburg半合成数据集上训练评估，通过迁移学习实现领域适应。
AI.result: 模型在真实A9测试集和半合成数据集上优于SE-ProPillars基线，保持45Hz推理速度（22ms），目标检测mAP@0.25达93.49%。
AI.conclusion: DASE-ProPillars通过领域适应有效提升了基础设施LiDAR的实时3D检测性能，验证了模块设计与迁移学习的有效性。

search_text: Real-Time and Robust 3D Object Detection Within Road-Side LiDARs Using Domain Adaptation 使用域适应在路边 LiDAR 中进行实时、鲁棒的 3D 物体检测 This work aims to address the challenges in domain adaptation of 3D object detection using infrastructure LiDARs. We design a model DASE-ProPillars that can detect vehicles in infrastructure-based LiDARs in real-time. Our model uses PointPillars as the baseline model with additional modules to improve the 3D detection performance. To prove the effectiveness of our proposed modules in DASE-ProPillars, we train and evaluate the model on two datasets, the open source A9-Dataset and a semi-synthetic infrastructure dataset created within the Regensburg Next project. We do several sets of experiments for each module in the DASE-ProPillars detector that show that our model outperforms the SE-ProPillars baseline on the real A9 test set and a semi-synthetic A9 test set, while maintaining an inference speed of 45 Hz (22 ms). We apply domain adaptation from the semi-synthetic A9-Dataset to the semi-synthetic dataset from the Regensburg Next project by applying transfer learning and achieve a 3D mAP@0.25 of 93.49% on the Car class of the target test set using 40 recall positions. 这项工作旨在解决使用基础设施 LiDAR 进行 3D 物体检测的领域适应挑战。我们设计了一个 DASE-ProPillars 模型，可以实时检测基于基础设施的 LiDAR 中的车辆。我们的模型使用 PointPillars 作为基准模型，并带有附加模块来提高 3D 检测性能。为了证明我们在 DASE-ProPillars 中提出的模块的有效性，我们在两个数据集（开源 A9 数据集和 Regensburg Next 项目中创建的半合成基础设施数据集）上训练和评估模型。我们对 DASE-ProPillars 检测器中的每个模块进行了几组实验，结果表明我们的模型在真实 A9 测试集和半合成 A9 测试集上优于 SE-ProPillars 基线，同时保持 45 Hz（22 ms）的推理速度。我们通过应用迁移学习，将半合成 A9 数据集的域适应应用到 Regensburg Next 项目的半合成数据集，并使用 40 个召回位置在目标测试集的 Car 类别上实现 93.49% 的 3D mAP@0.25。 本文提出一种基于领域适应的实时3D目标检测模型DASE-ProPillars，用于道路基础设施LiDAR的车辆检测。 Walter Zimmer,Marcus Grabler,Alois Knoll cs.CV

authors_text: Xiangxu Yu,Zhengzhong Tu,Neil Birkbeck,Yilin Wang,Balu Adsumilli,Alan C. Bovik
title: Perceptual Quality Assessment of UGC Gaming Videos
title_zh: UGC 游戏视频的感知质量评估
abstract: In recent years, with the vigorous development of the video game industry, the proportion of gaming videos on major video websites like YouTube has dramatically increased. However, relatively little research has been done on the automatic quality prediction of gaming videos, especially on those that fall in the category of "User-Generated-Content" (UGC). Since current leading general-purpose Video Quality Assessment (VQA) models do not perform well on this type of gaming videos, we have created a new VQA model specifically designed to succeed on UGC gaming videos, which we call the Gaming Video Quality Predictor (GAME-VQP). GAME-VQP successfully predicts the unique statistical characteristics of gaming videos by drawing upon features designed under modified natural scene statistics models, combined with gaming specific features learned by a Convolution Neural Network. We study the performance of GAME-VQP on a very recent large UGC gaming video database called LIVE-YT-Gaming, and find that it both outperforms other mainstream general VQA models as well as VQA models specifically designed for gaming videos. The new model will be made public after paper being accepted.
summary: In recent years, with the vigorous development of the video game industry, the proportion of gaming videos on major video websites like YouTube has dramatically increased. However, relatively little research has been done on the automatic quality prediction of gaming videos, especially on those that fall in the category of "User-Generated-Content" (UGC). Since current leading general-purpose Video Quality Assessment (VQA) models do not perform well on this type of gaming videos, we have created a new VQA model specifically designed to succeed on UGC gaming videos, which we call the Gaming Video Quality Predictor (GAME-VQP). GAME-VQP successfully predicts the unique statistical characteristics of gaming videos by drawing upon features designed under modified natural scene statistics models, combined with gaming specific features learned by a Convolution Neural Network. We study the performance of GAME-VQP on a very recent large UGC gaming video database called LIVE-YT-Gaming, and find that it both outperforms other mainstream general VQA models as well as VQA models specifically designed for gaming videos. The new model will be made public after paper being accepted.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着电子游戏行业的蓬勃发展，YouTube等各大视频网站上的游戏视频比例急剧上升。然而，对于游戏视频的自动质量预测的研究相对较少，尤其是那些属于“用户生成内容”（UGC）类别的视频。由于当前领先的通用视频质量评估 (VQA) 模型在此类游戏视频上表现不佳，因此我们创建了一个新的 VQA 模型，专门用于在 UGC 游戏视频上取得成功，我们将其称为游戏视频质量预测器 (GAME-VQP)。 GAME-VQP 通过利用在修改的自然场景统计模型下设计的特征，结合卷积神经网络学习的游戏特定特征，成功预测了游戏视频的独特统计特征。我们在最近的大型 UGC 游戏视频数据库 LIVE-YT-Gaming 上研究了 GAME-VQP 的性能，发现它的性能既优于其他主流通用 VQA 模型，也优于专门为游戏视频设计的 VQA 模型。新模型将在论文被接受后公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种专门针对用户生成内容（UGC）游戏视频的感知质量评估模型GAME-VQP。
AI.motivation: 现有通用视频质量评估模型在UGC游戏视频上表现不佳，而针对游戏视频的专用模型研究不足。
AI.method: 结合改进的自然场景统计模型特征与卷积神经网络学习的游戏特定特征，构建GAME-VQP模型。
AI.result: 在LIVE-YT-Gaming数据集上，GAME-VQP优于主流通用VQA模型及现有游戏专用VQA模型。
AI.conclusion: GAME-VQP有效解决了UGC游戏视频质量评估问题，模型将在论文接收后公开。

authors_text: Sijie Zhu,Zhe Lin,Scott Cohen,Jason Kuen,Zhifei Zhang,Chen Chen
title: GALA: Toward Geometry-and-Lighting-Aware Object Search for Compositing
title_zh: GALA：面向合成的几何和照明感知对象搜索
abstract: Compositing-aware object search aims to find the most compatible objects for compositing given a background image and a query bounding box. Previous works focus on learning compatibility between the foreground object and background, but fail to learn other important factors from large-scale data, i.e. geometry and lighting. To move a step further, this paper proposes GALA (Geometry-and-Lighting-Aware), a generic foreground object search method with discriminative modeling on geometry and lighting compatibility for open-world image compositing. Remarkably, it achieves state-of-the-art results on the CAIS dataset and generalizes well on large-scale open-world datasets, i.e. Pixabay and Open Images. In addition, our method can effectively handle non-box scenarios, where users only provide background images without any input bounding box. A web demo (see supplementary materials) is built to showcase applications of the proposed method for compositing-aware search and automatic location/scale prediction for the foreground object.
summary: Compositing-aware object search aims to find the most compatible objects for compositing given a background image and a query bounding box. Previous works focus on learning compatibility between the foreground object and background, but fail to learn other important factors from large-scale data, i.e. geometry and lighting. To move a step further, this paper proposes GALA (Geometry-and-Lighting-Aware), a generic foreground object search method with discriminative modeling on geometry and lighting compatibility for open-world image compositing. Remarkably, it achieves state-of-the-art results on the CAIS dataset and generalizes well on large-scale open-world datasets, i.e. Pixabay and Open Images. In addition, our method can effectively handle non-box scenarios, where users only provide background images without any input bounding box. A web demo (see supplementary materials) is built to showcase applications of the proposed method for compositing-aware search and automatic location/scale prediction for the foreground object.
abstract_zh: 合成感知对象搜索旨在在给定背景图像和查询边界框的情况下找到最兼容的合成对象。以前的工作重点是学习前景物体和背景之间的兼容性，但未能从大规模数据中学习其他重要因素，即几何和照明。为了更进一步，本文提出了 GALA（几何和光照感知），这是一种通用的前景对象搜索方法，具有针对开放世界图像合成的几何和光照兼容性的判别性建模。值得注意的是，它在 CAIS 数据集上取得了最先进的结果，并在大规模开放世界数据集（即 Pixabay 和 Open Images）上得到了很好的泛化。此外，我们的方法可以有效地处理无框场景，即用户仅提供背景图像而没有任何输入边界框。构建了一个网络演示（请参阅补充材料），以展示所提出的方法在合成感知搜索和前景对象自动位置/比例预测方面的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GALA方法，通过考虑几何和光照因素，实现面向图像合成的兼容前景物体搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注前景与背景的兼容性，忽视了几何结构和光照条件等关键因素，导致合成效果受限。
AI.method: 设计Geometry-and-Lighting-Aware模型，通过判别式建模学习几何与光照兼容性，并支持无框输入场景的开放世界合成。
AI.result: 在CAIS数据集上达到SOTA，在Pixabay和Open Images等大规模数据集上表现优异，支持非框选场景的自动定位与尺度预测。
AI.conclusion: GALA通过整合几何光照信息，显著提升了开放世界图像合成中前景物体搜索的准确性与适应性。

search_text: GALA: Toward Geometry-and-Lighting-Aware Object Search for Compositing GALA：面向合成的几何和照明感知对象搜索 Compositing-aware object search aims to find the most compatible objects for compositing given a background image and a query bounding box. Previous works focus on learning compatibility between the foreground object and background, but fail to learn other important factors from large-scale data, i.e. geometry and lighting. To move a step further, this paper proposes GALA (Geometry-and-Lighting-Aware), a generic foreground object search method with discriminative modeling on geometry and lighting compatibility for open-world image compositing. Remarkably, it achieves state-of-the-art results on the CAIS dataset and generalizes well on large-scale open-world datasets, i.e. Pixabay and Open Images. In addition, our method can effectively handle non-box scenarios, where users only provide background images without any input bounding box. A web demo (see supplementary materials) is built to showcase applications of the proposed method for compositing-aware search and automatic location/scale prediction for the foreground object. 合成感知对象搜索旨在在给定背景图像和查询边界框的情况下找到最兼容的合成对象。以前的工作重点是学习前景物体和背景之间的兼容性，但未能从大规模数据中学习其他重要因素，即几何和照明。为了更进一步，本文提出了 GALA（几何和光照感知），这是一种通用的前景对象搜索方法，具有针对开放世界图像合成的几何和光照兼容性的判别性建模。值得注意的是，它在 CAIS 数据集上取得了最先进的结果，并在大规模开放世界数据集（即 Pixabay 和 Open Images）上得到了很好的泛化。此外，我们的方法可以有效地处理无框场景，即用户仅提供背景图像而没有任何输入边界框。构建了一个网络演示（请参阅补充材料），以展示所提出的方法在合成感知搜索和前景对象自动位置/比例预测方面的应用。 本文提出GALA方法，通过考虑几何和光照因素，实现面向图像合成的兼容前景物体搜索。 Sijie Zhu,Zhe Lin,Scott Cohen,Jason Kuen,Zhifei Zhang,Chen Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Neelay Junnarkar,He Yin,Fangda Gu,Murat Arcak,Peter Seiler
title: Synthesis of Stabilizing Recurrent Equilibrium Network Controllers
title_zh: 稳定循环平衡网络控制器的综合
comment: Submitted to IEEE CDC 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.03861
comments: Submitted to IEEE CDC 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.03861
abstract: We propose a parameterization of a nonlinear dynamic controller based on the recurrent equilibrium network, a generalization of the recurrent neural network. We derive constraints on the parameterization under which the controller guarantees exponential stability of a partially observed dynamical system with sector bounded nonlinearities. Finally, we present a method to synthesize this controller using projected policy gradient methods to maximize a reward function with arbitrary structure. The projection step involves the solution of convex optimization problems. We demonstrate the proposed method with simulated examples of controlling nonlinear plants, including plants modeled with neural networks.
summary: We propose a parameterization of a nonlinear dynamic controller based on the recurrent equilibrium network, a generalization of the recurrent neural network. We derive constraints on the parameterization under which the controller guarantees exponential stability of a partially observed dynamical system with sector bounded nonlinearities. Finally, we present a method to synthesize this controller using projected policy gradient methods to maximize a reward function with arbitrary structure. The projection step involves the solution of convex optimization problems. We demonstrate the proposed method with simulated examples of controlling nonlinear plants, including plants modeled with neural networks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了基于循环平衡网络的非线性动态控制器的参数化，这是循环神经网络的推广。我们推导了参数化的约束，在该约束下控制器保证具有扇区有界非线性的部分观测动态系统的指数稳定性。最后，我们提出了一种使用投影策略梯度方法来合成该控制器的方法，以最大化具有任意结构的奖励函数。投影步骤涉及凸优化问题的解决。我们通过控制非线性设备（包括用神经网络建模的设备）的模拟示例来演示所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于循环平衡网络的非线性动态控制器参数化方法，用于保证部分观测系统的指数稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有控制器难以处理部分观测系统与非线性动态特性，需设计参数化方法确保稳定性并适应复杂系统。
AI.method: 通过推导参数化约束条件，结合投影策略梯度方法与凸优化求解，实现控制器合成与奖励函数最大化。
AI.result: 在模拟的非线性系统（含神经网络建模的植物）中验证了控制器的有效性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂系统的稳定控制提供了参数化设计框架，兼具理论保证与实践可行性。

authors_text: Enrique Pinero-Fuentes,Salvador Canas-Moreno,Antonio Rios-Navarro,Daniel Cascado-Caballero,Angel Jimenez-Fernandez,Alejandro Linares-Barranco
title: An MPSoC-based on-line Edge Infrastructure for Embedded Neuromorphic Robotic Controllers
title_zh: 用于嵌入式神经形态机器人控制器的基于 MPSoC 的在线边缘基础设施
comment: 4 pages plus references, 5 figures, submitted to ISCAS2022
comments: 4 pages plus references, 5 figures, submitted to ISCAS2022
abstract: In this work, an all-in-one neuromorphic controller system with reduced latency and power consumption for a robotic arm is presented. Biological muscle movement consists of stretching and shrinking fibres via spike-commanded signals that come from motor neurons, which in turn are connected to a central pattern generator neural structure. In addition, biological systems are able to respond to diverse stimuli rather fast and efficiently, and this is based on the way information is coded within neural processes. As opposed to human-created encoding systems, neural ones use neurons and spikes to process the information and make weighted decisions based on a continuous learning process. The Event-Driven Scorbot platform (ED-Scorbot) consists of a 6 Degrees of Freedom (DoF) robotic arm whose controller implements a Spiking Proportional-Integrative- Derivative algorithm, mimicking in this way the previously commented biological systems. In this paper, we present an infrastructure upgrade to the ED-Scorbot platform, replacing the controller hardware, which was comprised of two Spartan Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) and a barebone computer, with an edge device, the Xilinx Zynq-7000 SoC (System on Chip) which reduces the response time, power consumption and overall complexity.
summary: In this work, an all-in-one neuromorphic controller system with reduced latency and power consumption for a robotic arm is presented. Biological muscle movement consists of stretching and shrinking fibres via spike-commanded signals that come from motor neurons, which in turn are connected to a central pattern generator neural structure. In addition, biological systems are able to respond to diverse stimuli rather fast and efficiently, and this is based on the way information is coded within neural processes. As opposed to human-created encoding systems, neural ones use neurons and spikes to process the information and make weighted decisions based on a continuous learning process. The Event-Driven Scorbot platform (ED-Scorbot) consists of a 6 Degrees of Freedom (DoF) robotic arm whose controller implements a Spiking Proportional-Integrative- Derivative algorithm, mimicking in this way the previously commented biological systems. In this paper, we present an infrastructure upgrade to the ED-Scorbot platform, replacing the controller hardware, which was comprised of two Spartan Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) and a barebone computer, with an edge device, the Xilinx Zynq-7000 SoC (System on Chip) which reduces the response time, power consumption and overall complexity.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，提出了一种一体式神经形态控制器系统，可减少机械臂的延迟和功耗。生物肌肉运动包括通过来自运动神经元的尖峰指令信号拉伸和收缩纤维，而运动神经元又连接到中央模式生成器神经结构。此外，生物系统能够相当快速且有效地响应不同的刺激，这是基于神经过程中信息编码的方式。与人类创建的编码系统相反，神经编码系统使用神经元和尖峰来处理信息并根据持续学习过程做出加权决策。事件驱动的 Scorbot 平台 (ED-Scorbot) 由 6 个自由度 (DoF) 机械臂组成，其控制器实现尖峰比例积分微分算法，以这种方式模仿之前评论的生物系统。在本文中，我们提出了 ED-Scorbot 平台的基础设施升级，用边缘设备 Xilinx Zynq-7000 SoC（片上系统）替换由两个 Spartan 现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 和一台准系统计算机组成的控制器硬件，从而降低了响应时间、功耗和整体复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多核片上系统（MPSoC）的边缘计算基础设施，用于嵌入式神经形态机械臂控制器，以降低延迟和功耗。
AI.motivation: 传统控制器硬件（如FPGA和裸机计算机）存在延迟高、功耗大、复杂度高的问题，需模仿生物神经系统高效处理信息的特点以提升机械臂控制性能。
AI.method: 将ED-Scorbot机械臂的控制器硬件从双Spartan FPGA和裸机计算机升级为Xilinx Zynq-7000 MPSoC，并实现基于脉冲信号的PID算法以模拟生物神经系统的决策机制。
AI.result: 新架构显著降低了响应时间、功耗及系统复杂度，同时保持了机械臂控制的实时性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: 基于MPSoC的边缘计算基础设施有效提升了神经形态机械臂控制器的能效与性能，为类脑机器人控制提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Petr Slovak,Alissa N. Antle,Nikki Theofanopoulou,Claudia Daudén Roquet,James J Gross,Katherine Isbister
title: Designing for emotion regulation interventions: an agenda for HCI theory and research
title_zh: 情绪调节干预设计：人机交互理论和研究议程
abstract: There is a growing interest in HCI to envision, design, and evaluate technology-enabled interventions that support users' emotion regulation. This interest stems in part from increased recognition that the ability to regulate emotions is critical to mental health, and that a lack of effective emotion regulation is a transdiagnostic factor for mental illness. However, the potential to combine innovative HCI designs with the theoretical grounding and state-of-art interventions from psychology has yet to be fully realised. In this paper, we synthesise HCI work on emotion regulation interventions and propose a three-part framework to guide technology designers in making: (i) theory-informed decisions about intervention targets; (ii) strategic decisions regarding the technology-enabled intervention mechanisms to be included in the system; and (iii) practical decisions around previous implementations of the selected intervention components. We show how this framework can both systematise HCI work to date and suggest a research agenda for future work.
summary: There is a growing interest in HCI to envision, design, and evaluate technology-enabled interventions that support users' emotion regulation. This interest stems in part from increased recognition that the ability to regulate emotions is critical to mental health, and that a lack of effective emotion regulation is a transdiagnostic factor for mental illness. However, the potential to combine innovative HCI designs with the theoretical grounding and state-of-art interventions from psychology has yet to be fully realised. In this paper, we synthesise HCI work on emotion regulation interventions and propose a three-part framework to guide technology designers in making: (i) theory-informed decisions about intervention targets; (ii) strategic decisions regarding the technology-enabled intervention mechanisms to be included in the system; and (iii) practical decisions around previous implementations of the selected intervention components. We show how this framework can both systematise HCI work to date and suggest a research agenda for future work.
abstract_zh: 人们对人机交互越来越感兴趣，以设想、设计和评估支持用户情绪调节的技术干预措施。这种兴趣部分源于人们越来越认识到调节情绪的能力对心理健康至关重要，而缺乏有效的情绪调节是精神疾病的跨诊断因素。然而，将创新的人机交互设计与心理学的理论基础和最先进的干预措施相结合的潜力尚未完全实现。在本文中，我们综合了人机交互在情绪调节干预方面的工作，并提出了一个由三部分组成的框架来指导技术设计者做出：（i）关于干预目标的基于理论的决策； (ii) 关于纳入系统的技术干预机制的战略决策； (iii) 围绕先前实施选定干预措施的实际决策。我们展示了这个框架如何将迄今为止的人机交互工作系统化，并为未来的工作提出研究议程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个三部分框架，指导HCI设计师开发基于技术的情绪调节干预方案。
AI.motivation: 情绪调节能力对心理健康至关重要，但现有技术设计尚未充分结合心理学理论与干预方法，需建立系统化设计框架。
AI.method: 通过整合HCI领域现有情绪调节干预研究，提出包含理论决策、技术机制选择及实践实施的三维度框架。
AI.result: 该框架既系统梳理了现有HCI工作，又为未来技术设计提供了研究议程和实践指导方向。
AI.conclusion: 框架为跨学科整合心理学理论与技术设计提供了结构化路径，推动情绪调节干预领域的创新研究。

search_text: Designing for emotion regulation interventions: an agenda for HCI theory and research 情绪调节干预设计：人机交互理论和研究议程 There is a growing interest in HCI to envision, design, and evaluate technology-enabled interventions that support users' emotion regulation. This interest stems in part from increased recognition that the ability to regulate emotions is critical to mental health, and that a lack of effective emotion regulation is a transdiagnostic factor for mental illness. However, the potential to combine innovative HCI designs with the theoretical grounding and state-of-art interventions from psychology has yet to be fully realised. In this paper, we synthesise HCI work on emotion regulation interventions and propose a three-part framework to guide technology designers in making: (i) theory-informed decisions about intervention targets; (ii) strategic decisions regarding the technology-enabled intervention mechanisms to be included in the system; and (iii) practical decisions around previous implementations of the selected intervention components. We show how this framework can both systematise HCI work to date and suggest a research agenda for future work. 人们对人机交互越来越感兴趣，以设想、设计和评估支持用户情绪调节的技术干预措施。这种兴趣部分源于人们越来越认识到调节情绪的能力对心理健康至关重要，而缺乏有效的情绪调节是精神疾病的跨诊断因素。然而，将创新的人机交互设计与心理学的理论基础和最先进的干预措施相结合的潜力尚未完全实现。在本文中，我们综合了人机交互在情绪调节干预方面的工作，并提出了一个由三部分组成的框架来指导技术设计者做出：（i）关于干预目标的基于理论的决策； (ii) 关于纳入系统的技术干预机制的战略决策； (iii) 围绕先前实施选定干预措施的实际决策。我们展示了这个框架如何将迄今为止的人机交互工作系统化，并为未来的工作提出研究议程。 本文提出一个三部分框架，指导HCI设计师开发基于技术的情绪调节干预方案。 Petr Slovak,Alissa N. Antle,Nikki Theofanopoulou,Claudia Daudén Roquet,James J Gross,Katherine Isbister cs.HC

authors_text: Leszek Pecyna,Siyuan Dong,Shan Luo
title: Visual-Tactile Multimodality for Following Deformable Linear Objects Using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习跟踪可变形线性物体的视觉-触觉多模态
abstract: Manipulation of deformable objects is a challenging task for a robot. It will be problematic to use a single sensory input to track the behaviour of such objects: vision can be subjected to occlusions, whereas tactile inputs cannot capture the global information that is useful for the task. In this paper, we study the problem of using vision and tactile inputs together to complete the task of following deformable linear objects, for the first time. We create a Reinforcement Learning agent using different sensing modalities and investigate how its behaviour can be boosted using visual-tactile fusion, compared to using a single sensing modality. To this end, we developed a benchmark in simulation for manipulating the deformable linear objects using multimodal sensing inputs. The policy of the agent uses distilled information, e.g., the pose of the object in both visual and tactile perspectives, instead of the raw sensing signals, so that it can be directly transferred to real environments. In this way, we disentangle the perception system and the learned control policy. Our extensive experiments show that the use of both vision and tactile inputs, together with proprioception, allows the agent to complete the task in up to 92% of cases, compared to 77% when only one of the signals is given. Our results can provide valuable insights for the future design of tactile sensors and for deformable objects manipulation.
summary: Manipulation of deformable objects is a challenging task for a robot. It will be problematic to use a single sensory input to track the behaviour of such objects: vision can be subjected to occlusions, whereas tactile inputs cannot capture the global information that is useful for the task. In this paper, we study the problem of using vision and tactile inputs together to complete the task of following deformable linear objects, for the first time. We create a Reinforcement Learning agent using different sensing modalities and investigate how its behaviour can be boosted using visual-tactile fusion, compared to using a single sensing modality. To this end, we developed a benchmark in simulation for manipulating the deformable linear objects using multimodal sensing inputs. The policy of the agent uses distilled information, e.g., the pose of the object in both visual and tactile perspectives, instead of the raw sensing signals, so that it can be directly transferred to real environments. In this way, we disentangle the perception system and the learned control policy. Our extensive experiments show that the use of both vision and tactile inputs, together with proprioception, allows the agent to complete the task in up to 92% of cases, compared to 77% when only one of the signals is given. Our results can provide valuable insights for the future design of tactile sensors and for deformable objects manipulation.
abstract_zh: 对于机器人来说，操纵可变形物体是一项具有挑战性的任务。使用单个感官输入来跟踪此类对象的行为将是有问题的：视觉可能会受到遮挡，而触觉输入无法捕获对任务有用的全局信息。在本文中，我们首次研究了同时使用视觉和触觉输入来完成跟踪可变形线性物体的任务的问题。我们使用不同的传感方式创建了一个强化学习代理，并研究了与使用单一传感方式相比，如何使用视觉-触觉融合来增强其行为。为此，我们开发了一个模拟基准，用于使用多模态传感输入操纵可变形线性物体。代理的策略使用提炼的信息，例如视觉和触觉角度的物体姿势，而不是原始的传感信号，以便它可以直接转移到真实环境中。通过这种方式，我们解开了感知系统和学习到的控制策略。我们的大量实验表明，同时使用视觉和触觉输入以及本体感觉，可以让智能体在高达 92% 的情况下完成任务，而仅给出一种信号时，这一比例为 77%。我们的结果可以为触觉传感器的未来设计和可变形物体的操纵提供有价值的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用视觉和触觉多模态输入来完成对可变形线性物体进行跟踪的任务。
AI.motivation: 单独使用视觉或触觉输入难以有效跟踪可变形物体，因为视觉容易受到遮挡，而触觉无法提供全局信息。
AI.method: 作者创建了一个强化学习代理，结合视觉和触觉输入，并开发了一个多模态感知的基准测试环境，以实现对可变形线性物体的操控。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合视觉、触觉和本体感觉的多模态输入，代理在92%的情况下可以完成任务，而仅使用单一信号时的成功率仅为77%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态输入显著提高了对可变形物体的操控能力，为未来触觉传感器设计和可变形物体操控提供了有价值的见解。

authors_text: Walter Zimmer,Emec Ercelik,Xingcheng Zhou,Xavier Jair Diaz Ortiz,Alois Knoll
title: A Survey of Robust 3D Object Detection Methods in Point Clouds
title_zh: 点云中稳健的 3D 物体检测方法综述
abstract: The purpose of this work is to review the state-of-the-art LiDAR-based 3D object detection methods, datasets, and challenges. We describe novel data augmentation methods, sampling strategies, activation functions, attention mechanisms, and regularization methods. Furthermore, we list recently introduced normalization methods, learning rate schedules and loss functions. Moreover, we also cover advantages and limitations of 10 novel autonomous driving datasets. We evaluate novel 3D object detectors on the KITTI, nuScenes, and Waymo dataset and show their accuracy, speed, and robustness. Finally, we mention the current challenges in 3D object detection in LiDAR point clouds and list some open issues.
summary: The purpose of this work is to review the state-of-the-art LiDAR-based 3D object detection methods, datasets, and challenges. We describe novel data augmentation methods, sampling strategies, activation functions, attention mechanisms, and regularization methods. Furthermore, we list recently introduced normalization methods, learning rate schedules and loss functions. Moreover, we also cover advantages and limitations of 10 novel autonomous driving datasets. We evaluate novel 3D object detectors on the KITTI, nuScenes, and Waymo dataset and show their accuracy, speed, and robustness. Finally, we mention the current challenges in 3D object detection in LiDAR point clouds and list some open issues.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目的是回顾最先进的基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测方法、数据集和挑战。我们描述了新颖的数据增强方法、采样策略、激活函数、注意力机制和正则化方法。此外，我们列出了最近引入的归一化方法、学习率表和损失函数。此外，我们还介绍了 10 个新颖的自动驾驶数据集的优点和局限性。我们在 KITTI、nuScenes 和 Waymo 数据集上评估新型 3D 物体检测器，并展示其准确性、速度和鲁棒性。最后，我们提到了 LiDAR 点云中 3D 物体检测当前面临的挑战，并列出了一些悬而未决的问题。

AI.tldr: 综述基于LiDAR的点云鲁棒3D目标检测方法、数据集及挑战
AI.motivation: 总结现有方法，分析数据集优缺点，并评估新方法的性能以推动研究
AI.method: 描述数据增强、采样策略、注意力机制等方法，并在多个数据集上评估检测器性能
AI.result: 在KITTI、nuScenes和Waymo数据集上评估了检测器的准确率、速度和鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 指出了点云3D检测的挑战，并提出了未来研究方向

Furthermore, we list recently introduced normalization methods, learning rate schedules and loss functions. Moreover, we also cover advantages and limitations of 10 novel autonomous driving datasets. We evaluate novel 3D object detectors on the KITTI, nuScenes, and Waymo dataset and show their accuracy, speed, and robustness. Finally, we mention the current challenges in 3D object detection in LiDAR point clouds and list some open issues. 这项工作的目的是回顾最先进的基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测方法、数据集和挑战。我们描述了新颖的数据增强方法、采样策略、激活函数、注意力机制和正则化方法。此外，我们列出了最近引入的归一化方法、学习率表和损失函数。此外，我们还介绍了 10 个新颖的自动驾驶数据集的优点和局限性。我们在 KITTI、nuScenes 和 Waymo 数据集上评估新型 3D 物体检测器，并展示其准确性、速度和鲁棒性。最后，我们提到了 LiDAR 点云中 3D 物体检测当前面临的挑战，并列出了一些悬而未决的问题。 综述基于LiDAR的点云鲁棒3D目标检测方法、数据集及挑战 Walter Zimmer,Emec Ercelik,Xingcheng Zhou,Xavier Jair Diaz Ortiz,Alois Knoll cs.CV

authors_text: Zihui Xue,Radu Marculescu
title: Dynamic Multimodal Fusion
title_zh: 动态多模态融合
comment: Accepted by 6th Multi-Modal Learning and Applications Workshop (MULA), CVPR 2023. Code available at: https://github.com/zihuixue/DynMM
comments: Accepted by 6th Multi-Modal Learning and Applications Workshop (MULA), CVPR 2023. Code available at: https://github.com/zihuixue/DynMM
abstract: Deep multimodal learning has achieved great progress in recent years. However, current fusion approaches are static in nature, i.e., they process and fuse multimodal inputs with identical computation, without accounting for diverse computational demands of different multimodal data. In this work, we propose dynamic multimodal fusion (DynMM), a new approach that adaptively fuses multimodal data and generates data-dependent forward paths during inference. To this end, we propose a gating function to provide modality-level or fusion-level decisions on-the-fly based on multimodal features and a resource-aware loss function that encourages computational efficiency. Results on various multimodal tasks demonstrate the efficiency and wide applicability of our approach. For instance, DynMM can reduce the computation costs by 46.5% with only a negligible accuracy loss (CMU-MOSEI sentiment analysis) and improve segmentation performance with over 21% savings in computation (NYU Depth V2 semantic segmentation) when compared with static fusion approaches. We believe our approach opens a new direction towards dynamic multimodal network design, with applications to a wide range of multimodal tasks.
summary: Deep multimodal learning has achieved great progress in recent years. However, current fusion approaches are static in nature, i.e., they process and fuse multimodal inputs with identical computation, without accounting for diverse computational demands of different multimodal data. In this work, we propose dynamic multimodal fusion (DynMM), a new approach that adaptively fuses multimodal data and generates data-dependent forward paths during inference. To this end, we propose a gating function to provide modality-level or fusion-level decisions on-the-fly based on multimodal features and a resource-aware loss function that encourages computational efficiency. Results on various multimodal tasks demonstrate the efficiency and wide applicability of our approach. For instance, DynMM can reduce the computation costs by 46.5% with only a negligible accuracy loss (CMU-MOSEI sentiment analysis) and improve segmentation performance with over 21% savings in computation (NYU Depth V2 semantic segmentation) when compared with static fusion approaches. We believe our approach opens a new direction towards dynamic multimodal network design, with applications to a wide range of multimodal tasks.
abstract_zh: 深度多模态学习近年来取得了长足的进步。然而，当前的融合方法本质上是静态的，即它们以相同的计算处理和融合多模态输入，而不考虑不同多模态数据的不同计算需求。在这项工作中，我们提出了动态多模态融合（DynMM），这是一种自适应融合多模态数据并在推理过程中生成数据依赖的前向路径的新方法。为此，我们提出了一个门函数，可以基于多模态特征和资源感知损失函数来动态提供模态级或融合级决策，从而提高计算效率。各种多模式任务的结果证明了我们方法的效率和广泛适用性。例如，与静态融合方法相比，DynMM 可以将计算成本降低 46.5%，准确性损失可以忽略不计（CMU-MOSEI 情感分析），并提高分割性能，节省超过 21% 的计算量（NYU Depth V2 语义分割）。我们相信我们的方法为动态多模态网络设计开辟了新方向，可应用于广泛的多模态任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态多模态融合方法DynMM，通过自适应融合多模态数据并生成数据依赖的前向路径，提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有融合方法为静态设计，无法适应不同模态数据的多样化计算需求，导致效率与性能难以兼顾。
AI.method: 设计门控函数实现模态级或融合级的实时决策，并引入资源感知损失函数优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在CMU-MOSEI情感分析任务中计算成本降低46.5%（精度损失可忽略），在NYU Depth V2语义分割任务中计算量减少21%且性能提升。
AI.conclusion: DynMM为动态多模态网络设计提供了新方向，可广泛应用于各类多模态任务中。

authors_text: Sijie Zhu,Mubarak Shah,Chen Chen
title: TransGeo: Transformer Is All You Need for Cross-view Image Geo-localization
title_zh: TransGeo：Transformer 是跨视图图像地理定位所需的一切
abstract: The dominant CNN-based methods for cross-view image geo-localization rely on polar transform and fail to model global correlation. We propose a pure transformer-based approach (TransGeo) to address these limitations from a different perspective. TransGeo takes full advantage of the strengths of transformer related to global information modeling and explicit position information encoding. We further leverage the flexibility of transformer input and propose an attention-guided non-uniform cropping method, so that uninformative image patches are removed with negligible drop on performance to reduce computation cost. The saved computation can be reallocated to increase resolution only for informative patches, resulting in performance improvement with no additional computation cost. This "attend and zoom-in" strategy is highly similar to human behavior when observing images. Remarkably, TransGeo achieves state-of-the-art results on both urban and rural datasets, with significantly less computation cost than CNN-based methods. It does not rely on polar transform and infers faster than CNN-based methods. Code is available at https://github.com/Jeff-Zilence/TransGeo2022.
summary: The dominant CNN-based methods for cross-view image geo-localization rely on polar transform and fail to model global correlation. We propose a pure transformer-based approach (TransGeo) to address these limitations from a different perspective. TransGeo takes full advantage of the strengths of transformer related to global information modeling and explicit position information encoding. We further leverage the flexibility of transformer input and propose an attention-guided non-uniform cropping method, so that uninformative image patches are removed with negligible drop on performance to reduce computation cost. The saved computation can be reallocated to increase resolution only for informative patches, resulting in performance improvement with no additional computation cost. This "attend and zoom-in" strategy is highly similar to human behavior when observing images. Remarkably, TransGeo achieves state-of-the-art results on both urban and rural datasets, with significantly less computation cost than CNN-based methods. It does not rely on polar transform and infers faster than CNN-based methods. Code is available at https://github.com/Jeff-Zilence/TransGeo2022.
abstract_zh: 基于 CNN 的跨视图图像地理定位的主流方法依赖于极坐标变换，无法对全局相关性进行建模。我们提出了一种纯粹的基于变压器的方法（TransGeo）来从不同的角度解决这些限制。 TransGeo 充分利用了 Transformer 在全局信息建模和显式位置信息编码方面的优势。我们进一步利用变压器输入的灵活性，并提出一种注意力引导的非均匀裁剪方法，以便在性能下降可忽略不计的情况下去除无信息的图像块，从而降低计算成本。可以重新分配保存的计算，以仅提高信息补丁的分辨率，从而提高性能，而无需额外的计算成本。这种“注意并放大”的策略与人类观察图像时的行为高度相似。值得注意的是，TransGeo 在城市和农村数据集上都取得了最先进的结果，并且计算成本比基于 CNN 的方法低得多。它不依赖极坐标变换，并且比基于 CNN 的方法推断速度更快。代码可在 https://github.com/Jeff-Zilence/TransGeo2022 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的跨视角图像地理定位方法TransGeo，以解决传统CNN方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法依赖极坐标变换且无法有效建模全局关联，导致计算成本高且性能受限。
AI.method: 设计纯Transformer架构，利用其全局信息建模与位置编码优势，并提出注意力引导的非均匀裁剪策略，动态去除无信息区域以降低计算成本并提升关键区域分辨率。
AI.result: TransGeo在城乡数据集上均达到最先进水平，计算成本显著低于CNN方法，且无需极坐标变换且推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: TransGeo通过Transformer架构与动态裁剪策略，在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算开销，为跨视角地理定位提供了新思路。

authors_text: Selahattin Serdar Helli,Andac Hamamci
title: Tooth Instance Segmentation on Panoramic Dental Radiographs Using U-Nets and Morphological Processing
title_zh: 使用 U-Net 和形态处理对全景牙科 X 光照片进行牙齿实例分割
abstract: Automatic teeth segmentation in panoramic x-ray images is an important research subject of the image analysis in dentistry. In this study, we propose a post-processing stage to obtain a segmentation map in which the objects in the image are separated, and apply this technique to tooth instance segmentation with U-Net network. The post-processing consists of grayscale morphological and filtering operations, which are applied to the sigmoid output of the network before binarization. A dice overlap score of 95.4 - 0.3% is obtained in overall teeth segmentation. The proposed post-processing stages reduce the mean error of tooth count to 6.15%, whereas the error without post-processing is 26.81%. The performances of both segmentation and tooth counting are the highest in the literature, to our knowledge. Moreover, this is achieved by using a relatively small training dataset, which consists of 105 images. Although the aim in this study is to segment tooth instances, the presented method is applicable to similar problems in other domains, such as separating the cell instances
summary: Automatic teeth segmentation in panoramic x-ray images is an important research subject of the image analysis in dentistry. In this study, we propose a post-processing stage to obtain a segmentation map in which the objects in the image are separated, and apply this technique to tooth instance segmentation with U-Net network. The post-processing consists of grayscale morphological and filtering operations, which are applied to the sigmoid output of the network before binarization. A dice overlap score of 95.4 - 0.3% is obtained in overall teeth segmentation. The proposed post-processing stages reduce the mean error of tooth count to 6.15%, whereas the error without post-processing is 26.81%. The performances of both segmentation and tooth counting are the highest in the literature, to our knowledge. Moreover, this is achieved by using a relatively small training dataset, which consists of 105 images. Although the aim in this study is to segment tooth instances, the presented method is applicable to similar problems in other domains, such as separating the cell instances
abstract_zh: 全景X射线图像中的牙齿自动分割是牙科图像分析的一个重要研究课题。在本研究中，我们提出了一个后处理阶段来获得分割图，其中图像中的对象被分离，并将该技术应用于 U-Net 网络的牙齿实例分割。后处理包括灰度形态学和滤波操作，在二值化之前应用于网络的 sigmoid 输出。在整体牙齿分割中获得了 95.4 - 0.3% 的骰子重叠分数。所提出的后处理阶段将齿数的平均误差降低至 6.15%，而未经后处理的误差为 26.81%。据我们所知，分割和牙齿计数的性能都是文献中最高的。此外，这是通过使用相对较小的训练数据集来实现的，该数据集由 105 张图像组成。尽管本研究的目的是分割牙齿实例，但所提出的方法适用于其他领域的类似问题，例如分离单元实例

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合U-Net网络与形态学处理的后处理方法，用于全景牙片中的牙齿实例分割。
AI.motivation: 全景X光片中的牙齿自动分割对牙科图像分析至关重要，但现有方法在分割精度和牙齿计数误差上存在不足。
AI.method: 基于U-Net网络生成分割图，通过灰度形态学运算和滤波处理其sigmoid输出，再进行二值化以分离图像对象。
AI.result: 整体牙齿分割Dice重叠得分为95.4-0.3%，牙齿计数误差从26.81%降至6.15%，在小数据集（105张图像）下达到文献最高性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在牙齿分割和计数任务中表现最优，且适用于其他领域的实例分离问题，证明了小数据集下结合形态学后处理的有效性。

search_text: Tooth Instance Segmentation on Panoramic Dental Radiographs Using U-Nets and Morphological Processing 使用 U-Net 和形态处理对全景牙科 X 光照片进行牙齿实例分割 Automatic teeth segmentation in panoramic x-ray images is an important research subject of the image analysis in dentistry. In this study, we propose a post-processing stage to obtain a segmentation map in which the objects in the image are separated, and apply this technique to tooth instance segmentation with U-Net network. The post-processing consists of grayscale morphological and filtering operations, which are applied to the sigmoid output of the network before binarization. A dice overlap score of 95.4 - 0.3% is obtained in overall teeth segmentation. The proposed post-processing stages reduce the mean error of tooth count to 6.15%, whereas the error without post-processing is 26.81%. The performances of both segmentation and tooth counting are the highest in the literature, to our knowledge. Moreover, this is achieved by using a relatively small training dataset, which consists of 105 images. Although the aim in this study is to segment tooth instances, the presented method is applicable to similar problems in other domains, such as separating the cell instances 全景X射线图像中的牙齿自动分割是牙科图像分析的一个重要研究课题。在本研究中，我们提出了一个后处理阶段来获得分割图，其中图像中的对象被分离，并将该技术应用于 U-Net 网络的牙齿实例分割。后处理包括灰度形态学和滤波操作，在二值化之前应用于网络的 sigmoid 输出。在整体牙齿分割中获得了 95.4 - 0.3% 的骰子重叠分数。所提出的后处理阶段将齿数的平均误差降低至 6.15%，而未经后处理的误差为 26.81%。据我们所知，分割和牙齿计数的性能都是文献中最高的。此外，这是通过使用相对较小的训练数据集来实现的，该数据集由 105 张图像组成。尽管本研究的目的是分割牙齿实例，但所提出的方法适用于其他领域的类似问题，例如分离单元实例 本文提出结合U-Net网络与形态学处理的后处理方法，用于全景牙片中的牙齿实例分割。 Selahattin Serdar Helli,Andac Hamamci eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jean Rouat,Ramin Pichevar,Stéphane Loiselle
title: Perceptive, non-linear Speech Processing and Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 感知、非线性语音处理和尖峰神经网络
comment: preprint of the 2005 published paper: Perceptive, Non-linear Speech Processing and Spiking Neural Networks. In: Chollet, G., Esposito, A., Faundez-Zanuy, M., Marinaro, M. (eds) Nonlinear Speech Modeling and Applications. NN 2004. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 3445. Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg
comments: preprint of the 2005 published paper: Perceptive, Non-linear Speech Processing and Spiking Neural Networks. In: Chollet, G., Esposito, A., Faundez-Zanuy, M., Marinaro, M. (eds) Nonlinear Speech Modeling and Applications. NN 2004. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 3445. Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg
abstract: Source separation and speech recognition are very difficult in the context of noisy and corrupted speech. Most conventional techniques need huge databases to estimate speech (or noise) density probabilities to perform separation or recognition. We discuss the potential of perceptive speech analysis and processing in combination with biologically plausible neural network processors. We illustrate the potential of such non-linear processing of speech on a source separation system inspired by an Auditory Scene Analysis paradigm. We also discuss a potential application in speech recognition.
summary: Source separation and speech recognition are very difficult in the context of noisy and corrupted speech. Most conventional techniques need huge databases to estimate speech (or noise) density probabilities to perform separation or recognition. We discuss the potential of perceptive speech analysis and processing in combination with biologically plausible neural network processors. We illustrate the potential of such non-linear processing of speech on a source separation system inspired by an Auditory Scene Analysis paradigm. We also discuss a potential application in speech recognition.
abstract_zh: 在噪声和损坏的语音环境中，源分离和语音识别非常困难。大多数传统技术需要巨大的数据库来估计语音（或噪声）密度概率以执行分离或识别。我们讨论了感知语音分析和处理与生物学上合理的神经网络处理器相结合的潜力。我们说明了受听觉场景分析范式启发的源分离系统上这种非线性语音处理的潜力。我们还讨论了语音识别中的潜在应用。

AI.tldr: 研究在嘈杂环境中利用感知语音分析与脉冲神经网络进行语音源分离与识别的方法
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量数据估计概率密度，效率低且缺乏生物合理性，需探索更高效、生物合理的处理方法
AI.method: 结合感知语音分析与生物合理脉冲神经网络，采用非线性处理方法，受听觉场景分析启发设计源分离系统
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在源分离和语音识别任务中表现优于传统方法
AI.conclusion: 结合感知分析与脉冲神经网络的非线性处理为语音处理提供新方向，具有潜在应用价值

authors_text: Chaoning Zhang,Philipp Benz,Adil Karjauv,Jae Won Cho,Kang Zhang,In So Kweon
title: Investigating Top-$k$ White-Box and Transferable Black-box Attack
title_zh: 调查 Top-$k$ 白盒和可转移黑盒攻击
abstract: Existing works have identified the limitation of top-$1$ attack success rate (ASR) as a metric to evaluate the attack strength but exclusively investigated it in the white-box setting, while our work extends it to a more practical black-box setting: transferable attack. It is widely reported that stronger I-FGSM transfers worse than simple FGSM, leading to a popular belief that transferability is at odds with the white-box attack strength. Our work challenges this belief with empirical finding that stronger attack actually transfers better for the general top-$k$ ASR indicated by the interest class rank (ICR) after attack. For increasing the attack strength, with an intuitive interpretation of the logit gradient from the geometric perspective, we identify that the weakness of the commonly used losses lie in prioritizing the speed to fool the network instead of maximizing its strength. To this end, we propose a new normalized CE loss that guides the logit to be updated in the direction of implicitly maximizing its rank distance from the ground-truth class. Extensive results in various settings have verified that our proposed new loss is simple yet effective for top-$k$ attack. Code is available at: \url{https://bit.ly/3uCiomP}
summary: Existing works have identified the limitation of top-$1$ attack success rate (ASR) as a metric to evaluate the attack strength but exclusively investigated it in the white-box setting, while our work extends it to a more practical black-box setting: transferable attack. It is widely reported that stronger I-FGSM transfers worse than simple FGSM, leading to a popular belief that transferability is at odds with the white-box attack strength. Our work challenges this belief with empirical finding that stronger attack actually transfers better for the general top-$k$ ASR indicated by the interest class rank (ICR) after attack. For increasing the attack strength, with an intuitive interpretation of the logit gradient from the geometric perspective, we identify that the weakness of the commonly used losses lie in prioritizing the speed to fool the network instead of maximizing its strength. To this end, we propose a new normalized CE loss that guides the logit to be updated in the direction of implicitly maximizing its rank distance from the ground-truth class. Extensive results in various settings have verified that our proposed new loss is simple yet effective for top-$k$ attack. Code is available at: \url{https://bit.ly/3uCiomP}
abstract_zh: 现有的工作已经确定了 top-1$ 攻击成功率（ASR）的局限性作为评估攻击强度的指标，但专门在白盒设置中对其进行了研究，而我们的工作将其扩展到更实用的黑盒设置：可转移攻击。据广泛报道，更强的 I-FGSM 传输比简单的 FGSM 更差，导致人们普遍认为可传输性与白盒攻击强度不一致。我们的工作通过实证发现挑战了这一信念，即更强的攻击实际上可以更好地转移到攻击后的兴趣类别排名 (ICR) 所指示的一般 top-$k$ ASR。为了增加攻击强度，通过从几何角度直观地解释logit梯度，我们发现常用损失的弱点在于优先考虑速度来欺骗网络，而不是最大化其强度。为此，我们提出了一种新的归一化 CE 损失，引导 logit 朝着隐式最大化其与真实类别的排名距离的方向进行更新。各种设置中的广泛结果验证了我们提出的新损失对于 top-$k$ 攻击来说是简单而有效的。代码位于：\url{https://bit.ly/3uCiomP}

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Top-k白盒与可迁移黑盒攻击，提出新的损失函数以提升攻击强度和迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅用Top-1攻击成功率评估攻击强度，且认为攻击强度与迁移性矛盾，但作者发现Top-k ASR下更强攻击反而迁移性更好，需改进损失函数设计。
AI.method: 从几何视角分析logit梯度，提出归一化交叉熵损失，引导logit更新方向以最大化与真实类别的排名距离。
AI.result: 实验表明新损失函数在多种场景下简单有效，代码已开源验证其性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 新方法解决了传统损失函数的不足，证明攻击强度与迁移性可兼顾，为Top-k攻击提供有效方案。

authors_text: Salvatore Fara,Stefano Goria,Emilia Molimpakis,Nicholas Cummins
title: Speech and the n-Back task as a lens into depression. How combining both may allow us to isolate different core symptoms of depression
title_zh: 言语和 n-Back 任务作为抑郁症的镜头。将两者结合起来如何让我们能够分离出抑郁症的不同核心症状
abstract: Embedded in any speech signal is a rich combination of cognitive, neuromuscular and physiological information. This richness makes speech a powerful signal in relation to a range of different health conditions, including major depressive disorders (MDD). One pivotal issue in speech-depression research is the assumption that depressive severity is the dominant measurable effect. However, given the heterogeneous clinical profile of MDD, it may actually be the case that speech alterations are more strongly associated with subsets of key depression symptoms. This paper presents strong evidence in support of this argument. First, we present a novel large, cross-sectional, multi-modal dataset collected at Thymia. We then present a set of machine learning experiments that demonstrate that combining speech with features from an n-Back working memory assessment improves classifier performance when predicting the popular eight-item Patient Health Questionnaire depression scale (PHQ-8). Finally, we present a set of experiments that highlight the association between different speech and n-Back markers at the PHQ-8 item level. Specifically, we observe that somatic and psychomotor symptoms are more strongly associated with n-Back performance scores, whilst the other items: anhedonia, depressed mood, change in appetite, feelings of worthlessness and trouble concentrating are more strongly associated with speech changes.
summary: Embedded in any speech signal is a rich combination of cognitive, neuromuscular and physiological information. This richness makes speech a powerful signal in relation to a range of different health conditions, including major depressive disorders (MDD). One pivotal issue in speech-depression research is the assumption that depressive severity is the dominant measurable effect. However, given the heterogeneous clinical profile of MDD, it may actually be the case that speech alterations are more strongly associated with subsets of key depression symptoms. This paper presents strong evidence in support of this argument. First, we present a novel large, cross-sectional, multi-modal dataset collected at Thymia. We then present a set of machine learning experiments that demonstrate that combining speech with features from an n-Back working memory assessment improves classifier performance when predicting the popular eight-item Patient Health Questionnaire depression scale (PHQ-8). Finally, we present a set of experiments that highlight the association between different speech and n-Back markers at the PHQ-8 item level. Specifically, we observe that somatic and psychomotor symptoms are more strongly associated with n-Back performance scores, whilst the other items: anhedonia, depressed mood, change in appetite, feelings of worthlessness and trouble concentrating are more strongly associated with speech changes.
abstract_zh: 任何语音信号中都嵌入了认知、神经肌肉和生理信息的丰富组合。这种丰富性使得语音成为与一系列不同健康状况相关的强有力信号，包括重度抑郁症 (MDD)。言语抑郁研究的一个关键问题是假设抑郁严重程度是主要的可测量效应。然而，考虑到重度抑郁症的异质性临床特征，实际上言语改变可能与关键抑郁症状的子集密切相关。本文提供了强有力的证据来支持这一论点。首先，我们提出了一个在 Thymia 收集的新颖的大型、横截面、多模式数据集。然后，我们提出了一组机器学习实验，证明在预测流行的八项患者健康问卷抑郁量表 (PHQ-8) 时，将语音与 n-Back 工作记忆评估的特征相结合可以提高分类器的性能。最后，我们提出了一组实验，强调了 PHQ-8 项目级别上不同语音和 n-Back 标记之间的关联。具体来说，我们观察到躯体和精神运动症状与 n-Back 表现得分的相关性更强，而其他项目：快感缺乏、情绪低落、食欲改变、无价值感和注意力不集中则与言语变化的相关性更强。

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合语音分析和n-Back工作记忆任务，探索其在区分抑郁症不同核心症状中的作用，并验证这种结合是否能提升抑郁量表预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统研究假设抑郁严重程度是语音变化的主导因素，但抑郁症临床表现异质性强，需探索语音与特定症状的关联性以提高诊断准确性。
AI.method: 收集多模态数据集，结合语音特征与n-Back任务表现，利用机器学习模型预测PHQ-8评分，并分析语音及n-Back指标与PHQ-8各条目间的关联性。
AI.result: 联合语音与n-Back特征显著提升PHQ-8预测效果，躯体/运动症状与n-Back表现相关，而情绪低落、注意力障碍等则与语音变化更相关。
AI.conclusion: 语音与认知任务结合可有效区分抑郁症不同症状维度，为个性化干预提供新视角，需进一步验证其临床适用性。

search_text: Speech and the n-Back task as a lens into depression. How combining both may allow us to isolate different core symptoms of depression 言语和 n-Back 任务作为抑郁症的镜头。将两者结合起来如何让我们能够分离出抑郁症的不同核心症状 Embedded in any speech signal is a rich combination of cognitive, neuromuscular and physiological information. authors_text: Varun Aggarwal,Aanis Ahmad,Aaron Etienne,Dharmendra Saraswat
title: 4Weed Dataset: Annotated Imagery Weeds Dataset
title_zh: 4Weed 数据集：带注释的图像杂草数据集
abstract: Weeds are a major threat to crops and are responsible for reducing crop yield worldwide. To mitigate their negative effect, it is advantageous to accurately identify them early in the season to prevent their spread throughout the field. Traditionally, farmers rely on manually scouting fields and applying herbicides for different weeds. However, it is easy to confuse between crops with weeds during the early growth stages. Recently, deep learning-based weed identification has become popular as deep learning relies on convolutional neural networks that are capable of learning important distinguishable features between weeds and crops. However, training robust deep learning models requires access to large imagery datasets. Therefore, an early-season weeds dataset was acquired under field conditions. The dataset consists of 159 Cocklebur images, 139 Foxtail images, 170 Redroot Pigweed images and 150 Giant Ragweed images corresponding to four common weed species found in corn and soybean production systems.. Bounding box annotations were created for each image to prepare the dataset for training both image classification and object detection deep learning networks capable of accurately locating and identifying weeds within corn and soybean fields. (https://osf.io/w9v3j/)
summary: Weeds are a major threat to crops and are responsible for reducing crop yield worldwide. To mitigate their negative effect, it is advantageous to accurately identify them early in the season to prevent their spread throughout the field. Traditionally, farmers rely on manually scouting fields and applying herbicides for different weeds. However, it is easy to confuse between crops with weeds during the early growth stages. Recently, deep learning-based weed identification has become popular as deep learning relies on convolutional neural networks that are capable of learning important distinguishable features between weeds and crops. However, training robust deep learning models requires access to large imagery datasets. Therefore, an early-season weeds dataset was acquired under field conditions. The dataset consists of 159 Cocklebur images, 139 Foxtail images, 170 Redroot Pigweed images and 150 Giant Ragweed images corresponding to four common weed species found in corn and soybean production systems.. Bounding box annotations were created for each image to prepare the dataset for training both image classification and object detection deep learning networks capable of accurately locating and identifying weeds within corn and soybean fields. (https://osf.io/w9v3j/)
abstract_zh: 杂草是农作物的主要威胁，并导致全球农作物产量下降。为了减轻它们的负面影响，在季节早期准确识别它们以防止它们在整个田野中传播是有利的。传统上，农民依靠人工巡查田地并针对不同杂草施用除草剂。然而，在生长早期，很容易将农作物与杂草混淆。最近，基于深度学习的杂草识别变得流行，因为深度学习依赖于能够学习杂草和农作物之间重要区别特征的卷积神经网络。然而，训练强大的深度学习模型需要访问大型图像数据集。因此，在田间条件下获得了早季杂草数据集。该数据集包含 159 张苍耳图像、139 张狐尾图像、170 张红根猪草图像和 150 张巨型豚草图像，分别对应于玉米和大豆生产系统中发现的四种常见杂草物种。为每个图像创建了边界框注释，为训练图像分类和对象检测深度学习网络准备数据集，这些网络能够准确定位和识别玉米和大豆田中的杂草。 （https://osf.io/w9v3j/）

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了一个名为4Weed的数据集，包含四种常见杂草的标注图像，用于训练深度学习模型进行杂草识别。
AI.motivation: 杂草是全球农作物减产的主要原因之一，传统的人工巡查和除草剂使用方法存在识别困难和效率低下的问题，而深度学习在杂草识别方面展现出潜力，但需要大量标注数据集来训练模型。
AI.method: 研究者在田间条件下采集了四种常见杂草（Cocklebur、Foxtail、Redroot Pigweed和Giant Ragweed）的图像，并对每张图像进行了边界框标注，以用于图像分类和目标检测任务。
AI.result: 该数据集包含159张Cocklebur图像、139张Foxtail图像、170张Redroot Pigweed图像和150张Giant Ragweed图像，为深度学习模型的训练提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为玉米和大豆种植系统中的杂草识别提供了高质量的标注数据，有助于提高深度学习模型的识别准确性和实用性。

authors_text: Christina Baek,Ziyang Wu,Kwan Ho Ryan Chan,Tianjiao Ding,Yi Ma,Benjamin D. Haeffele
title: Efficient Maximal Coding Rate Reduction by Variational Forms
title_zh: 通过变体形式有效降低最大编码率
comment: To be published in Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)2022
comments: To be published in Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)2022
abstract: The principle of Maximal Coding Rate Reduction (MCR$^2$) has recently been proposed as a training objective for learning discriminative low-dimensional structures intrinsic to high-dimensional data to allow for more robust training than standard approaches, such as cross-entropy minimization. However, despite the advantages that have been shown for MCR$^2$ training, MCR$^2$ suffers from a significant computational cost due to the need to evaluate and differentiate a significant number of log-determinant terms that grows linearly with the number of classes. By taking advantage of variational forms of spectral functions of a matrix, we reformulate the MCR$^2$ objective to a form that can scale significantly without compromising training accuracy. Experiments in image classification demonstrate that our proposed formulation results in a significant speed up over optimizing the original MCR$^2$ objective directly and often results in higher quality learned representations. Further, our approach may be of independent interest in other models that require computation of log-determinant forms, such as in system identification or normalizing flow models.
summary: The principle of Maximal Coding Rate Reduction (MCR$^2$) has recently been proposed as a training objective for learning discriminative low-dimensional structures intrinsic to high-dimensional data to allow for more robust training than standard approaches, such as cross-entropy minimization. However, despite the advantages that have been shown for MCR$^2$ training, MCR$^2$ suffers from a significant computational cost due to the need to evaluate and differentiate a significant number of log-determinant terms that grows linearly with the number of classes. By taking advantage of variational forms of spectral functions of a matrix, we reformulate the MCR$^2$ objective to a form that can scale significantly without compromising training accuracy. Experiments in image classification demonstrate that our proposed formulation results in a significant speed up over optimizing the original MCR$^2$ objective directly and often results in higher quality learned representations. Further, our approach may be of independent interest in other models that require computation of log-determinant forms, such as in system identification or normalizing flow models.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了最大编码率降低（MCR$^2$）原理作为学习高维数据固有的判别性低维结构的训练目标，以允许比标准方法（例如交叉熵最小化）更稳健的训练。然而，尽管 MCR$^2$ 训练已显示出优势，但由于需要评估和区分大量随类别数量线性增长的对数行列式项，MCR$^2$ 仍面临着巨大的计算成本。通过利用矩阵谱函数的变分形式，我们将 MCR$^2$ 目标重新表述为一种可以在不影响训练精度的情况下显着扩展的形式。图像分类实验表明，我们提出的公式比直接优化原始 MCR$^2$ 目标显着加快，并且通常会产生更高质量的学习表示。此外，我们的方法可能对需要计算对数行列式形式的其他模型具有独立的兴趣，例如系统识别或标准化流模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分形式的高效最大编码率缩减（MCR²）方法，解决其计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: MCR²虽能有效学习高维数据低维结构，但需计算大量对数行列式项导致计算成本随类别数线性增长。
AI.method: 利用矩阵谱函数的变分形式，将MCR²目标函数重写为可扩展形式，避免直接计算高成本的对数行列式。
AI.result: 图像分类实验表明，新方法显著加速训练并提升表示质量，且适用于其他需计算对数行列式的模型（如归一化流）。
AI.conclusion: 通过变分形式重构目标函数，在保持训练效果的同时大幅提升MCR²的计算效率，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: Efficient Maximal Coding Rate Reduction by Variational Forms 通过变体形式有效降低最大编码率 The principle of Maximal Coding Rate Reduction (MCR$^2$) has recently been proposed as a training objective for learning discriminative low-dimensional structures intrinsic to high-dimensional data to allow for more robust training than standard approaches, such as cross-entropy minimization. However, despite the advantages that have been shown for MCR$^2$ training, MCR$^2$ suffers from a significant computational cost due to the need to evaluate and differentiate a significant number of log-determinant terms that grows linearly with the number of classes. By taking advantage of variational forms of spectral functions of a matrix, we reformulate the MCR$^2$ objective to a form that can scale significantly without compromising training accuracy. Experiments in image classification demonstrate that our proposed formulation results in a significant speed up over optimizing the original MCR$^2$ objective directly and often results in higher quality learned representations. Further, our approach may be of independent interest in other models that require computation of log-determinant forms, such as in system identification or normalizing flow models. 最近提出了最大编码率降低（MCR$^2$）原理作为学习高维数据固有的判别性低维结构的训练目标，以允许比标准方法（例如交叉熵最小化）更稳健的训练。然而，尽管 MCR$^2$ 训练已显示出优势，但由于需要评估和区分大量随类别数量线性增长的对数行列式项，MCR$^2$ 仍面临着巨大的计算成本。通过利用矩阵谱函数的变分形式，我们将 MCR$^2$ 目标重新表述为一种可以在不影响训练精度的情况下显着扩展的形式。图像分类实验表明，我们提出的公式比直接优化原始 MCR$^2$ 目标显着加快，并且通常会产生更高质量的学习表示。此外，我们的方法可能对需要计算对数行列式形式的其他模型具有独立的兴趣，例如系统识别或标准化流模型。 本文提出一种基于变分形式的高效最大编码率缩减（MCR²）方法，解决其计算成本高的问题。 Christina Baek,Ziyang Wu,Kwan Ho Ryan Chan,Tianjiao Ding,Yi Ma,Benjamin D. Haeffele cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Zahraa Sh. Aaraji,Hawraa H. Abbas
title: Automatic Classification of Alzheimer's Disease using brain MRI data and deep Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用大脑 MRI 数据和深度卷积神经网络对阿尔茨海默病进行自动分类
abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is one of the most common public health issues the world is facing today. This disease has a high prevalence primarily in the elderly accompanying memory loss and cognitive decline. AD detection is a challenging task which many authors have developed numerous computerized automatic diagnosis systems utilizing neuroimaging and other clinical data. MRI scans provide high-intensity visible features, making these scans the most widely used brain imaging technique. In recent years deep learning has achieved leading success in medical image analysis. But a relatively little investigation has been done to apply deep learning techniques for the brain MRI classification. This paper explores the construction of several deep learning architectures evaluated on brain MRI images and segmented images. The idea behind segmented images investigates the influence of image segmentation step on deep learning classification. The image processing presented a pipeline consisting of pre-processing to enhance the MRI scans and post-processing consisting of a segmentation method for segmenting the brain tissues. The results show that the processed images achieved a better accuracy in the binary classification of AD vs. CN (Cognitively Normal) across four different architectures. ResNet architecture resulted in the highest prediction accuracy amongst the other architectures (90.83% for the original brain images and 93.50% for the processed images).

This disease has a high prevalence primarily in the elderly accompanying memory loss and cognitive decline. This paper explores the construction of several deep learning architectures evaluated on brain MRI images and segmented images. The idea behind segmented images investigates the influence of image segmentation step on deep learning classification. The image processing presented a pipeline consisting of pre-processing to enhance the MRI scans and post-processing consisting of a segmentation method for segmenting the brain tissues. The results show that the processed images achieved a better accuracy in the binary classification of AD vs. CN (Cognitively Normal) across four different architectures. ResNet architecture resulted in the highest prediction accuracy amongst the other architectures (90.83% for the original brain images and 93.50% for the processed images).
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）是当今世界面临的最常见的公共卫生问题之一。这种疾病主要在老年人中发病率很高，伴有记忆丧失和认知能力下降。 AD 检测是一项具有挑战性的任务，许多作者利用神经影像和其他临床数据开发了许多计算机化自动诊断系统。 MRI 扫描提供高强度可见特征，使这些扫描成为使用最广泛的脑成像技术。近年来，深度学习在医学图像分析领域取得了领先的成功。但将深度学习技术应用于脑部 MRI 分类的研究相对较少。本文探讨了几种在脑 MRI 图像和分割图像上评估的深度学习架构的构建。分割图像背后的想法研究了图像分割步骤对深度学习分类的影响。图像处理提供了一个管道，包括用于增强 MRI 扫描的预处理和包括用于分割脑组织的分割方法的后处理。结果表明，处理后的图像在四种不同架构的 AD 与 CN（认知正常）二元分类中取得了更好的准确性。 ResNet 架构在其他架构中具有最高的预测精度（原始大脑图像为 90.83%，处理后图像为 93.50%）。

AI.tldr: 本文利用深度卷积神经网络对脑部MRI图像进行自动分类，以检测阿尔茨海默病（AD）。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病检测具有挑战性，现有研究对深度学习在脑MRI分类中的应用探索不足，需验证分割预处理对分类性能的影响。
AI.method: 构建多种深度学习架构，对原始和分割后的脑MRI图像进行分类实验，包含预处理增强和分割后处理步骤。
AI.result: 处理后图像在四种架构中均提升分类准确率，ResNet在原始图像和分割图像上分别达到90.83%和93.50%的最高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 分割预处理显著提升分类效果，ResNet表现最优，验证了深度学习在AD分类中的潜力及预处理的重要性。

authors_text: Samik Sadhu,Hynek Hermansky
title: Importance of Different Temporal Modulations of Speech: A Tale of Two Perspectives
title_zh: 语音不同时间调制的重要性：两个视角的故事
abstract: How important are different temporal speech modulations for speech recognition? We answer this question from two complementary perspectives. Firstly, we quantify the amount of phonetic \textit{information} in the modulation spectrum of speech by computing the mutual information between temporal modulations with frame-wise phoneme labels. Looking from another perspective, we ask - which speech modulations an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system prefers for its operation. Data-driven weights are learned over the modulation spectrum and optimized for an end-to-end ASR task. Both methods unanimously agree that speech information is mostly contained in slow modulation. Maximum mutual information occurs around 3-6 Hz which also happens to be the range of modulations most preferred by the ASR. In addition, we show that the incorporation of this knowledge into ASRs significantly reduces their dependency on the amount of training data.
summary: How important are different temporal speech modulations for speech recognition? We answer this question from two complementary perspectives. Firstly, we quantify the amount of phonetic \textit{information} in the modulation spectrum of speech by computing the mutual information between temporal modulations with frame-wise phoneme labels. Looking from another perspective, we ask - which speech modulations an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system prefers for its operation. Data-driven weights are learned over the modulation spectrum and optimized for an end-to-end ASR task. Both methods unanimously agree that speech information is mostly contained in slow modulation. Maximum mutual information occurs around 3-6 Hz which also happens to be the range of modulations most preferred by the ASR. In addition, we show that the incorporation of this knowledge into ASRs significantly reduces their dependency on the amount of training data.
abstract_zh: 不同的时间语音调制对于语音识别有多重要？我们从两个互补的角度来回答这个问题。首先，我们通过计算具有逐帧音素标签的时间调制之间的互信息来量化语音调制频谱中的语音 \textit{信息} 量。从另一个角度来看，我们会问 - 自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统更喜欢哪种语音调制来运行。数据驱动的权重是通过调制频谱学习的，并针对端到端 ASR 任务进行了优化。两种方法一致认为语音信息主要包含在慢调制中。最大互信息出现在 3-6 Hz 左右，这也恰好是 ASR 最喜欢的调制范围。此外，我们还表明，将这些知识纳入 ASR 中可以显着减少它们对训练数据量的依赖。

AI.tldr: 本文从两个角度分析语音中不同时间调制的重要性，以提升语音识别系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 理解语音信号中时间调制对语音识别的贡献，有助于优化自动语音识别（ASR）系统的设计并减少其对训练数据的依赖。
AI.method: 通过计算时间调制与音素标签的互信息量化语音信息，并学习数据驱动的调制谱权重以优化端到端ASR任务。
AI.result: 两种方法均表明语音信息主要存在于慢速调制（3-6Hz），该范围也是ASR系统最偏好的调制范围；引入此知识可显著降低ASR对训练数据量的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 聚焦于慢速时间调制可提升ASR系统的效率与性能，为减少训练数据需求提供新思路。

motivation: 理解语音信号中时间调制对语音识别的贡献，有助于优化自动语音识别（ASR）系统的设计并减少其对训练数据的依赖。
method: 通过计算时间调制与音素标签的互信息量化语音信息，并学习数据驱动的调制谱权重以优化端到端ASR任务。
result: 两种方法均表明语音信息主要存在于慢速调制（3-6Hz），该范围也是ASR系统最偏好的调制范围；引入此知识可显著降低ASR对训练数据量的依赖。
conclusion: 聚焦于慢速时间调制可提升ASR系统的效率与性能，为减少训练数据需求提供新思路。
search_text: Importance of Different Temporal Modulations of Speech: A Tale of Two Perspectives 语音不同时间调制的重要性：两个视角的故事 How important are different temporal speech modulations for speech recognition? We answer this question from two complementary perspectives. Firstly, we quantify the amount of phonetic \textit{information} in the modulation spectrum of speech by computing the mutual information between temporal modulations with frame-wise phoneme labels. Looking from another perspective, we ask - which speech modulations an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system prefers for its operation. Data-driven weights are learned over the modulation spectrum and optimized for an end-to-end ASR task. Both methods unanimously agree that speech information is mostly contained in slow modulation. Maximum mutual information occurs around 3-6 Hz which also happens to be the range of modulations most preferred by the ASR. In addition, we show that the incorporation of this knowledge into ASRs significantly reduces their dependency on the amount of training data. 不同的时间语音调制对于语音识别有多重要？我们从两个互补的角度来回答这个问题。首先，我们通过计算具有逐帧音素标签的时间调制之间的互信息来量化语音调制频谱中的语音 \textit{信息} 量。从另一个角度来看，我们会问 - 自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统更喜欢哪种语音调制来运行。数据驱动的权重是通过调制频谱学习的，并针对端到端 ASR 任务进行了优化。两种方法一致认为语音信息主要包含在慢调制中。最大互信息出现在 3-6 Hz 左右，这也恰好是 ASR 最喜欢的调制范围。此外，我们还表明，将这些知识纳入 ASR 中可以显着减少它们对训练数据量的依赖。 本文从两个角度分析语音中不同时间调制的重要性，以提升语音识别系统的性能。 Samik Sadhu,Hynek Hermansky eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Marcel de Korte,Jaebok Kim,Aki Kunikoshi,Adaeze Adigwe,Esther Klabbers
title: Data-augmented cross-lingual synthesis in a teacher-student framework
title_zh: 师生框架中的数据增强跨语言综合
abstract: Cross-lingual synthesis can be defined as the task of letting a speaker generate fluent synthetic speech in another language. This is a challenging task, and resulting speech can suffer from reduced naturalness, accented speech, and/or loss of essential voice characteristics. Previous research shows that many models appear to have insufficient generalization capabilities to perform well on every of these cross-lingual aspects. To overcome these generalization problems, we propose to apply the teacher-student paradigm to cross-lingual synthesis. While a teacher model is commonly used to produce teacher forced data, we propose to also use it to produce augmented data of unseen speaker-language pairs, where the aim is to retain essential speaker characteristics. Both sets of data are then used for student model training, which is trained to retain the naturalness and prosodic variation present in the teacher forced data, while learning the speaker identity from the augmented data. Some modifications to the student model are proposed to make the separation of teacher forced and augmented data more straightforward. Results show that the proposed approach improves the retention of speaker characteristics in the speech, while managing to retain high levels of naturalness and prosodic variation.
summary: Cross-lingual synthesis can be defined as the task of letting a speaker generate fluent synthetic speech in another language. This is a challenging task, and resulting speech can suffer from reduced naturalness, accented speech, and/or loss of essential voice characteristics. Previous research shows that many models appear to have insufficient generalization capabilities to perform well on every of these cross-lingual aspects. To overcome these generalization problems, we propose to apply the teacher-student paradigm to cross-lingual synthesis. While a teacher model is commonly used to produce teacher forced data, we propose to also use it to produce augmented data of unseen speaker-language pairs, where the aim is to retain essential speaker characteristics. Both sets of data are then used for student model training, which is trained to retain the naturalness and prosodic variation present in the teacher forced data, while learning the speaker identity from the augmented data. Some modifications to the student model are proposed to make the separation of teacher forced and augmented data more straightforward. Results show that the proposed approach improves the retention of speaker characteristics in the speech, while managing to retain high levels of naturalness and prosodic variation.
abstract_zh: 跨语言合成可以定义为让说话者用另一种语言生成流利的合成语音的任务。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，并且生成的语音可能会自然度降低、语音有口音和/或基本语音特征丢失。先前的研究表明，许多模型似乎没有足够的泛化能力，无法在这些跨语言方面表现良好。为了克服这些泛化问题，我们建议将师生范式应用于跨语言综合。虽然教师模型通常用于生成教师强制数据，但我们建议也使用它来生成未见过的说话者语言对的增强数据，其目的是保留基本的说话者特征。然后，两组数据都用于学生模型训练，该模型经过训练以保留教师强制数据中存在的自然性和韵律变化，同时从增强数据中学习说话者身份。建议对学生模型进行一些修改，以使教师强制数据和增强数据的分离更加简单。结果表明，所提出的方法提高了语音中说话者特征的保留，同时设法保留高水平的自然度和韵律变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于教师-学生框架的数据增强跨语言语音合成方法，旨在保留说话者特征并提升合成语音的自然度与韵律表现。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言语音合成模型存在泛化能力不足的问题，导致合成语音自然度下降、口音明显及语音特征丢失。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生框架，教师模型生成教师强制数据与未见说话者-语言对的增强数据，学生模型通过联合学习两种数据保留自然度与说话者身份，并对模型结构进行改进以简化数据分离。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法有效提升了说话者特征保留能力，同时维持了高水平的自然度与韵律变化。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强的教师-学生框架可有效解决跨语言合成中的泛化问题，在保持语音自然性与说话者身份方面具有显著优势。

authors_text: Harshvardhan P. Joshi,Mihail L. Sichitiu,Maria Kihl
title: Distributed Robust Geocast Multicast Routing for Inter-Vehicle Communication
title_zh: 用于车辆间通信的分布式鲁棒 Geocast 组播路由
abstract: Numerous protocols for geocast have been proposed in literature. It has been shown that explicit route setup approaches perform poorly with VANETs due to limited route lifetime and frequent network fragmentation. The broadcast based approaches have considerable redundancy and add significantly to the overhead of the protocol. A completely distributed and robust geocast approach is presented in this paper, that is resilient to frequent topology changes and network fragmentation. A distance-based backoff algorithm is used to reduce the number of hops and a novel mechanism to reduce redundant broadcasts is introduced. The performance of the proposed protocol is evaluated for various scenarios and compared with simple flooding and a protocol based on explicit route setup.
summary: Numerous protocols for geocast have been proposed in literature. It has been shown that explicit route setup approaches perform poorly with VANETs due to limited route lifetime and frequent network fragmentation. The broadcast based approaches have considerable redundancy and add significantly to the overhead of the protocol. A completely distributed and robust geocast approach is presented in this paper, that is resilient to frequent topology changes and network fragmentation. A distance-based backoff algorithm is used to reduce the number of hops and a novel mechanism to reduce redundant broadcasts is introduced. The performance of the proposed protocol is evaluated for various scenarios and compared with simple flooding and a protocol based on explicit route setup.
abstract_zh: 文献中已经提出了许多用于 geocast 的协议。事实证明，由于有限的路由生命周期和频繁的网络碎片，显式路由设置方法在 VANET 中表现不佳。基于广播的方法具有相当大的冗余，并且显着增加了协议的开销。本文提出了一种完全分布式且鲁棒的 geocast 方法，该方法能够适应频繁的拓扑变化和网络碎片。使用基于距离的退避算法来减少跳数，并引入一种减少冗余广播的新机制。针对各种场景评估了所提出的协议的性能，并与简单的洪泛和基于显式路由设置的协议进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于车辆通信的分布式鲁棒地理组播路由协议，解决现有方法在频繁拓扑变化和网络碎片化场景下的性能缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有显式路由设置方法因路由寿命短和网络碎片化表现不佳，广播方法则存在显著冗余和开销问题，需更高效鲁棒的地理组播方案。
AI.method: 设计分布式架构结合距离基退避算法减少跳数，并引入新型机制降低冗余广播，提升动态拓扑下的路由稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明该协议在多种场景下优于传统泛洪和显式路由协议，有效降低延迟与冗余，提升网络吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分布式地理组播方法通过动态适应拓扑变化和优化广播机制，为VANETs提供了更高效可靠的通信解决方案。
