authors_text: Sergio Correia,Stephan Luck
title: Digitizing Historical Balance Sheet Data: A Practitioner's Guide
title_zh: 历史资产负债表数据数字化：从业者指南
abstract: This paper discusses how to successfully digitize large-scale historical micro-data by augmenting optical character recognition (OCR) engines with pre- and post-processing methods. Although OCR software has improved dramatically in recent years due to improvements in machine learning, off-the-shelf OCR applications still present high error rates which limit their applications for accurate extraction of structured information. Complementing OCR with additional methods can however dramatically increase its success rate, making it a powerful and cost-efficient tool for economic historians. This paper showcases these methods and explains why they are useful. We apply them against two large balance sheet datasets and introduce quipucamayoc, a Python package containing these methods in a unified framework.
summary: This paper discusses how to successfully digitize large-scale historical micro-data by augmenting optical character recognition (OCR) engines with pre- and post-processing methods. Although OCR software has improved dramatically in recent years due to improvements in machine learning, off-the-shelf OCR applications still present high error rates which limit their applications for accurate extraction of structured information. Complementing OCR with additional methods can however dramatically increase its success rate, making it a powerful and cost-efficient tool for economic historians. This paper showcases these methods and explains why they are useful. We apply them against two large balance sheet datasets and introduce quipucamayoc, a Python package containing these methods in a unified framework.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了如何通过使用预处理和后处理方法增强光学字符识别 (OCR) 引擎来成功数字化大规模历史微观数据。尽管近年来由于机器学习的改进，OCR 软件有了显着改进，但现成的 OCR 应用程序仍然存在较高的错误率，这限制了其准确提取结构化信息的应用。然而，用其他方法补充 OCR 可以显着提高其成功率，使其成为经济历史学家的强大且经济高效的工具。本文展示了这些方法并解释了它们为何有用。我们将它们应用于两个大型资产负债表数据集，并引入 quipucamayoc，一个在统一框架中包含这些方法的 Python 包。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍如何通过增强OCR技术来有效数字化历史资产负债表数据的方法
AI.motivation: 现有OCR工具存在高错误率，限制了其在历史微观数据结构化提取中的应用，需改进方法以提高准确性

search_text: Digitizing Historical Balance Sheet Data: A Practitioner's Guide 历史资产负债表数据数字化：从业者指南 This paper discusses how to successfully digitize large-scale historical micro-data by augmenting optical character recognition (OCR) engines with pre- and post-processing methods. Although OCR software has improved dramatically in recent years due to improvements in machine learning, off-the-shelf OCR applications still present high error rates which limit their applications for accurate extraction of structured information. Complementing OCR with additional methods can however dramatically increase its success rate, making it a powerful and cost-efficient tool for economic historians. This paper showcases these methods and explains why they are useful. We apply them against two large balance sheet datasets and introduce quipucamayoc, a Python package containing these methods in a unified framework. 本文讨论了如何通过使用预处理和后处理方法增强光学字符识别 (OCR) 引擎来成功数字化大规模历史微观数据。尽管近年来由于机器学习的改进，OCR 软件有了显着改进，但现成的 OCR 应用程序仍然存在较高的错误率，这限制了其准确提取结构化信息的应用。然而，用其他方法补充 OCR 可以显着提高其成功率，使其成为经济历史学家的强大且经济高效的工具。本文展示了这些方法并解释了它们为何有用。我们将它们应用于两个大型资产负债表数据集，并引入 quipucamayoc，一个在统一框架中包含这些方法的 Python 包。 本文介绍如何通过增强OCR技术来有效数字化历史资产负债表数据的方法 Sergio Correia,Stephan Luck cs.CV,econ.GN

authors_text: Parvin Malekzadeh,Mohammad Salimibeni,Ming Hou,Arash Mohammadi,Konstantinos N. Plataniotis
title: AKF-SR: Adaptive Kalman Filtering-based Successor Representation
title_zh: AKF-SR：基于自适应卡尔曼滤波的后继表示
abstract: Recent studies in neuroscience suggest that Successor Representation (SR)-based models provide adaptation to changes in the goal locations or reward function faster than model-free algorithms, together with lower computational cost compared to that of model-based algorithms. However, it is not known how such representation might help animals to manage uncertainty in their decision-making. Existing methods for SR learning do not capture uncertainty about the estimated SR. In order to address this issue, the paper presents a Kalman filter-based SR framework, referred to as Adaptive Kalman Filtering-based Successor Representation (AKF-SR). First, Kalman temporal difference approach, which is a combination of the Kalman filter and the temporal difference method, is used within the AKF-SR framework to cast the SR learning procedure into a filtering problem to benefit from the uncertainty estimation of the SR, and also decreases in memory requirement and sensitivity to model's parameters in comparison to deep neural network-based algorithms. An adaptive Kalman filtering approach is then applied within the proposed AKF-SR framework in order to tune the measurement noise covariance and measurement mapping function of Kalman filter as the most important parameters affecting the filter's performance. Moreover, an active learning method that exploits the estimated uncertainty of the SR to form the behaviour policy leading to more visits to less certain values is proposed to improve the overall performance of an agent in terms of received rewards while interacting with its environment.
summary: Recent studies in neuroscience suggest that Successor Representation (SR)-based models provide adaptation to changes in the goal locations or reward function faster than model-free algorithms, together with lower computational cost compared to that of model-based algorithms. However, it is not known how such representation might help animals to manage uncertainty in their decision-making. Existing methods for SR learning do not capture uncertainty about the estimated SR. In order to address this issue, the paper presents a Kalman filter-based SR framework, referred to as Adaptive Kalman Filtering-based Successor Representation (AKF-SR). First, Kalman temporal difference approach, which is a combination of the Kalman filter and the temporal difference method, is used within the AKF-SR framework to cast the SR learning procedure into a filtering problem to benefit from the uncertainty estimation of the SR, and also decreases in memory requirement and sensitivity to model's parameters in comparison to deep neural network-based algorithms. An adaptive Kalman filtering approach is then applied within the proposed AKF-SR framework in order to tune the measurement noise covariance and measurement mapping function of Kalman filter as the most important parameters affecting the filter's performance. Moreover, an active learning method that exploits the estimated uncertainty of the SR to form the behaviour policy leading to more visits to less certain values is proposed to improve the overall performance of an agent in terms of received rewards while interacting with its environment.
abstract_zh: 神经科学领域的最新研究表明，基于后继表示 (SR) 的模型比无模型算法更快地适应目标位置或奖励函数的变化，并且与基于模型的算法相比，计算成本更低。然而，目前尚不清楚这种表征如何帮助动物管理决策中的不确定性。现有的 SR 学习方法无法捕捉估计 SR 的不确定性。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种基于卡尔曼滤波器的SR框架，称为基于自适应卡尔曼滤波的后继表示（AKF-SR）。首先，卡尔曼时间差分方法是卡尔曼滤波器和时间差分方法的组合，在 AKF-SR 框架内使用，将 SR 学习过程转化为滤波问题，以受益于 SR 的不确定性估计，并且与基于深度神经网络的算法相比，还降低了内存需求和对模型参数的敏感性。然后在所提出的 AKF-SR 框架内应用自适应卡尔曼滤波方法，以调整卡尔曼滤波器的测量噪声协方差和测量映射函数，将其作为影响滤波器性能的最重要参数。此外，提出了一种主动学习方法，利用 SR 的估计不确定性来形成行为策略，从而导致更多地访问不太确定的值，以提高代理在与环境交互时收到的奖励方面的整体性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于自适应卡尔曼滤波的成功继任表示（AKF-SR）框架，以解决传统成功继任表示（SR）模型在不确定性估计和参数敏感性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有SR学习方法无法有效捕捉估计SR的不确定性，而不确定性对动物在不确定环境中的决策至关重要。传统深度神经网络方法存在较高的计算成本和参数敏感性。
AI.method: 结合卡尔曼滤波与时间差分方法，将SR学习转化为滤波问题；通过自适应卡尔曼滤波动态调整测量噪声协方差和测量映射函数；设计基于不确定性估计的主动学习策略优化行为策略。
AI.result: AKF-SR在降低内存需求和参数敏感性的同时，通过不确定性驱动的主动学习显著提升了智能体在环境交互中的奖励收益。
AI.conclusion: AKF-SR框架通过引入卡尔曼滤波有效处理不确定性，兼顾了计算效率与决策性能，为强化学习中的目标适应性问题提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yujie Lu,Jianren Wang,Vikash Kumar
title: Curiosity Driven Self-supervised Tactile Exploration of Unknown Objects
title_zh: 好奇心驱动对未知物体的自我监督触觉探索
abstract: Intricate behaviors an organism can exhibit is predicated on its ability to sense and effectively interpret complexities of its surroundings. Relevant information is often distributed between multiple modalities, and requires the organism to exhibit information assimilation capabilities in addition to information seeking behaviors. While biological beings leverage multiple sensing modalities for decision making, current robots are overly reliant on visual inputs. In this work, we want to augment our robots with the ability to leverage the (relatively under-explored) modality of touch. To focus our investigation, we study the problem of scene reconstruction where touch is the only available sensing modality. We present Tactile Slam (tSLAM) -- which prepares an agent to acquire information seeking behavior and use implicit understanding of common household items to reconstruct the geometric details of the object under exploration. Using the anthropomorphic `ADROIT' hand, we demonstrate that tSLAM is highly effective in reconstructing objects of varying complexities within 6 seconds of interactions. We also established the generality of tSLAM by training only on 3D Warehouse objects and testing on ContactDB objects.
summary: Intricate behaviors an organism can exhibit is predicated on its ability to sense and effectively interpret complexities of its surroundings. Relevant information is often distributed between multiple modalities, and requires the organism to exhibit information assimilation capabilities in addition to information seeking behaviors. While biological beings leverage multiple sensing modalities for decision making, current robots are overly reliant on visual inputs. In this work, we want to augment our robots with the ability to leverage the (relatively under-explored) modality of touch. To focus our investigation, we study the problem of scene reconstruction where touch is the only available sensing modality. We present Tactile Slam (tSLAM) -- which prepares an agent to acquire information seeking behavior and use implicit understanding of common household items to reconstruct the geometric details of the object under exploration. Using the anthropomorphic `ADROIT' hand, we demonstrate that tSLAM is highly effective in reconstructing objects of varying complexities within 6 seconds of interactions. We also established the generality of tSLAM by training only on 3D Warehouse objects and testing on ContactDB objects.
abstract_zh: 有机体可以表现出的复杂行为取决于其感知和有效解释周围环境复杂性的能力。相关信息通常分布在多种模态之间，并且要求生物体除了信息寻求行为之外还表现出信息同化能力。虽然生物利用多种传感方式进行决策，但当前的机器人过度依赖视觉输入。在这项工作中，我们希望增强我们的机器人利用（相对尚未充分探索的）触摸方式的能力。为了集中我们的研究，我们研究了场景重建问题，其中触摸是唯一可用的传感方式。我们提出了触觉 Slam (tSLAM)——它准备一个代理来获取信息搜索行为，并使用对常见家居用品的隐式理解来重建正在探索的物体的几何细节。使用拟人化的“ADROIT”手，我们证明了 tSLAM 在 6 秒的交互内重建不同复杂度的对象非常有效。我们还通过仅在 3D Warehouse 对象上进行训练并在 ContactDB 对象上进行测试，建立了 tSLAM 的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于触觉的自监督探索方法tSLAM，使机器人能够在仅依赖触觉的情况下重建未知物体的几何细节。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人过度依赖视觉输入，而触觉等其他感知模态未被充分探索。生物体通过多模态感知实现环境理解，需赋予机器人类似能力以应对复杂场景。
AI.method: 设计tSLAM框架，结合好奇心驱动的自监督学习与类人机械手（ADROIT），通过触觉反馈隐式学习常见物品特征，实现物体几何重建。
AI.result: 在6秒内成功重建多种复杂度物体，且仅通过3D Warehouse训练数据即可泛化至ContactDB测试集，验证方法通用性。
AI.conclusion: tSLAM证明了触觉驱动的自监督探索在场景重建中的有效性，为无视觉依赖的机器人感知提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于触觉的自监督探索方法tSLAM，使机器人能够在仅依赖触觉的情况下重建未知物体的几何细节。
motivation: 当前机器人过度依赖视觉输入，而触觉等其他感知模态未被充分探索。生物体通过多模态感知实现环境理解，需赋予机器人类似能力以应对复杂场景。
method: 设计tSLAM框架，结合好奇心驱动的自监督学习与类人机械手（ADROIT），通过触觉反馈隐式学习常见物品特征，实现物体几何重建。
result: 在6秒内成功重建多种复杂度物体，且仅通过3D Warehouse训练数据即可泛化至ContactDB测试集，验证方法通用性。
conclusion: tSLAM证明了触觉驱动的自监督探索在场景重建中的有效性，为无视觉依赖的机器人感知提供了新思路。
search_text: Curiosity Driven Self-supervised Tactile Exploration of Unknown Objects 好奇心驱动对未知物体的自我监督触觉探索 Intricate behaviors an organism can exhibit is predicated on its ability to sense and effectively interpret complexities of its surroundings. Relevant information is often distributed between multiple modalities, and requires the organism to exhibit information assimilation capabilities in addition to information seeking behaviors. While biological beings leverage multiple sensing modalities for decision making, current robots are overly reliant on visual inputs. In this work, we want to augment our robots with the ability to leverage the (relatively under-explored) modality of touch. To focus our investigation, we study the problem of scene reconstruction where touch is the only available sensing modality. We present Tactile Slam (tSLAM) -- which prepares an agent to acquire information seeking behavior and use implicit understanding of common household items to reconstruct the geometric details of the object under exploration. Using the anthropomorphic `ADROIT' hand, we demonstrate that tSLAM is highly effective in reconstructing objects of varying complexities within 6 seconds of interactions. We also established the generality of tSLAM by training only on 3D Warehouse objects and testing on ContactDB objects. 有机体可以表现出的复杂行为取决于其感知和有效解释周围环境复杂性的能力。相关信息通常分布在多种模态之间，并且要求生物体除了信息寻求行为之外还表现出信息同化能力。虽然生物利用多种传感方式进行决策，但当前的机器人过度依赖视觉输入。在这项工作中，我们希望增强我们的机器人利用（相对尚未充分探索的）触摸方式的能力。为了集中我们的研究，我们研究了场景重建问题，其中触摸是唯一可用的传感方式。我们提出了触觉 Slam (tSLAM)——它准备一个代理来获取信息搜索行为，并使用对常见家居用品的隐式理解来重建正在探索的物体的几何细节。使用拟人化的“ADROIT”手，我们证明了 tSLAM 在 6 秒的交互内重建不同复杂度的对象非常有效。我们还通过仅在 3D Warehouse 对象上进行训练并在 ContactDB 对象上进行测试，建立了 tSLAM 的通用性。 本文提出了一种基于触觉的自监督探索方法tSLAM，使机器人能够在仅依赖触觉的情况下重建未知物体的几何细节。 Yujie Lu,Jianren Wang,Vikash Kumar cs.RO

authors_text: Davide Di Ruscio,Paola Inverardi,Patrizio Migliarini,Phuong T. Nguyen
title: Leveraging Privacy Profiles to Empower Users in the Digital Society
title_zh: 利用隐私配置文件为数字社会中的用户提供支持
comment: The paper consists of 37 pages, 11 figures
comments: The paper consists of 37 pages, 11 figures
abstract: Privacy and ethics of citizens are at the core of the concerns raised by our increasingly digital society. Profiling users is standard practice for software applications triggering the need for users, also enforced by laws, to properly manage privacy settings. Users need to manage software privacy settings properly to protect personally identifiable information and express personal ethical preferences. AI technologies that empower users to interact with the digital world by reflecting their personal ethical preferences can be key enablers of a trustworthy digital society. We focus on the privacy dimension and contribute a step in the above direction through an empirical study on an existing dataset collected from the fitness domain. We find out which set of questions is appropriate to differentiate users according to their preferences. The results reveal that a compact set of semantic-driven questions (about domain-independent privacy preferences) helps distinguish users better than a complex domain-dependent one. This confirms the study's hypothesis that moral attitudes are the relevant piece of information to collect. Based on the outcome, we implement a recommender system to provide users with suitable recommendations related to privacy choices. We then show that the proposed recommender system provides relevant settings to users, obtaining high accuracy.
summary: Privacy and ethics of citizens are at the core of the concerns raised by our increasingly digital society. Profiling users is standard practice for software applications triggering the need for users, also enforced by laws, to properly manage privacy settings. Users need to manage software privacy settings properly to protect personally identifiable information and express personal ethical preferences. AI technologies that empower users to interact with the digital world by reflecting their personal ethical preferences can be key enablers of a trustworthy digital society. We focus on the privacy dimension and contribute a step in the above direction through an empirical study on an existing dataset collected from the fitness domain. We find out which set of questions is appropriate to differentiate users according to their preferences. The results reveal that a compact set of semantic-driven questions (about domain-independent privacy preferences) helps distinguish users better than a complex domain-dependent one. This confirms the study's hypothesis that moral attitudes are the relevant piece of information to collect. Based on the outcome, we implement a recommender system to provide users with suitable recommendations related to privacy choices. We then show that the proposed recommender system provides relevant settings to users, obtaining high accuracy.
abstract_zh: 公民的隐私和道德是我们日益数字化的社会所关注的核心问题。对用户进行分析是软件应用程序的标准做法，触发了用户正确管理隐私设置的需求，这也是法律强制执行的。用户需要正确管理软件隐私设置，以保护个人身份信息并表达个人道德偏好。通过反映个人道德偏好，使用户能够与数字世界互动的人工智能技术可以成为值得信赖的数字社会的关键推动者。我们关注隐私维度，并通过对从健身领域收集的现有数据集进行实证研究，在上述方向上迈出了一步。我们找出哪组问题适合根据用户的喜好来区分用户。结果表明，一组紧凑的语义驱动问题（关于与领域无关的隐私偏好）比复杂的与领域相关的问题更有助于区分用户。这证实了该研究的假设，即道德态度是需要收集的相关信息。根据结果​​，我们实现了一个推荐系统，为用户提供与隐私选择相关的合适推荐。然后我们表明，所提出的推荐系统为用户提供了相关设置，获得了较高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究和推荐系统设计，探索如何利用用户隐私偏好来帮助其在数字社会中管理隐私设置。
AI.motivation: 数字社会中用户隐私和伦理问题日益突出，现有隐私设置管理方式复杂且缺乏个性化，需基于用户道德态度的隐私偏好提供更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于健身领域数据集进行实证研究，比较不同隐私问题集的区分效果，构建以语义驱动问题为基础的推荐系统并验证其准确性。
AI.result: 发现语义驱动的通用隐私问题集比复杂领域相关问题更能区分用户偏好，推荐系统在隐私设置推荐中达到高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 道德态度是隐私偏好的关键信息，基于此设计的推荐系统可有效辅助用户管理隐私设置，为构建可信数字社会提供技术支撑。

authors_text: Kevin Miller,John Mauro,Jason Setiadi,Xoaquin Baca,Zhan Shi,Jeff Calder,Andrea L. Bertozzi
title: Graph-based Active Learning for Semi-supervised Classification of SAR Data
title_zh: 基于图的主动学习用于 SAR 数据的半监督分类
abstract: We present a novel method for classification of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) data by combining ideas from graph-based learning and neural network methods within an active learning framework. Graph-based methods in machine learning are based on a similarity graph constructed from the data. When the data consists of raw images composed of scenes, extraneous information can make the classification task more difficult. In recent years, neural network methods have been shown to provide a promising framework for extracting patterns from SAR images. These methods, however, require ample training data to avoid overfitting. At the same time, such training data are often unavailable for applications of interest, such as automatic target recognition (ATR) and SAR data. We use a Convolutional Neural Network Variational Autoencoder (CNNVAE) to embed SAR data into a feature space, and then construct a similarity graph from the embedded data and apply graph-based semi-supervised learning techniques. The CNNVAE feature embedding and graph construction requires no labeled data, which reduces overfitting and improves the generalization performance of graph learning at low label rates. Furthermore, the method easily incorporates a human-in-the-loop for active learning in the data-labeling process. We present promising results and compare them to other standard machine learning methods on the Moving and Stationary Target Acquisition and Recognition (MSTAR) dataset for ATR with small amounts of labeled data.
summary: We present a novel method for classification of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) data by combining ideas from graph-based learning and neural network methods within an active learning framework. Graph-based methods in machine learning are based on a similarity graph constructed from the data. When the data consists of raw images composed of scenes, extraneous information can make the classification task more difficult. In recent years, neural network methods have been shown to provide a promising framework for extracting patterns from SAR images. These methods, however, require ample training data to avoid overfitting. At the same time, such training data are often unavailable for applications of interest, such as automatic target recognition (ATR) and SAR data. We use a Convolutional Neural Network Variational Autoencoder (CNNVAE) to embed SAR data into a feature space, and then construct a similarity graph from the embedded data and apply graph-based semi-supervised learning techniques. The CNNVAE feature embedding and graph construction requires no labeled data, which reduces overfitting and improves the generalization performance of graph learning at low label rates. Furthermore, the method easily incorporates a human-in-the-loop for active learning in the data-labeling process. We present promising results and compare them to other standard machine learning methods on the Moving and Stationary Target Acquisition and Recognition (MSTAR) dataset for ATR with small amounts of labeled data.
abstract_zh: 我们通过在主动学习框架内结合基于图的学​​习和神经网络方法的思想，提出了一种对合成孔径雷达（SAR）数据进行分类的新方法。机器学习中基于图的方法基于从数据构建的相似图。当数据由场景组成的原始图像组成时，无关信息会使分类任务变得更加困难。近年来，神经网络方法已被证明为从 SAR 图像中提取模式提供了一个有前景的框架。然而，这些方法需要充足的训练数据以避免过度拟合。同时，此类训练数据通常无法用于感兴趣的应用，例如自动目标识别 (ATR) 和 SAR 数据。我们使用卷积神经网络变分自动编码器（CNNVAE）将SAR数据嵌入到特征空间中，然后从嵌入数据构建相似图并应用基于图的半监督学习技术。 CNNVAE特征嵌入和图构建不需要标记数据，这减少了过度拟合并提高了低标签率下图学习的泛化性能。此外，该方法可以轻松地结合人机交互，在数据标记过程中进行主动学习。我们在具有少量标记数据的 ATR 的移动和静止目标获取和识别 (MSTAR) 数据集上展示了有希望的结果，并将其与其他标准机器学习方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合图基学习与神经网络的主动学习方法，用于SAR数据的半监督分类。
AI.motivation: SAR图像分类面临数据复杂且标注成本高的问题，传统神经网络依赖大量标注数据易过拟合，而主动学习可减少标注需求，但需有效结合图基方法提升性能。
AI.method: 采用CNNVAE对SAR数据进行特征嵌入，构建相似性图并应用半监督学习技术，无需标注数据即可减少过拟合并提升泛化能力，同时融入人工标注的主动学习流程。
AI.result: 在MSTAR数据集上，使用少量标注数据时，该方法优于其他标准机器学习方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合图基学习与神经网络，在低标注率下实现SAR数据的有效分类，适用于标注数据有限的应用场景。

The CNNVAE feature embedding and graph construction requires no labeled data, which reduces overfitting and improves the generalization performance of graph learning at low label rates. Furthermore, the method easily incorporates a human-in-the-loop for active learning in the data-labeling process. We present promising results and compare them to other standard machine learning methods on the Moving and Stationary Target Acquisition and Recognition (MSTAR) dataset for ATR with small amounts of labeled data. 我们通过在主动学习框架内结合基于图的学​​习和神经网络方法的思想，提出了一种对合成孔径雷达（SAR）数据进行分类的新方法。机器学习中基于图的方法基于从数据构建的相似图。当数据由场景组成的原始图像组成时，无关信息会使分类任务变得更加困难。近年来，神经网络方法已被证明为从 SAR 图像中提取模式提供了一个有前景的框架。然而，这些方法需要充足的训练数据以避免过度拟合。同时，此类训练数据通常无法用于感兴趣的应用，例如自动目标识别 (ATR) 和 SAR 数据。我们使用卷积神经网络变分自动编码器（CNNVAE）将SAR数据嵌入到特征空间中，然后从嵌入数据构建相似图并应用基于图的半监督学习技术。 CNNVAE特征嵌入和图构建不需要标记数据，这减少了过度拟合并提高了低标签率下图学习的泛化性能。此外，该方法可以轻松地结合人机交互，在数据标记过程中进行主动学习。我们在具有少量标记数据的 ATR 的移动和静止目标获取和识别 (MSTAR) 数据集上展示了有希望的结果，并将其与其他标准机器学习方法进行了比较。 本文提出一种结合图基学习与神经网络的主动学习方法，用于SAR数据的半监督分类。 Kevin Miller,John Mauro,Jason Setiadi,Xoaquin Baca,Zhan Shi,Jeff Calder,Andrea L. Bertozzi cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,eess.IV,math.NA

authors_text: Gabriel Van Zandycke,Christophe De Vleeschouwer
title: Ball 3D Localization From A Single Calibrated Image
title_zh: 通过单个校准图像进行球 3D 定位
abstract: Ball 3D localization in team sports has various applications including automatic offside detection in soccer, or shot release localization in basketball. Today, this task is either resolved by using expensive multi-views setups, or by restricting the analysis to ballistic trajectories. In this work, we propose to address the task on a single image from a calibrated monocular camera by estimating ball diameter in pixels and use the knowledge of real ball diameter in meters. This approach is suitable for any game situation where the ball is (even partly) visible. To achieve this, we use a small neural network trained on image patches around candidates generated by a conventional ball detector. Besides predicting ball diameter, our network outputs the confidence of having a ball in the image patch. Validations on 3 basketball datasets reveals that our model gives remarkable predictions on ball 3D localization. In addition, through its confidence output, our model improves the detection rate by filtering the candidates produced by the detector. The contributions of this work are (i) the first model to address 3D ball localization on a single image, (ii) an effective method for ball 3D annotation from single calibrated images, (iii) a high quality 3D ball evaluation dataset annotated from a single viewpoint. In addition, the code to reproduce this research is be made freely available at https://github.com/gabriel-vanzandycke/deepsport.
summary: Ball 3D localization in team sports has various applications including automatic offside detection in soccer, or shot release localization in basketball. Today, this task is either resolved by using expensive multi-views setups, or by restricting the analysis to ballistic trajectories. In this work, we propose to address the task on a single image from a calibrated monocular camera by estimating ball diameter in pixels and use the knowledge of real ball diameter in meters. This approach is suitable for any game situation where the ball is (even partly) visible. To achieve this, we use a small neural network trained on image patches around candidates generated by a conventional ball detector. Besides predicting ball diameter, our network outputs the confidence of having a ball in the image patch. Validations on 3 basketball datasets reveals that our model gives remarkable predictions on ball 3D localization. In addition, through its confidence output, our model improves the detection rate by filtering the candidates produced by the detector. The contributions of this work are (i) the first model to address 3D ball localization on a single image, (ii) an effective method for ball 3D annotation from single calibrated images, (iii) a high quality 3D ball evaluation dataset annotated from a single viewpoint. In addition, the code to reproduce this research is be made freely available at https://github.com/gabriel-vanzandycke/deepsport.
abstract_zh: 团队运动中的球 3D 定位具有多种应用，包括足球中的自动越位检测或篮球中的投篮定位。如今，这项任务要么通过使用昂贵的多视图设置来解决，要么通过将分析限制在弹道轨迹上来解决。在这项工作中，我们建议通过估计球直径（以像素为单位）并使用真实球直径（以米为单位）的知识来解决来自校准单目相机的单个图像的任务。这种方法适用于球（甚至部分）可见的任何比赛情况。为了实现这一目标，我们使用一个小型神经网络，对传统球检测器生成的候选者周围的图像补丁进行训练。除了预测球直径之外，我们的网络还输出图像块中存在球的置信度。对 3 个篮球数据集的验证表明，我们的模型对球 3D 定位给出了出色的预测。此外，通过其置信度输出，我们的模型通过过滤检测器产生的候选者来提高检测率。这项工作的贡献是（i）第一个在单个图像上解决 3D 球定位问题的模型，（ii）一种从单个校准图像进行球 3D 注释的有效方法，（iii）从单个视点注释的高质量 3D 球评估数据集。此外，重现这项研究的代码可在 https://github.com/gabriel-vanzandycke/deepsport 上免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单张校准图像中实现球体3D定位的方法，无需多视角设备或依赖弹道轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有球体3D定位方法依赖昂贵的多视角设备或仅适用于弹道轨迹分析，缺乏在单张图像中直接定位的通用解决方案。
AI.method: 通过估计图像中球体直径（像素值）并与真实直径（米）对比，结合神经网络对候选区域进行直径预测和置信度评估，实现单图像3D定位。
AI.result: 在三个篮球数据集验证中，模型表现出色的3D定位精度，并通过置信度输出提升检测率，同时贡献了首个单视角3D球体标注数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为单图像球体3D定位提供了有效方案，推动了体育分析中低成本、实时定位技术的发展。
